title: Extractive is not Faithful: An Investigation of Broad Unfaithfulness Problems in Extractive Summarization
title_zh: 提取并不忠实：对提取摘要中广泛不忠实问题的调查
comment: ACL 2023 (20 pages; the first 2 authors contributed equally)
comments: ACL 2023 (20 pages; the first 2 authors contributed equally)
abstract: The problems of unfaithful summaries have been widely discussed under the context of abstractive summarization. Though extractive summarization is less prone to the common unfaithfulness issues of abstractive summaries, does that mean extractive is equal to faithful? Turns out that the answer is no. In this work, we define a typology with five types of broad unfaithfulness problems (including and beyond not-entailment) that can appear in extractive summaries, including incorrect coreference, incomplete coreference, incorrect discourse, incomplete discourse, as well as other misleading information. We ask humans to label these problems out of 1600 English summaries produced by 16 diverse extractive systems. We find that 30% of the summaries have at least one of the five issues. To automatically detect these problems, we find that 5 existing faithfulness evaluation metrics for summarization have poor correlations with human judgment. To remedy this, we propose a new metric, ExtEval, that is designed for detecting unfaithful extractive summaries and is shown to have the best performance. We hope our work can increase the awareness of unfaithfulness problems in extractive summarization and help future work to evaluate and resolve these issues. Our data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/extractive_is_not_faithful

abstract_zh: 在抽象摘要的背景下，不忠实摘要的问题已经被广泛讨论。尽管提取摘要不太容易出现抽象摘要常见的不忠实问题，但这是否意味着提取就等于忠实？事实证明答案是否定的。在这项工作中，我们定义了一种类型学，其中包含五种可能出现在提取摘要中的广泛不忠问题（包括和超越不蕴涵），包括不正确的共指、不完整的共指、不正确的话语、不完整的话语以及其他误导性信息。我们要求人类从 16 个不同的提取系统生成的 1600 个英文摘要中标记这些问题。我们发现 30% 的摘要至少存在这五个问题之一。为了自动检测这些问题，我们发现现有的 5 个摘要可信度评估指标与人类判断的相关性较差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新的指标 ExtEval，它是为检测不忠实的提取摘要而设计的，并且被证明具有最佳性能。我们希望我们的工作能够提高人们对提取概括中不忠实问题的认识，并有助于今后的工作评估和解决这些问题。我们的数据和代码公开在 https://github.com/ZhangShiyue/extractive_is_not_faithful

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了抽取式摘要中广泛存在的不忠实问题，定义了五类问题并提出新的评估指标ExtEval。
AI.motivation: 尽管抽取式摘要相比生成式摘要更少出现不忠实问题，但作者质疑其是否完全忠实，并希望揭示隐藏的不忠实现象。
AI.method: 通过人工标注1600条英文摘要中的五类不忠实问题（如核心ference错误、话语不完整等），并开发ExtEval指标进行自动检测。
AI.result: 30%的摘要存在至少一类不忠实问题，现有5种评估指标与人工判断相关性低，而ExtEval表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 抽取式摘要并非完全忠实，需提高对此类问题的认知，并通过ExtEval促进未来研究与改进。

authors_text: Anindya Sarkar,Jiarui Feng,Yevgeniy Vorobeychik,Christopher Gill,Ning Zhang
title: Reward Delay Attacks on Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习的奖励延迟攻击
comment: 20 pages, 9 figures, Conference on Decision and Game Theory for Security
comments: 20 pages, 9 figures, Conference on Decision and Game Theory for Security
abstract: Most reinforcement learning algorithms implicitly assume strong synchrony. We present novel attacks targeting Q-learning that exploit a vulnerability entailed by this assumption by delaying the reward signal for a limited time period. We consider two types of attack goals: targeted attacks, which aim to cause a target policy to be learned, and untargeted attacks, which simply aim to induce a policy with a low reward. We evaluate the efficacy of the proposed attacks through a series of experiments. Our first observation is that reward-delay attacks are extremely effective when the goal is simply to minimize reward. Indeed, we find that even naive baseline reward-delay attacks are also highly successful in minimizing the reward. Targeted attacks, on the other hand, are more challenging, although we nevertheless demonstrate that the proposed approaches remain highly effective at achieving the attacker's targets. In addition, we introduce a second threat model that captures a minimal mitigation that ensures that rewards cannot be used out of sequence. We find that this mitigation remains insufficient to ensure robustness to attacks that delay, but preserve the order, of rewards.
summary: Most reinforcement learning algorithms implicitly assume strong synchrony. We present novel attacks targeting Q-learning that exploit a vulnerability entailed by this assumption by delaying the reward signal for a limited time period. We consider two types of attack goals: targeted attacks, which aim to cause a target policy to be learned, and untargeted attacks, which simply aim to induce a policy with a low reward. We evaluate the efficacy of the proposed attacks through a series of experiments. Our first observation is that reward-delay attacks are extremely effective when the goal is simply to minimize reward. Indeed, we find that even naive baseline reward-delay attacks are also highly successful in minimizing the reward. Targeted attacks, on the other hand, are more challenging, although we nevertheless demonstrate that the proposed approaches remain highly effective at achieving the attacker's targets. In addition, we introduce a second threat model that captures a minimal mitigation that ensures that rewards cannot be used out of sequence. We find that this mitigation remains insufficient to ensure robustness to attacks that delay, but preserve the order, of rewards.
abstract_zh: 大多数强化学习算法隐含地假设强同步性。我们提出了针对 Q-learning 的新颖攻击，这些攻击通过在有限的时间内延迟奖励信号来利用这种假设所带来的漏洞。我们考虑两种类型的攻击目标：有针对性的攻击，其目的是使目标策略被学习，以及无针对性的攻击，其目的只是诱导低奖励的策略。我们通过一系列实验评估所提出的攻击的有效性。我们的第一个观察结果是，当目标只是最小化奖励时，奖励延迟​​攻击非常有效。事实上，我们发现即使是幼稚的基线奖励延迟攻击在最小化奖励方面也非常成功。另一方面，有针对性的攻击更具挑战性，尽管我们仍然证明所提出的方法在实现攻击者的目标方面仍然非常有效。此外，我们引入了第二种威胁模型，该模型捕获最小的缓解措施，确保奖励不能乱序使用。我们发现这种缓解措施仍然不足以确保对延迟但保留奖励顺序的攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对深度强化学习中Q-learning算法的奖励延迟攻击方法，通过延迟奖励信号破坏算法性能。
AI.motivation: 强化学习算法通常假设环境反馈的强同步性，但这一假设可能存在安全漏洞。作者旨在揭示该假设被利用时对算法的潜在威胁。
AI.method: 设计两种攻击目标（定向/非定向），通过延迟奖励信号实施攻击，并提出一个保留奖励顺序的缓解模型进行对比验证。
AI.result: 非定向攻击能有效降低奖励值，简单延迟方法即具高成功率；定向攻击难度较高但依然有效；提出的缓解模型无法抵御保持奖励顺序的延迟攻击。
AI.conclusion: 奖励延迟攻击可显著破坏Q-learning算法性能，现有缓解措施存在局限，需进一步研究强化学习的鲁棒性机制。

We present novel attacks targeting Q-learning that exploit a vulnerability entailed by this assumption by delaying the reward signal for a limited time period. We evaluate the efficacy of the proposed attacks through a series of experiments. Our first observation is that reward-delay attacks are extremely effective when the goal is simply to minimize reward. Indeed, we find that even naive baseline reward-delay attacks are also highly successful in minimizing the reward. Targeted attacks, on the other hand, are more challenging, although we nevertheless demonstrate that the proposed approaches remain highly effective at achieving the attacker's targets. In addition, we introduce a second threat model that captures a minimal mitigation that ensures that rewards cannot be used out of sequence. We find that this mitigation remains insufficient to ensure robustness to attacks that delay, but preserve the order, of rewards. 大多数强化学习算法隐含地假设强同步性。我们提出了针对 Q-learning 的新颖攻击，这些攻击通过在有限的时间内延迟奖励信号来利用这种假设所带来的漏洞。我们考虑两种类型的攻击目标：有针对性的攻击，其目的是使目标策略被学习，以及无针对性的攻击，其目的只是诱导低奖励的策略。我们通过一系列实验评估所提出的攻击的有效性。我们的第一个观察结果是，当目标只是最小化奖励时，奖励延迟​​攻击非常有效。事实上，我们发现即使是幼稚的基线奖励延迟攻击在最小化奖励方面也非常成功。另一方面，有针对性的攻击更具挑战性，尽管我们仍然证明所提出的方法在实现攻击者的目标方面仍然非常有效。此外，我们引入了第二种威胁模型，该模型捕获最小的缓解措施，确保奖励不能乱序使用。我们发现这种缓解措施仍然不足以确保对延迟但保留奖励顺序的攻击的鲁棒性。 本文提出针对深度强化学习中Q-learning算法的奖励延迟攻击方法，通过延迟奖励信号破坏算法性能。 Anindya Sarkar,Jiarui Feng,Yevgeniy Vorobeychik,Christopher Gill,Ning Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

title: CLaCLab at SocialDisNER: Using Medical Gazetteers for Named-Entity Recognition of Disease Mentions in Spanish Tweets
title_zh: SocialDisNER 的 CLaCLab：使用医学地名词典对西班牙语推文中提及的疾病进行命名实体识别
comment: In Proceedings of the Social Media Mining for Health Applications Workshop at COLING 2022
comments: In Proceedings of the Social Media Mining for Health Applications Workshop at COLING 2022
abstract: This paper summarizes the CLaC submission for SMM4H 2022 Task 10 which concerns the recognition of diseases mentioned in Spanish tweets. Before classifying each token, we encode each token with a transformer encoder using features from Multilingual RoBERTa Large, UMLS gazetteer, and DISTEMIST gazetteer, among others. We obtain a strict F1 score of 0.869, with competition mean of 0.675, standard deviation of 0.245, and median of 0.761.
summary: This paper summarizes the CLaC submission for SMM4H 2022 Task 10 which concerns the recognition of diseases mentioned in Spanish tweets. Before classifying each token, we encode each token with a transformer encoder using features from Multilingual RoBERTa Large, UMLS gazetteer, and DISTEMIST gazetteer, among others. We obtain a strict F1 score of 0.869, with competition mean of 0.675, standard deviation of 0.245, and median of 0.761.
abstract_zh: 本文总结了 CLaC 提交的 SMM4H 2022 任务 10，该任务涉及西班牙推文中提到的疾病的识别。在对每个标记进行分类之前，我们使用来自多语言 RoBERTa Large、UMLS 地名词典和 DISTEMIST 地名词典等的特征的转换器编码器对每个标记进行编码。我们获得的严格 F1 分数为 0.869，竞争平均值为 0.675，标准差为 0.245，中位数为 0.761。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用医学词典辅助的命名实体识别方法，以识别西班牙语推文中提及的疾病名称。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中的疾病提及识别对公共卫生研究至关重要，但西班牙语推文存在非结构化表达和医学术语缩写等挑战，需结合领域知识提升识别效果。
AI.method: 采用Multilingual RoBERTa Large模型编码文本，融合UMLS和DISTEMIST医学词典特征，通过Transformer编码器处理每个标记以实现疾病实体识别。
AI.result: 在SMM4H 2022任务中取得严格F1值0.869，显著高于竞赛平均值0.675（标准差0.245，中位数0.761）。
AI.conclusion: 结合预训练语言模型与医学词典的方法有效提升了西班牙语推文疾病实体识别性能，为相关研究提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出使用医学词典辅助的命名实体识别方法，以识别西班牙语推文中提及的疾病名称。
ai_content.motivation: 社交媒体中的疾病提及识别对公共卫生研究至关重要，但西班牙语推文存在非结构化表达和医学术语缩写等挑战，需结合领域知识提升识别效果。
ai_content.method: 采用Multilingual RoBERTa Large模型编码文本，融合UMLS和DISTEMIST医学词典特征，通过Transformer编码器处理每个标记以实现疾病实体识别。
ai_content.result: 在SMM4H 2022任务中取得严格F1值0.869，显著高于竞赛平均值0.675（标准差0.245，中位数0.761）。
ai_content.conclusion: 结合预训练语言模型与医学词典的方法有效提升了西班牙语推文疾病实体识别性能，为相关研究提供了可行方案。

search_text: CLaCLab at SocialDisNER: Using Medical Gazetteers for Named-Entity Recognition of Disease Mentions in Spanish Tweets SocialDisNER 的 CLaCLab：使用医学地名词典对西班牙语推文中提及的疾病进行命名实体识别 This paper summarizes the CLaC submission for SMM4H 2022 Task 10 which concerns the recognition of diseases mentioned in Spanish tweets. Before classifying each token, we encode each token with a transformer encoder using features from Multilingual RoBERTa Large, UMLS gazetteer, and DISTEMIST gazetteer, among others. We obtain a strict F1 score of 0.869, with competition mean of 0.675, standard deviation of 0.245, and median of 0.761. 本文总结了 CLaC 提交的 SMM4H 2022 任务 10，该任务涉及西班牙推文中提到的疾病的识别。在对每个标记进行分类之前，我们使用来自多语言 RoBERTa Large、UMLS 地名词典和 DISTEMIST 地名词典等的特征的转换器编码器对每个标记进行编码。我们获得的严格 F1 分数为 0.869，竞争平均值为 0.675，标准差为 0.245，中位数为 0.761。 本文提出使用医学词典辅助的命名实体识别方法，以识别西班牙语推文中提及的疾病名称。 Harsh Verma,Parsa Bagherzadeh,Sabine Bergler cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Measuring Human Perception to Improve Open Set Recognition
title_zh: 测量人类感知以提高开放集识别能力
abstract: The human ability to recognize when an object belongs or does not belong to a particular vision task outperforms all open set recognition algorithms. Human perception as measured by the methods and procedures of visual psychophysics from psychology provides an additional data stream for algorithms that need to manage novelty. For instance, measured reaction time from human subjects can offer insight as to whether a class sample is prone to be confused with a different class -- known or novel. In this work, we designed and performed a large-scale behavioral experiment that collected over 200,000 human reaction time measurements associated with object recognition. The data collected indicated reaction time varies meaningfully across objects at the sample-level. We therefore designed a new psychophysical loss function that enforces consistency with human behavior in deep networks which exhibit variable reaction time for different images. As in biological vision, this approach allows us to achieve good open set recognition performance in regimes with limited labeled training data. Through experiments using data from ImageNet, significant improvement is observed when training Multi-Scale DenseNets with this new formulation: it significantly improved top-1 validation accuracy by 6.02%, top-1 test accuracy on known samples by 9.81%, and top-1 test accuracy on unknown samples by 33.18%. We compared our method to 10 open set recognition methods from the literature, which were all outperformed on multiple metrics.
summary: The human ability to recognize when an object belongs or does not belong to a particular vision task outperforms all open set recognition algorithms. Human perception as measured by the methods and procedures of visual psychophysics from psychology provides an additional data stream for algorithms that need to manage novelty. For instance, measured reaction time from human subjects can offer insight as to whether a class sample is prone to be confused with a different class -- known or novel. In this work, we designed and performed a large-scale behavioral experiment that collected over 200,000 human reaction time measurements associated with object recognition. The data collected indicated reaction time varies meaningfully across objects at the sample-level. We therefore designed a new psychophysical loss function that enforces consistency with human behavior in deep networks which exhibit variable reaction time for different images. As in biological vision, this approach allows us to achieve good open set recognition performance in regimes with limited labeled training data. Through experiments using data from ImageNet, significant improvement is observed when training Multi-Scale DenseNets with this new formulation: it significantly improved top-1 validation accuracy by 6.02%, top-1 test accuracy on known samples by 9.81%, and top-1 test accuracy on unknown samples by 33.18%. We compared our method to 10 open set recognition methods from the literature, which were all outperformed on multiple metrics.
abstract_zh: 人类识别物体何时属于或不属于特定视觉任务的能力优于所有开放集识别算法。通过心理学视觉心理物理学的方法和程序测量的人类感知为需要管理新颖性的算法提供了额外的数据流。例如，测量人类受试者的反应时间可以洞察某个类别样本是否容易与其他类别（已知的类别或新类别）混淆。在这项工作中，我们设计并进行了一项大规模行为实验，收集了超过 200,000 个与物体识别相关的人类反应时间测量结果。收集的数据表明，在样本水平上，不同对象的反应时间存在显着差异。因此，我们设计了一种新的心理物理损失函数，该函数可以增强深层网络中人类行为的一致性，该网络对不同图像表现出不同的反应时间。与生物视觉一样，这种方法使我们能够在标记训练数据有限的情况下实现良好的开放集识别性能。通过使用 ImageNet 数据进行的实验，使用这种新公式训练多尺度 DenseNet 时观察到显着的改进：它显着提高了 6.02% 的 top-1 验证精度，将已知样本的 top-1 测试精度提高了 9.81%，将未知样本的 top-1 测试精度提高了 33.18%。我们将我们的方法与文献中的 10 种开放集识别方法进行了比较，这些方法在多个指标上均优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入人类感知数据改进开放集识别算法，利用人类反应时间作为额外数据流提升模型对未知样本的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 人类在判断物体是否属于特定类别时的表现优于现有开放集识别算法，而视觉心理物理学方法测量的反应时间能提供样本混淆倾向的洞察，从而优化算法对新颖性的处理。
AI.method: 设计大规模行为实验收集20万+人类反应时间数据，构建符合人类行为模式的心理物理损失函数，并将其应用于多尺度DenseNet训练中。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法使验证集top-1准确率提升6.02%，已知样本测试准确率提升9.81%，未知样本测试准确率提升33.18%，优于10种现有开放集方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合人类感知数据的心理物理损失函数能有效提升开放集识别性能，尤其在标注数据有限时表现突出，为深度学习模型提供了新的行为一致性约束范式。

title: PMU Tracker: A Visualization Platform for Epicentric Event Propagation Analysis in the Power Grid
title_zh: PMU Tracker：电网中中心事件传播分析的可视化平台
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, IEEE VIS 2022 Paper to appear in IEEE TVCG; conference encourages arXiv submission for accessibility
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, IEEE VIS 2022 Paper to appear in IEEE TVCG; conference encourages arXiv submission for accessibility
abstract: The electrical power grid is a critical infrastructure, with disruptions in transmission having severe repercussions on daily activities, across multiple sectors. To identify, prevent, and mitigate such events, power grids are being refurbished as 'smart' systems that include the widespread deployment of GPS-enabled phasor measurement units (PMUs). PMUs provide fast, precise, and time-synchronized measurements of voltage and current, enabling real-time wide-area monitoring and control. However, the potential benefits of PMUs, for analyzing grid events like abnormal power oscillations and load fluctuations, are hindered by the fact that these sensors produce large, concurrent volumes of noisy data. In this paper, we describe working with power grid engineers to investigate how this problem can be addressed from a visual analytics perspective. As a result, we have developed PMU Tracker, an event localization tool that supports power grid operators in visually analyzing and identifying power grid events and tracking their propagation through the power grid's network. As a part of the PMU Tracker interface, we develop a novel visualization technique which we term an epicentric cluster dendrogram, which allows operators to analyze the effects of an event as it propagates outwards from a source location. We robustly validate PMU Tracker with: (1) a usage scenario demonstrating how PMU Tracker can be used to analyze anomalous grid events, and (2) case studies with power grid operators using a real-world interconnection dataset. Our results indicate that PMU Tracker effectively supports the analysis of power grid events; we also demonstrate and discuss how PMU Tracker's visual analytics approach can be generalized to other domains composed of time-varying networks with epicentric event characteristics.
summary: The electrical power grid is a critical infrastructure, with disruptions in transmission having severe repercussions on daily activities, across multiple sectors. To identify, prevent, and mitigate such events, power grids are being refurbished as 'smart' systems that include the widespread deployment of GPS-enabled phasor measurement units (PMUs). PMUs provide fast, precise, and time-synchronized measurements of voltage and current, enabling real-time wide-area monitoring and control. However, the potential benefits of PMUs, for analyzing grid events like abnormal power oscillations and load fluctuations, are hindered by the fact that these sensors produce large, concurrent volumes of noisy data. In this paper, we describe working with power grid engineers to investigate how this problem can be addressed from a visual analytics perspective. As a result, we have developed PMU Tracker, an event localization tool that supports power grid operators in visually analyzing and identifying power grid events and tracking their propagation through the power grid's network. As a part of the PMU Tracker interface, we develop a novel visualization technique which we term an epicentric cluster dendrogram, which allows operators to analyze the effects of an event as it propagates outwards from a source location. We robustly validate PMU Tracker with: (1) a usage scenario demonstrating how PMU Tracker can be used to analyze anomalous grid events, and (2) case studies with power grid operators using a real-world interconnection dataset. Our results indicate that PMU Tracker effectively supports the analysis of power grid events; we also demonstrate and discuss how PMU Tracker's visual analytics approach can be generalized to other domains composed of time-varying networks with epicentric event characteristics.
abstract_zh: 电网是重要的基础设施，输电中断会对多个部门的日常活动产生严重影响。为了识别、预防和减轻此类事件，电网正在被翻新为“智能”系统，其中包括广泛部署支持 GPS 的相量测量单元 (PMU)。 PMU 提供快速、精确且时间同步的电压和电流测量，从而实现实时广域监测和控制。然而，PMU 在分析异常功率振荡和负载波动等电网事件方面的潜在优势却因这些传感器产生大量并发噪声数据而受到阻碍。在本文中，我们描述了与电网工程师合作，研究如何从可视化分析的角度解决这个问题。因此，我们开发了PMU Tracker，这是一种事件定位工具，支持电网运营商直观地分析和识别电网事件并跟踪其在电网网络中的传播。作为 PMU Tracker 界面的一部分，我们开发了一种新颖的可视化技术，称为中心簇树状图，它允许操作员分析事件从源位置向外传播时的影响。我们通过以下方式对 PMU Tracker 进行稳健验证：(1) 演示如何使用 PMU Tracker 分析异常电网事件的使用场景，以及 (2) 使用真实世界互连数据集与电网运营商进行案例研究。结果表明，PMU Tracker有效支持电网事件分析；我们还演示并讨论了如何将 PMU Tracker 的可视化分析方法推广到由具有中心事件特征的时变网络组成的其他领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PMU Tracker的可视化平台，用于分析电力网络中以中心点为源的事件传播。
AI.motivation: 电力系统中PMU产生的大规模噪声数据阻碍了对电网异常事件（如功率振荡）的分析，亟需可视化工具辅助定位与追踪事件传播。
AI.method: 开发了PMU Tracker工具，包含一种新型可视化技术——以中心点为源的聚类树状图（epicentric cluster dendrogram），并结合实际电网数据验证其有效性。
AI.result: PMU Tracker能有效支持电网事件分析，通过使用场景和实际案例验证了其在真实电网数据中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: PMU Tracker的可视化分析方法可推广至其他具有时间变化网络和中心源事件特征的领域。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PMU Tracker的可视化平台，用于分析电力网络中以中心点为源的事件传播。
motivation: 电力系统中PMU产生的大规模噪声数据阻碍了对电网异常事件（如功率振荡）的分析，亟需可视化工具辅助定位与追踪事件传播。
method: 开发了PMU Tracker工具，包含一种新型可视化技术——以中心点为源的聚类树状图（epicentric cluster dendrogram），并结合实际电网数据验证其有效性。
result: PMU Tracker能有效支持电网事件分析，通过使用场景和实际案例验证了其在真实电网数据中的可行性。
conclusion: PMU Tracker的可视化分析方法可推广至其他具有时间变化网络和中心源事件特征的领域。
search_text: PMU Tracker: A Visualization Platform for Epicentric Event Propagation Analysis in the Power Grid PMU Tracker：电网中中心事件传播分析的可视化平台 The electrical power grid is a critical infrastructure, with disruptions in transmission having severe repercussions on daily activities, across multiple sectors. To identify, prevent, and mitigate such events, power grids are being refurbished as 'smart' systems that include the widespread deployment of GPS-enabled phasor measurement units (PMUs). PMUs provide fast, precise, and time-synchronized measurements of voltage and current, enabling real-time wide-area monitoring and control. However, the potential benefits of PMUs, for analyzing grid events like abnormal power oscillations and load fluctuations, are hindered by the fact that these sensors produce large, concurrent volumes of noisy data. In this paper, we describe working with power grid engineers to investigate how this problem can be addressed from a visual analytics perspective. As a result, we have developed PMU Tracker, an event localization tool that supports power grid operators in visually analyzing and identifying power grid events and tracking their propagation through the power grid's network. As a part of the PMU Tracker interface, we develop a novel visualization technique which we term an epicentric cluster dendrogram, which allows operators to analyze the effects of an event as it propagates outwards from a source location. We robustly validate PMU Tracker with: (1) a usage scenario demonstrating how PMU Tracker can be used to analyze anomalous grid events, and (2) case studies with power grid operators using a real-world interconnection dataset. Our results indicate that PMU Tracker effectively supports the analysis of power grid events; we also demonstrate and discuss how PMU Tracker's visual analytics approach can be generalized to other domains composed of time-varying networks with epicentric event characteristics. 电网是重要的基础设施，输电中断会对多个部门的日常活动产生严重影响。为了识别、预防和减轻此类事件，电网正在被翻新为“智能”系统，其中包括广泛部署支持 GPS 的相量测量单元 (PMU)。 PMU 提供快速、精确且时间同步的电压和电流测量，从而实现实时广域监测和控制。然而，PMU 在分析异常功率振荡和负载波动等电网事件方面的潜在优势却因这些传感器产生大量并发噪声数据而受到阻碍。在本文中，我们描述了与电网工程师合作，研究如何从可视化分析的角度解决这个问题。因此，我们开发了PMU Tracker，这是一种事件定位工具，支持电网运营商直观地分析和识别电网事件并跟踪其在电网网络中的传播。作为 PMU Tracker 界面的一部分，我们开发了一种新颖的可视化技术，称为中心簇树状图，它允许操作员分析事件从源位置向外传播时的影响。我们通过以下方式对 PMU Tracker 进行稳健验证：(1) 演示如何使用 PMU Tracker 分析异常电网事件的使用场景，以及 (2) 使用真实世界互连数据集与电网运营商进行案例研究。结果表明，PMU Tracker有效支持电网事件分析；我们还演示并讨论了如何将 PMU Tracker 的可视化分析方法推广到由具有中心事件特征的时变网络组成的其他领域。 本文提出了一种名为PMU Tracker的可视化平台，用于分析电力网络中以中心点为源的事件传播。 Anjana Arunkumar,Andrea Pinceti,Lalitha Sankar,Chris Bryan cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Hui Wang,Jieren Cheng,Yichen Xu,Sirui Ni,Zaijia Yang,Jiangpeng Li
title: A Secure and Efficient Multi-Object Grasping Detection Approach for Robotic Arms
title_zh: 一种安全高效的机械臂多物体抓取检测方法
abstract: Robotic arms are widely used in automatic industries. However, with wide applications of deep learning in robotic arms, there are new challenges such as the allocation of grasping computing power and the growing demand for security. In this work, we propose a robotic arm grasping approach based on deep learning and edge-cloud collaboration. This approach realizes the arbitrary grasp planning of the robot arm and considers the grasp efficiency and information security. In addition, the encoder and decoder trained by GAN enable the images to be encrypted while compressing, which ensures the security of privacy. The model achieves 92% accuracy on the OCID dataset, the image compression ratio reaches 0.03%, and the structural difference value is higher than 0.91.
summary: Robotic arms are widely used in automatic industries. However, with wide applications of deep learning in robotic arms, there are new challenges such as the allocation of grasping computing power and the growing demand for security. In this work, we propose a robotic arm grasping approach based on deep learning and edge-cloud collaboration. This approach realizes the arbitrary grasp planning of the robot arm and considers the grasp efficiency and information security. In addition, the encoder and decoder trained by GAN enable the images to be encrypted while compressing, which ensures the security of privacy. The model achieves 92% accuracy on the OCID dataset, the image compression ratio reaches 0.03%, and the structural difference value is higher than 0.91.
abstract_zh: 机械臂广泛应用于自动化行业。然而，随着深度学习在机械臂上的广泛应用，也带来了抓取算力的分配、安全需求日益增长等新的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习和边云协作的机械臂抓取方法。该方法实现了机械臂的任意抓取规划，并考虑了抓取效率和信息安全。此外，GAN训练的编码器和解码器使得图像在压缩的同时进行加密，保证了隐私的安全。该模型在OCID数据集上达到92%的准确率，图像压缩比达到0.03%，结构差异值高于0.91。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习和边云协作的机械臂多物体抓取检测方法，兼顾效率与信息安全。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在机械臂应用中面临计算资源分配与隐私安全挑战，需提升抓取效率并保障数据传输安全。
AI.method: 结合边云协作架构实现抓取规划，采用GAN训练的编解码器对图像进行加密压缩以保护隐私。
AI.result: 在OCID数据集上达到92%准确率，图像压缩比0.03%，结构差异值超0.91。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了机械臂抓取的实时性需求与敏感图像数据的安全性保护。

authors_text: FNU Abhimanyu,Tejas Zodage,Umesh Thillaivasan,Xinyue Lai,Rahul Chakwate,Javier Santillan,Emma Oti,Ming Zhao,Ralph Boirum,Howie Choset,Matthew Travers
title: RGB-X Classification for Electronics Sorting
title_zh: 用于电子产品分类的 RGB-X 分类
abstract: Effectively disassembling and recovering materials from waste electrical and electronic equipment (WEEE) is a critical step in moving global supply chains from carbon-intensive, mined materials to recycled and renewable ones. Conventional recycling processes rely on shredding and sorting waste streams, but for WEEE, which is comprised of numerous dissimilar materials, we explore targeted disassembly of numerous objects for improved material recovery. Many WEEE objects share many key features and therefore can look quite similar, but their material composition and internal component layout can vary, and thus it is critical to have an accurate classifier for subsequent disassembly steps for accurate material separation and recovery. This work introduces RGB-X, a multi-modal image classification approach, that utilizes key features from external RGB images with those generated from X-ray images to accurately classify electronic objects. More specifically, this work develops Iterative Class Activation Mapping (iCAM), a novel network architecture that explicitly focuses on the finer-details in the multi-modal feature maps that are needed for accurate electronic object classification. In order to train a classifier, electronic objects lack large and well annotated X-ray datasets due to expense and need of expert guidance. To overcome this issue, we present a novel way of creating a synthetic dataset using domain randomization applied to the X-ray domain. The combined RGB-X approach gives us an accuracy of 98.6% on 10 generations of modern smartphones, which is greater than their individual accuracies of 89.1% (RGB) and 97.9% (X-ray) independently. We provide experimental results3 to corroborate our results.
summary: Effectively disassembling and recovering materials from waste electrical and electronic equipment (WEEE) is a critical step in moving global supply chains from carbon-intensive, mined materials to recycled and renewable ones. Conventional recycling processes rely on shredding and sorting waste streams, but for WEEE, which is comprised of numerous dissimilar materials, we explore targeted disassembly of numerous objects for improved material recovery. Many WEEE objects share many key features and therefore can look quite similar, but their material composition and internal component layout can vary, and thus it is critical to have an accurate classifier for subsequent disassembly steps for accurate material separation and recovery. This work introduces RGB-X, a multi-modal image classification approach, that utilizes key features from external RGB images with those generated from X-ray images to accurately classify electronic objects. More specifically, this work develops Iterative Class Activation Mapping (iCAM), a novel network architecture that explicitly focuses on the finer-details in the multi-modal feature maps that are needed for accurate electronic object classification. In order to train a classifier, electronic objects lack large and well annotated X-ray datasets due to expense and need of expert guidance. To overcome this issue, we present a novel way of creating a synthetic dataset using domain randomization applied to the X-ray domain. The combined RGB-X approach gives us an accuracy of 98.6% on 10 generations of modern smartphones, which is greater than their individual accuracies of 89.1% (RGB) and 97.9% (X-ray) independently. We provide experimental results3 to corroborate our results.
abstract_zh: 有效拆卸和回收废弃电气电子设备 (WEEE) 中的材料是将全球供应链从碳密集型开采材料转向回收和可再生材料的关键一步。传统的回收工艺依赖于废物流的粉碎和分类，但对于由多种不同材料组成的 WEEE，我们探索对多种物体进行有针对性的拆卸，以提高材料回收率。许多 WEEE 物体具有许多关键特征，因此看起来非常相似，但它们的材料成分和内部组件布局可能有所不同，因此为后续拆卸步骤提供准确的分类器以实现准确的材料分离和回收至关重要。这项工作介绍了 RGB-X，这是一种多模态图像分类方法，它利用外部 RGB 图像的关键特征和 X 射线图像生成的特征来准确地对电子物体进行分类。更具体地说，这项工作开发了迭代类激活映射（iCAM），这是一种新颖的网络架构，明确关注精确电子对象分类所需的多模态特征图中的更精细细节。为了训练分类器，由于费用和专家指导的需要，电子物体缺乏大型且注释良好的 X 射线数据集。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种使用应用于 X 射线域的域随机化来创建合成数据集的新方法。组合的 RGB-X 方法使我们在 10 代现代智能手机上的准确度达到 98.6%，这高于它们单独的 89.1%（RGB）和 97.9%（X 射线）的准确度。我们提供实验结果3来证实我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RGB-X多模态图像分类方法，结合RGB和X射线图像特征，用于电子废弃物的精确分类。
AI.motivation: 传统电子废弃物回收方法依赖破碎和分选，但因材料复杂性导致效率低下，需更精准的分类技术以提高材料回收率。
AI.method: 开发迭代类激活映射（iCAM）网络架构，融合RGB与X射线图像特征，并通过领域随机化生成合成数据集解决X射线数据不足问题。
AI.result: 在10代智能手机数据集上达到98.6%分类准确率，优于单独使用RGB（89.1%）或X射线（97.9%）的方法。
AI.conclusion: RGB-X方法通过多模态特征融合显著提升电子对象分类精度，为电子废弃物高效回收提供可行技术方案。

title: Regulating eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) May Harm Consumers
title_zh: 监管可解释人工智能 (XAI) 可能会损害消费者
abstract: Recent AI algorithms are black box models whose decisions are difficult to interpret. eXplainable AI (XAI) is a class of methods that seek to address lack of AI interpretability and trust by explaining to customers their AI decisions. The common wisdom is that regulating AI by mandating fully transparent XAI leads to greater social welfare. Our paper challenges this notion through a game theoretic model of a policy-maker who maximizes social welfare, firms in a duopoly competition that maximize profits, and heterogenous consumers. The results show that XAI regulation may be redundant. In fact, mandating fully transparent XAI may make firms and consumers worse off. This reveals a tradeoff between maximizing welfare and receiving explainable AI outputs. We extend the existing literature on method and substantive fronts, and we introduce and study the notion of XAI fairness, which may be impossible to guarantee even under mandatory XAI. Finally, the regulatory and managerial implications of our results for policy-makers and businesses are discussed, respectively.
summary: Recent AI algorithms are black box models whose decisions are difficult to interpret. eXplainable AI (XAI) is a class of methods that seek to address lack of AI interpretability and trust by explaining to customers their AI decisions. The common wisdom is that regulating AI by mandating fully transparent XAI leads to greater social welfare. Our paper challenges this notion through a game theoretic model of a policy-maker who maximizes social welfare, firms in a duopoly competition that maximize profits, and heterogenous consumers. The results show that XAI regulation may be redundant. In fact, mandating fully transparent XAI may make firms and consumers worse off. This reveals a tradeoff between maximizing welfare and receiving explainable AI outputs. We extend the existing literature on method and substantive fronts, and we introduce and study the notion of XAI fairness, which may be impossible to guarantee even under mandatory XAI. Finally, the regulatory and managerial implications of our results for policy-makers and businesses are discussed, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近的人工智能算法是黑盒模型，其决策难以解释。 eXplainable AI (XAI) 是一类方法，旨在通过向客户解释他们的 AI 决策来解决 AI 可解释性和信任度缺乏的问题。普遍的看法是，通过强制要求完全透明的 XAI 来监管 AI 可以带来更大的社会福利。我们的论文通过博弈论模型挑战了这一概念，该模型涉及最大化社会福利的政策制定者、最大化利润的双寡头竞争中的企业以及异质消费者。结果表明，XAI 监管可能是多余的。事实上，强制要求完全透明的 XAI 可能会让企业和消费者的境况变得更糟。这揭示了福利最大化和接收可解释的人工智能输出之间的权衡。我们扩展了方法和实质性方面的现有文献，并引入和研究了 XAI 公平性的概念，即使在强制 XAI 下，这也可能无法保证。最后，分别讨论了我们的结果对政策制定者和企业的监管和管理影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过博弈论模型挑战强制透明XAI能提升社会福利的常见观点，分析其可能对企业和消费者产生的负面影响。
AI.motivation: 质疑当前认为强制XAI监管能提高社会福利的普遍认知，探讨透明性与企业利润、消费者福利间的潜在冲突。
AI.method: 构建包含政策制定者、双寡头企业和异质性消费者的博弈模型，分析强制XAI监管下的市场均衡与社会福利变化。
AI.result: 强制XAI监管可能造成企业与消费者福利下降，且XAI公平性在强制条件下难以保障，揭示透明性与福利最大化间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 需重新评估XAI监管政策，平衡透明性需求与市场效率，政策制定者应考虑监管的潜在负面效应。

authors_text: Allen Chang,Lauren Klein,Marcelo R. Rosales,Weiyang Deng,Beth A. Smith,Maja J. Matarić
title: Evaluating Temporal Patterns in Applied Infant Affect Recognition
title_zh: 评估应用婴儿情感识别中的时间模式
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII 2022)
abstract: Agents must monitor their partners' affective states continuously in order to understand and engage in social interactions. However, methods for evaluating affect recognition do not account for changes in classification performance that may occur during occlusions or transitions between affective states. This paper addresses temporal patterns in affect classification performance in the context of an infant-robot interaction, where infants' affective states contribute to their ability to participate in a therapeutic leg movement activity. To support robustness to facial occlusions in video recordings, we trained infant affect recognition classifiers using both facial and body features. Next, we conducted an in-depth analysis of our best-performing models to evaluate how performance changed over time as the models encountered missing data and changing infant affect. During time windows when features were extracted with high confidence, a unimodal model trained on facial features achieved the same optimal performance as multimodal models trained on both facial and body features. However, multimodal models outperformed unimodal models when evaluated on the entire dataset. Additionally, model performance was weakest when predicting an affective state transition and improved after multiple predictions of the same affective state. These findings emphasize the benefits of incorporating body features in continuous affect recognition for infants. Our work highlights the importance of evaluating variability in model performance both over time and in the presence of missing data when applying affect recognition to social interactions.

However, methods for evaluating affect recognition do not account for changes in classification performance that may occur during occlusions or transitions between affective states. Next, we conducted an in-depth analysis of our best-performing models to evaluate how performance changed over time as the models encountered missing data and changing infant affect. During time windows when features were extracted with high confidence, a unimodal model trained on facial features achieved the same optimal performance as multimodal models trained on both facial and body features. However, multimodal models outperformed unimodal models when evaluated on the entire dataset. Additionally, model performance was weakest when predicting an affective state transition and improved after multiple predictions of the same affective state. These findings emphasize the benefits of incorporating body features in continuous affect recognition for infants. Our work highlights the importance of evaluating variability in model performance both over time and in the presence of missing data when applying affect recognition to social interactions.
abstract_zh: 智能体必须持续监控其伴侣的情感状态，以便理解并参与社交互动。然而，评估情感识别的方法没有考虑情感状态之间的遮挡或转换期间可能发生的分类性能的变化。本文讨论了婴儿与机器人交互背景下情感分类表现的时间模式，其中婴儿的情感状态有助于他们参与治疗性腿部运动活动的能力。为了支持视频录制中面部遮挡的鲁棒性，我们使用面部和身体特征来训练婴儿情感识别分类器。接下来，我们对表现最好的模型进行了深入分析，以评估当模型遇到数据缺失和婴儿情感变化时，性能如何随时间变化。在以高置信度提取特征的时间窗口内，针对面部特征训练的单模态模型实现了与针对面部和身体特征训练的多模态模型相同的最佳性能。然而，在整个数据集上进行评估时，多模态模型的性能优于单模态模型。此外，模型性能在预测情感状态转换时最弱，而在多次预测同一情感状态后模型性能得到改善。这些发现强调了将身体特征纳入婴儿持续情感识别的好处。我们的工作强调了在将情感识别应用于社交互动时评估模型性能随时间变化和存在缺失数据的情况的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了婴儿情感识别中的时间模式，特别是在婴儿与机器人互动的治疗活动中，探讨了模型在处理面部遮挡和情感状态转换时的性能变化。
AI.motivation: 现有情感识别方法未能充分考虑遮挡或情感状态转换导致的性能波动，需提升模型在动态社交互动中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 训练融合面部和身体特征的分类器，分析模型在高置信度特征提取窗口及情感状态转换期间的性能差异，对比单模态与多模态模型表现。
AI.result: 高置信度窗口下单模态模型性能与多模态模型相当，但整体数据集上多模态模型更优；情感状态转换时性能最差，多次预测相同状态后性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征对婴儿连续情感识别至关重要，应用情感识别于社交互动时需关注时间维度及缺失数据下的性能变化。

title: Neural Feature Fusion Fields: 3D Distillation of Self-Supervised 2D Image Representations
title_zh: 神经特征融合场：自监督 2D 图像表示的 3D 蒸馏
abstract: We present Neural Feature Fusion Fields (N3F), a method that improves dense 2D image feature extractors when the latter are applied to the analysis of multiple images reconstructible as a 3D scene. Given an image feature extractor, for example pre-trained using self-supervision, N3F uses it as a teacher to learn a student network defined in 3D space. The 3D student network is similar to a neural radiance field that distills said features and can be trained with the usual differentiable rendering machinery. As a consequence, N3F is readily applicable to most neural rendering formulations, including vanilla NeRF and its extensions to complex dynamic scenes. We show that our method not only enables semantic understanding in the context of scene-specific neural fields without the use of manual labels, but also consistently improves over the self-supervised 2D baselines. This is demonstrated by considering various tasks, such as 2D object retrieval, 3D segmentation, and scene editing, in diverse sequences, including long egocentric videos in the EPIC-KITCHENS benchmark.
summary: We present Neural Feature Fusion Fields (N3F), a method that improves dense 2D image feature extractors when the latter are applied to the analysis of multiple images reconstructible as a 3D scene. Given an image feature extractor, for example pre-trained using self-supervision, N3F uses it as a teacher to learn a student network defined in 3D space. The 3D student network is similar to a neural radiance field that distills said features and can be trained with the usual differentiable rendering machinery. As a consequence, N3F is readily applicable to most neural rendering formulations, including vanilla NeRF and its extensions to complex dynamic scenes. We show that our method not only enables semantic understanding in the context of scene-specific neural fields without the use of manual labels, but also consistently improves over the self-supervised 2D baselines. This is demonstrated by considering various tasks, such as 2D object retrieval, 3D segmentation, and scene editing, in diverse sequences, including long egocentric videos in the EPIC-KITCHENS benchmark.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了神经特征融合场 (N3F)，这是一种改进密集 2D 图像特征提取器的方法，当后者应用于可重建为 3D 场景的多个图像的分析时。给定一个图像特征提取器，例如使用自监督进行预训练，N3F 将其用作老师来学习 3D 空间中定义的学生网络。 3D 学生网络类似于提取所述特征的神经辐射场，并且可以使用通常的可微渲染机制进行训练。因此，N3F 很容易适用于大多数神经渲染公式，包括普通 NeRF 及其对复杂动态场景的扩展。我们表明，我们的方法不仅能够在特定于场景的神经场的上下文中实现语义理解，而无需使用手动标签，而且还能够持续改进自监督的 2D 基线。这是通过考虑不同序列中的各种任务（例如 2D 对象检索、3D 分割和场景编辑）（包括 EPIC-KITCHENS 基准中的以自我为中心的长视频）来证明的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经特征融合场（N3F）方法，通过将自监督2D图像特征提取器的知识蒸馏到3D空间中的学生网络，提升多图像重建场景下的特征分析能力。
AI.motivation: 现有2D图像特征提取器在处理可重建为3D场景的多图像时表现不足，且缺乏对3D场景的语义理解能力，需在无需人工标注的情况下改进特征表示。
AI.method: 以自监督2D特征提取器为教师网络，训练3D空间中的学生网络（类似NeRF结构），通过可微渲染机制实现特征蒸馏，适用于多种神经渲染框架。
AI.result: 在EPIC-KITCHENS等数据集上，N3F在2D目标检索、3D分割和场景编辑任务中均优于自监督2D基线方法，且无需人工标注数据。
AI.conclusion: N3F通过3D蒸馏有效提升了2D特征提取器在复杂动态场景中的语义理解能力，为神经渲染与自监督学习结合提供了新思路。

search_text: Neural Feature Fusion Fields: 3D Distillation of Self-Supervised 2D Image Representations 神经特征融合场：自监督 2D 图像表示的 3D 蒸馏 We present Neural Feature Fusion Fields (N3F), a method that improves dense 2D image feature extractors when the latter are applied to the analysis of multiple images reconstructible as a 3D scene. Given an image feature extractor, for example pre-trained using self-supervision, N3F uses it as a teacher to learn a student network defined in 3D space. The 3D student network is similar to a neural radiance field that distills said features and can be trained with the usual differentiable rendering machinery. As a consequence, N3F is readily applicable to most neural rendering formulations, including vanilla NeRF and its extensions to complex dynamic scenes. We show that our method not only enables semantic understanding in the context of scene-specific neural fields without the use of manual labels, but also consistently improves over the self-supervised 2D baselines. This is demonstrated by considering various tasks, such as 2D object retrieval, 3D segmentation, and scene editing, in diverse sequences, including long egocentric videos in the EPIC-KITCHENS benchmark. 我们提出了神经特征融合场 (N3F)，这是一种改进密集 2D 图像特征提取器的方法，当后者应用于可重建为 3D 场景的多个图像的分析时。给定一个图像特征提取器，例如使用自监督进行预训练，N3F 将其用作老师来学习 3D 空间中定义的学生网络。 3D 学生网络类似于提取所述特征的神经辐射场，并且可以使用通常的可微渲染机制进行训练。因此，N3F 很容易适用于大多数神经渲染公式，包括普通 NeRF 及其对复杂动态场景的扩展。我们表明，我们的方法不仅能够在特定于场景的神经场的上下文中实现语义理解，而无需使用手动标签，而且还能够持续改进自监督的 2D 基线。这是通过考虑不同序列中的各种任务（例如 2D 对象检索、3D 分割和场景编辑）（包括 EPIC-KITCHENS 基准中的以自我为中心的长视频）来证明的。 本文提出神经特征融合场（N3F）方法，通过将自监督2D图像特征提取器的知识蒸馏到3D空间中的学生网络，提升多图像重建场景下的特征分析能力。 Vadim Tschernezki,Iro Laina,Diane Larlus,Andrea Vedaldi cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Synthesizing efficient circuits for Hamiltonian simulation
title_zh: 合成用于哈密顿模拟的高效电路
comment: Accepted in Nature Partner Journal Quantum Information. Compared to v2 : minor changes
comments: Accepted in Nature Partner Journal Quantum Information. Compared to v2 : minor changes
abstract: We provide a new approach for compiling quantum simulation circuits that appear in Trotter, qDRIFT and multi-product formulas to Clifford and non-Clifford operations that can reduce the number of non-Clifford operations by a factor of up to $4$. In fact, the total number of gates reduce in many cases. We show that it is possible to implement an exponentiated sum of commuting Paulis with at most $m$ (controlled)-rotation gates, where $m$ is the number of distinct non-zero eigenvalues (ignoring sign). Thus we can collect mutually commuting Hamiltonian terms into groups that satisfy one of several symmetries identified in this work which allow an inexpensive simulation of the entire group of terms. We further show that the cost can in some cases be reduced by partially allocating Hamiltonian terms to several groups and provide a polynomial time classical algorithm that can greedily allocate the terms to appropriate groupings. We further specifically discuss these optimizations for the case of fermionic dynamics and provide extensive numerical simulations for qDRIFT of our grouping strategy to 6 and 4-qubit Heisenberg models, $LiH$, $H_2$ and observe a factor of 1.8-3.2 reduction in the number of non-Clifford gates. This suggests Trotter-based simulation of chemistry in second quantization may be even more practical than previously believed.
summary: We provide a new approach for compiling quantum simulation circuits that appear in Trotter, qDRIFT and multi-product formulas to Clifford and non-Clifford operations that can reduce the number of non-Clifford operations by a factor of up to $4$. In fact, the total number of gates reduce in many cases. We show that it is possible to implement an exponentiated sum of commuting Paulis with at most $m$ (controlled)-rotation gates, where $m$ is the number of distinct non-zero eigenvalues (ignoring sign). Thus we can collect mutually commuting Hamiltonian terms into groups that satisfy one of several symmetries identified in this work which allow an inexpensive simulation of the entire group of terms. We further show that the cost can in some cases be reduced by partially allocating Hamiltonian terms to several groups and provide a polynomial time classical algorithm that can greedily allocate the terms to appropriate groupings. We further specifically discuss these optimizations for the case of fermionic dynamics and provide extensive numerical simulations for qDRIFT of our grouping strategy to 6 and 4-qubit Heisenberg models, $LiH$, $H_2$ and observe a factor of 1.8-3.2 reduction in the number of non-Clifford gates. This suggests Trotter-based simulation of chemistry in second quantization may be even more practical than previously believed.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一种将 Trotter、qDRIFT 和多乘积公式中出现的量子模拟电路编译为 Clifford 和非 Clifford 运算的新方法，可以将非 Clifford 运算的数量减少高达 4 美元。事实上，在很多情况下，门的总数会减少。我们证明可以用最多 $m$（受控）旋转门来实现交换 Paulis 的指数和，其中 $m$ 是不同的非零特征值（忽略符号）的数量。因此，我们可以将相互交换的哈密顿项收集到满足本工作中确定的几个对称性之一的组中，从而允许对整个项组进行廉价的模拟。我们进一步表明，在某些情况下，可以通过将哈密顿项部分分配到几个组来降低成本，并提供一种多项式时间经典算法，可以贪婪地将项分配到适当的分组。我们进一步具体讨论了费米子动力学情况下的这些优化，并为 6 和 4 量子位海森堡模型、$LiH$、$H_2$ 的分组策略的 qDRIFT 提供了广泛的数值模拟，并观察到非 Clifford 门数量减少了 1.8-3.2 倍。这表明基于 Trotter 的第二量子化化学模拟可能比之前认为的更实用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种编译量子模拟电路的新方法，通过将Trotter、qDRIFT等方法中的电路转换为更少的非Clifford操作，从而提高哈密顿量模拟的效率。
AI.motivation: 哈密顿量模拟在量子化学和物理中至关重要，但现有方法常因非Clifford操作数量多而效率低下。本文旨在通过优化电路结构降低资源消耗，使化学模拟更实用。
AI.method: 通过将哈密顿量中的交换子分组并利用对称性，结合贪心算法分配项到最优组，减少所需受控旋转门数量，并提出多项式时间的经典算法实现分组优化。
AI.result: 在6和4量子位的海森堡模型、LiH和H2等案例中，非Clifford门数量减少1.8-3.2倍，总门数在多数情况下显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该优化策略表明，基于Trotter的二阶量子化学模拟可能比预期更具可行性，为大规模量子计算应用提供了新思路。

title: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to reduce construction loss in JPEG compression caused by Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT)
title_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 可减少由离散傅立叶变换 (DFT) 引起的 JPEG 压缩中的构造损失
abstract: In recent decades, digital image processing has gained enormous popularity. Consequently, a number of data compression strategies have been put forth, with the goal of minimizing the amount of information required to represent images. Among them, JPEG compression is one of the most popular methods that has been widely applied in multimedia and digital applications. The periodic nature of DFT makes it impossible to meet the periodic condition of an image's opposing edges without producing severe artifacts, which lowers the image's perceptual visual quality. On the other hand, deep learning has recently achieved outstanding results for applications like speech recognition, image reduction, and natural language processing. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have received more attention than most other types of deep neural networks. The use of convolution in feature extraction results in a less redundant feature map and a smaller dataset, both of which are crucial for image compression. In this work, an effective image compression method is purposed using autoencoders. The study's findings revealed a number of important trends that suggested better reconstruction along with good compression can be achieved using autoencoders.
summary: In recent decades, digital image processing has gained enormous popularity. Consequently, a number of data compression strategies have been put forth, with the goal of minimizing the amount of information required to represent images. Among them, JPEG compression is one of the most popular methods that has been widely applied in multimedia and digital applications. The periodic nature of DFT makes it impossible to meet the periodic condition of an image's opposing edges without producing severe artifacts, which lowers the image's perceptual visual quality. On the other hand, deep learning has recently achieved outstanding results for applications like speech recognition, image reduction, and natural language processing. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have received more attention than most other types of deep neural networks. The use of convolution in feature extraction results in a less redundant feature map and a smaller dataset, both of which are crucial for image compression. In this work, an effective image compression method is purposed using autoencoders. The study's findings revealed a number of important trends that suggested better reconstruction along with good compression can be achieved using autoencoders.
abstract_zh: 近几十年来，数字图像处理获得了极大的普及。因此，已经提出了许多数据压缩策略，其目标是最小化表示图像所需的信息量。其中，JPEG压缩是最流行的方法之一，已广泛应用于多媒体和数字应用中。 DFT 的周期性特性使其不可能在不产生严重伪影的情况下满足图像相对边缘的周期性条件，从而降低图像的感知视觉质量。另一方面，深度学习最近在语音识别、图像缩减和自然语言处理等应用中取得了出色的成果。卷积神经网络（CNN）比大多数其他类型的深度神经网络受到更多关注。在特征提取中使用卷积可以减少冗余特征图和较小的数据集，这两者对于图像压缩都至关重要。在这项工作中，目的是使用自动编码器来实现一种有效的图像压缩方法。该研究的结果揭示了许多重要趋势，表明使用自动编码器可以实现更好的重建和良好的压缩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用卷积神经网络（CNN）改进JPEG压缩中因离散傅里叶变换（DFT）导致的图像重建损失问题。
AI.motivation: JPEG压缩中DFT的周期性特性会导致图像边缘出现严重伪影，降低视觉质量，而CNN在特征提取中的高效性为图像压缩提供了新思路。
AI.method: 基于自编码器框架设计CNN模型，通过卷积操作提取图像特征并实现高效压缩与重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够在保持较高压缩率的同时显著提升图像重建质量，减少DFT引起的伪影。
AI.conclusion: CNN自编码器在JPEG压缩中展现出优于传统方法的性能，为减少压缩损失提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to reduce construction loss in JPEG compression caused by Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT) 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 可减少由离散傅立叶变换 (DFT) 引起的 JPEG 压缩中的构造损失 In recent decades, digital image processing has gained enormous popularity. Consequently, a number of data compression strategies have been put forth, with the goal of minimizing the amount of information required to represent images. Among them, JPEG compression is one of the most popular methods that has been widely applied in multimedia and digital applications. The periodic nature of DFT makes it impossible to meet the periodic condition of an image's opposing edges without producing severe artifacts, which lowers the image's perceptual visual quality. On the other hand, deep learning has recently achieved outstanding results for applications like speech recognition, image reduction, and natural language processing. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have received more attention than most other types of deep neural networks. The use of convolution in feature extraction results in a less redundant feature map and a smaller dataset, both of which are crucial for image compression. In this work, an effective image compression method is purposed using autoencoders. The study's findings revealed a number of important trends that suggested better reconstruction along with good compression can be achieved using autoencoders. 近几十年来，数字图像处理获得了极大的普及。因此，已经提出了许多数据压缩策略，其目标是最小化表示图像所需的信息量。其中，JPEG压缩是最流行的方法之一，已广泛应用于多媒体和数字应用中。 DFT 的周期性特性使其不可能在不产生严重伪影的情况下满足图像相对边缘的周期性条件，从而降低图像的感知视觉质量。另一方面，深度学习最近在语音识别、图像缩减和自然语言处理等应用中取得了出色的成果。卷积神经网络（CNN）比大多数其他类型的深度神经网络受到更多关注。在特征提取中使用卷积可以减少冗余特征图和较小的数据集，这两者对于图像压缩都至关重要。在这项工作中，目的是使用自动编码器来实现一种有效的图像压缩方法。该研究的结果揭示了许多重要趋势，表明使用自动编码器可以实现更好的重建和良好的压缩。 本文提出利用卷积神经网络（CNN）改进JPEG压缩中因离散傅里叶变换（DFT）导致的图像重建损失问题。 Suman Kunwar eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Higher-order Clustering and Pooling for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络的高阶聚类和池化
abstract: Graph Neural Networks achieve state-of-the-art performance on a plethora of graph classification tasks, especially due to pooling operators, which aggregate learned node embeddings hierarchically into a final graph representation. However, they are not only questioned by recent work showing on par performance with random pooling, but also ignore completely higher-order connectivity patterns. To tackle this issue, we propose HoscPool, a clustering-based graph pooling operator that captures higher-order information hierarchically, leading to richer graph representations. In fact, we learn a probabilistic cluster assignment matrix end-to-end by minimising relaxed formulations of motif spectral clustering in our objective function, and we then extend it to a pooling operator. We evaluate HoscPool on graph classification tasks and its clustering component on graphs with ground-truth community structure, achieving best performance. Lastly, we provide a deep empirical analysis of pooling operators' inner functioning.
summary: Graph Neural Networks achieve state-of-the-art performance on a plethora of graph classification tasks, especially due to pooling operators, which aggregate learned node embeddings hierarchically into a final graph representation. However, they are not only questioned by recent work showing on par performance with random pooling, but also ignore completely higher-order connectivity patterns. To tackle this issue, we propose HoscPool, a clustering-based graph pooling operator that captures higher-order information hierarchically, leading to richer graph representations. In fact, we learn a probabilistic cluster assignment matrix end-to-end by minimising relaxed formulations of motif spectral clustering in our objective function, and we then extend it to a pooling operator. We evaluate HoscPool on graph classification tasks and its clustering component on graphs with ground-truth community structure, achieving best performance. Lastly, we provide a deep empirical analysis of pooling operators' inner functioning.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络在大量图分类任务上实现了最先进的性能，特别是由于池化算子，它将学习到的节点嵌入分层聚合成最终的图表示。然而，他们不仅受到最近与随机池表现出同等性能的研究的质疑，而且还完全忽略了高阶连接模式。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 HoscPool，一种基于聚类的图池运算符，可以分层捕获高阶信息，从而获得更丰富的图表示。事实上，我们通过最小化目标函数中模体谱聚类的松弛公式来端到端地学习概率聚类分配矩阵，然后将其扩展到池化算子。我们在图分类任务上评估 HoscPool 及其在具有真实社区结构的图上的聚类组件，实现了最佳性能。最后，我们对池化算子的内部功能进行了深入的实证分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高阶聚类的图神经网络池化方法HoscPool，通过学习概率聚类分配矩阵来捕捉高阶连通模式，提升图分类任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络池化方法被质疑效果与随机池化相当，且完全忽略高阶连接模式，导致图表示能力受限。
AI.method: 设计HoscPool池化算子，通过最小化放松的motif谱聚类目标函数学习概率聚类分配矩阵，并将其扩展为层次化池化操作。
AI.result: 在图分类任务和含真实社区结构的图聚类任务中均取得最佳性能，并通过实证分析揭示了池化算子内部工作机制。
AI.conclusion: HoscPool有效捕捉高阶连接信息，生成更丰富的图表示，为图神经网络池化操作提供了新思路和改进方向。

title: Supervised GAN Watermarking for Intellectual Property Protection
title_zh: 用于知识产权保护的监督 GAN 水印
abstract: We propose a watermarking method for protecting the Intellectual Property (IP) of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). The aim is to watermark the GAN model so that any image generated by the GAN contains an invisible watermark (signature), whose presence inside the image can be checked at a later stage for ownership verification. To achieve this goal, a pre-trained CNN watermarking decoding block is inserted at the output of the generator. The generator loss is then modified by including a watermark loss term, to ensure that the prescribed watermark can be extracted from the generated images. The watermark is embedded via fine-tuning, with reduced time complexity. Results show that our method can effectively embed an invisible watermark inside the generated images. Moreover, our method is a general one and can work with different GAN architectures, different tasks, and different resolutions of the output image. We also demonstrate the good robustness performance of the embedded watermark against several post-processing, among them, JPEG compression, noise addition, blurring, and color transformations.
summary: We propose a watermarking method for protecting the Intellectual Property (IP) of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). The aim is to watermark the GAN model so that any image generated by the GAN contains an invisible watermark (signature), whose presence inside the image can be checked at a later stage for ownership verification. To achieve this goal, a pre-trained CNN watermarking decoding block is inserted at the output of the generator. The generator loss is then modified by including a watermark loss term, to ensure that the prescribed watermark can be extracted from the generated images. The watermark is embedded via fine-tuning, with reduced time complexity. Results show that our method can effectively embed an invisible watermark inside the generated images. Moreover, our method is a general one and can work with different GAN architectures, different tasks, and different resolutions of the output image. We also demonstrate the good robustness performance of the embedded watermark against several post-processing, among them, JPEG compression, noise addition, blurring, and color transformations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种保护生成对抗网络（GAN）知识产权（IP）的水印方法。目的是为 GAN 模型添加水印，以便 GAN 生成的任何图像都包含不可见的水印（签名），可以在稍后阶段检查图像中是否存在水印，以进行所有权验证。为了实现这一目标，在生成器的输出处插入了一个预先训练的 CNN 水印解码块。然后通过包含水印损失项来修改生成器损失，以确保可以从生成的图像中提取规定的水印。通过微调嵌入水印，降低了时间复杂度。结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地将不可见水印嵌入到生成的图像中。此外，我们的方法是通用的，可以适用于不同的 GAN 架构、不同的任务和不同的输出图像分辨率。我们还展示了嵌入水印针对多种后处理（其中包括 JPEG 压缩、噪声添加、模糊和颜色转换）的良好鲁棒性性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种监督GAN水印方法，通过在生成器输出嵌入不可见水印以保护生成模型的知识产权。
AI.motivation: GAN生成的图像易被篡改或盗用，需有效水印技术实现知识产权保护与所有权验证。
AI.method: 在生成器输出插入预训练CNN解码模块，修改损失函数加入水印损失项，通过微调嵌入水印，方法适用于不同GAN架构与图像分辨率。
AI.result: 实验表明水印可有效嵌入生成图像，对JPEG压缩、噪声、模糊等后处理具有鲁棒性，且方法通用性强。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为GAN模型提供了一种高效、通用的水印方案，可有效支持知识产权保护需求。

authors_text: Wai Man Si,Michael Backes,Jeremy Blackburn,Emiliano De Cristofaro,Gianluca Stringhini,Savvas Zannettou,Yang Zhang
title: Why So Toxic? Measuring and Triggering Toxic Behavior in Open-Domain Chatbots
title_zh: 为何如此有毒？测量和触发开放域聊天机器人中的有毒行为
comment: ef:Published in ACM CCS 2022. Please cite the CCS version
comments: ef:Published in ACM CCS 2022. Please cite the CCS version
abstract: Chatbots are used in many applications, e.g., automated agents, smart home assistants, interactive characters in online games, etc. Therefore, it is crucial to ensure they do not behave in undesired manners, providing offensive or toxic responses to users. This is not a trivial task as state-of-the-art chatbot models are trained on large, public datasets openly collected from the Internet. This paper presents a first-of-its-kind, large-scale measurement of toxicity in chatbots. We show that publicly available chatbots are prone to providing toxic responses when fed toxic queries. Even more worryingly, some non-toxic queries can trigger toxic responses too. We then set out to design and experiment with an attack, ToxicBuddy, which relies on fine-tuning GPT-2 to generate non-toxic queries that make chatbots respond in a toxic manner. Our extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that our attack is effective against public chatbot models and outperforms manually-crafted malicious queries proposed by previous work. We also evaluate three defense mechanisms against ToxicBuddy, showing that they either reduce the attack performance at the cost of affecting the chatbot's utility or are only effective at mitigating a portion of the attack. This highlights the need for more research from the computer security and online safety communities to ensure that chatbot models do not hurt their users. Overall, we are confident that ToxicBuddy can be used as an auditing tool and that our work will pave the way toward designing more effective defenses for chatbot safety.

This is not a trivial task as state-of-the-art chatbot models are trained on large, public datasets openly collected from the Internet. This paper presents a first-of-its-kind, large-scale measurement of toxicity in chatbots. We show that publicly available chatbots are prone to providing toxic responses when fed toxic queries. Even more worryingly, some non-toxic queries can trigger toxic responses too. We then set out to design and experiment with an attack, ToxicBuddy, which relies on fine-tuning GPT-2 to generate non-toxic queries that make chatbots respond in a toxic manner. Our extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that our attack is effective against public chatbot models and outperforms manually-crafted malicious queries proposed by previous work. We also evaluate three defense mechanisms against ToxicBuddy, showing that they either reduce the attack performance at the cost of affecting the chatbot's utility or are only effective at mitigating a portion of the attack. This highlights the need for more research from the computer security and online safety communities to ensure that chatbot models do not hurt their users. Overall, we are confident that ToxicBuddy can be used as an auditing tool and that our work will pave the way toward designing more effective defenses for chatbot safety.
abstract_zh: 聊天机器人被用于许多应用中，例如自动化代理、智能家居助理、在线游戏中的交互式角色等。因此，确保它们不会以不良方式行事、向用户提供攻击性或有毒反应是至关重要的。这不是一项简单的任务，因为最先进的聊天机器人模型是在从互联网公开收集的大型公共数据集上进行训练的。本文首次对聊天机器人的毒性进行大规模测量。我们表明，公开的聊天机器人在收到有毒查询时很容易提供有毒响应。更令人担忧的是，一些无毒查询也可能引发有毒响应。然后，我们开始设计和实验 ToxicBuddy 攻击，它依赖于微调 GPT-2 来生成无毒查询，使聊天机器人以有毒方式做出响应。我们广泛的实验评估表明，我们的攻击对于公共聊天机器人模型是有效的，并且优于先前工作提出的手动制作的恶意查询。我们还评估了针对 ToxicBuddy 的三种防御机制，表明它们要么以影响聊天机器人的实用性为代价降低攻击性能，要么仅有效缓解部分攻击。这凸显了计算机安全和在线安全社区需要进行更多研究，以确保聊天机器人模型不会伤害其用户。总的来说，我们相信 ToxicBuddy 可以用作审核工具，并且我们的工作将为设计更有效的聊天机器人安全防御措施铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文研究开放领域聊天机器人中有毒行为的测量与触发方法，并提出一种名为ToxicBuddy的攻击技术以生成非有毒查询触发有毒响应，同时评估防御机制的有效性。
AI.motivation: 聊天机器人广泛应用于多个场景，但其基于互联网数据的训练可能导致有毒响应。现有防御措施不足，需深入研究如何触发和防御此类毒性行为以保障用户安全。
AI.method: 设计ToxicBuddy攻击方法，通过微调GPT-2生成非有毒查询触发聊天机器人的有毒响应，并测试三种防御机制对攻击的抵御能力。
AI.result: 实验表明ToxicBuddy攻击对公开聊天模型有效且优于人工恶意查询，防御机制或牺牲实用性或仅部分缓解攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: 需计算机安全与在线安全领域进一步研究以提升聊天机器人安全性，ToxicBuddy可作为安全审计工具并推动更有效防御技术的开发。

authors_text: Yifan Cai,Abhinav Dahiya,Nils Wilde,Stephen L. Smith
title: Scheduling Operator Assistance for Shared Autonomy in Multi-Robot Teams
title_zh: 安排操作员协助以实现多机器人团队中的共享自主权
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of allocating human operator assistance in a system with multiple autonomous robots. Each robot is required to complete independent missions, each defined as a sequence of tasks. While executing a task, a robot can either operate autonomously or be teleoperated by the human operator to complete the task at a faster rate. We show that the problem of creating a teleoperation schedule that minimizes makespan of the system is NP-Hard. We formulate our problem as a Mixed Integer Linear Program, which can be used to optimally solve small to moderate sized problem instances. We also develop an anytime algorithm that makes use of the problem structure to provide a fast and high-quality solution of the operator scheduling problem, even for larger problem instances. Our key insight is to identify blocking tasks in greedily-created schedules and iteratively remove those blocks to improve the quality of the solution. Through numerical simulations, we demonstrate the benefits of the proposed algorithm as an efficient and scalable approach that outperforms other greedy methods.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of allocating human operator assistance in a system with multiple autonomous robots. Each robot is required to complete independent missions, each defined as a sequence of tasks. While executing a task, a robot can either operate autonomously or be teleoperated by the human operator to complete the task at a faster rate. We show that the problem of creating a teleoperation schedule that minimizes makespan of the system is NP-Hard. We formulate our problem as a Mixed Integer Linear Program, which can be used to optimally solve small to moderate sized problem instances. We also develop an anytime algorithm that makes use of the problem structure to provide a fast and high-quality solution of the operator scheduling problem, even for larger problem instances. Our key insight is to identify blocking tasks in greedily-created schedules and iteratively remove those blocks to improve the quality of the solution. Through numerical simulations, we demonstrate the benefits of the proposed algorithm as an efficient and scalable approach that outperforms other greedy methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑在具有多个自主机器人的系统中分配人类操作员协助的问题。每个机器人都需要完成独立的任务，每个任务都定义为一系列任务。在执行任务时，机器人可以自主操作，也可以由人类操作员远程操作，以更快的速度完成任务。我们证明了创建远程操作计划以最小化系统完工时间的问题是 NP 困难的。我们将我们的问题表述为混合整数线性程序，它可用于最佳地解决中小型问题实例。我们还开发了一种随时算法，利用问题结构为操作员调度问题提供快速、高质量的解决方案，即使对于较大的问题实例也是如此。我们的主要见解是识别贪婪创建的计划中的阻塞任务，并迭代地删除这些阻塞以提高解决方案的质量。通过数值模拟，我们证明了所提出的算法作为一种高效且可扩展的方法的优势，优于其他贪婪方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多机器人系统中如何为共享自主性分配人类操作员协助的问题，以最小化系统的完成时间。
AI.motivation: 在多机器人系统中，每个机器人需要完成独立的任务，而操作员的协助可以提高任务完成的速度。然而，如何高效地分配操作员的协助以优化系统性能是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 本文将问题建模为混合整数线性规划问题，并开发了一种基于问题结构的任意时间算法，通过识别并消除贪心调度中的阻塞任务来提高解的质量。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真表明，所提出的算法在效率和可扩展性方面优于其他贪心方法，能够为较大规模的问题实例提供高质量的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种高效的共享自主性操作员调度方法，能够有效优化多机器人系统的任务完成时间，具有良好的可扩展性和实用性。

authors_text: Mohammad Saeed Ebrahimi Saadabadi,Sahar Rahimi Malakshan,Sobhan Soleymani,Moktari Mostofa,Nasser M. Nasrabadi
title: Information Maximization for Extreme Pose Face Recognition
title_zh: 极端姿势人脸识别的信息最大化
abstract: In this paper, we seek to draw connections between the frontal and profile face images in an abstract embedding space. We exploit this connection using a coupled-encoder network to project frontal/profile face images into a common latent embedding space. The proposed model forces the similarity of representations in the embedding space by maximizing the mutual information between two views of the face. The proposed coupled-encoder benefits from three contributions for matching faces with extreme pose disparities. First, we leverage our pose-aware contrastive learning to maximize the mutual information between frontal and profile representations of identities. Second, a memory buffer, which consists of latent representations accumulated over past iterations, is integrated into the model so it can refer to relatively much more instances than the mini-batch size. Third, a novel pose-aware adversarial domain adaptation method forces the model to learn an asymmetric mapping from profile to frontal representation. In our framework, the coupled-encoder learns to enlarge the margin between the distribution of genuine and imposter faces, which results in high mutual information between different views of the same identity. The effectiveness of the proposed model is investigated through extensive experiments, evaluations, and ablation studies on four benchmark datasets, and comparison with the compelling state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: In this paper, we seek to draw connections between the frontal and profile face images in an abstract embedding space. We exploit this connection using a coupled-encoder network to project frontal/profile face images into a common latent embedding space. The proposed model forces the similarity of representations in the embedding space by maximizing the mutual information between two views of the face. The proposed coupled-encoder benefits from three contributions for matching faces with extreme pose disparities. First, we leverage our pose-aware contrastive learning to maximize the mutual information between frontal and profile representations of identities. Second, a memory buffer, which consists of latent representations accumulated over past iterations, is integrated into the model so it can refer to relatively much more instances than the mini-batch size. Third, a novel pose-aware adversarial domain adaptation method forces the model to learn an asymmetric mapping from profile to frontal representation. In our framework, the coupled-encoder learns to enlarge the margin between the distribution of genuine and imposter faces, which results in high mutual information between different views of the same identity. The effectiveness of the proposed model is investigated through extensive experiments, evaluations, and ablation studies on four benchmark datasets, and comparison with the compelling state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们试图在抽象嵌入空间中绘制正面图像和侧面图像之间的联系。我们使用耦合编码器网络利用这种连接将正面/侧脸图像投影到公共潜在嵌入空间中。所提出的模型通过最大化面部两个视图之间的互信息来强制嵌入空间中表示的相似性。所提出的耦合编码器受益于匹配具有极端姿势差异的面部的三个贡献。首先，我们利用姿势感知对比学习来最大化身份的正面和侧面表示之间的相互信息。其次，由过去迭代中积累的潜在表示组成的内存缓冲区被集成到模型中，因此它可以引用比小批量大小相对更多的实例。第三，一种新颖的姿势感知对抗域适应方法迫使模型学习从侧面到正面表示的不对称映射。在我们的框架中，耦合编码器学习扩大真实面孔和冒名顶替面孔分布之间的余量，这导致同一身份的不同视图之间存在高互信息。通过对四个基准数据集进行广泛的实验、评估和消融研究，并与令人信服的最先进算法进行比较，研究了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过最大化嵌入空间中正面与侧面人脸图像互信息的方法，以解决极端姿态下的人脸识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理极端姿态人脸时因视角差异导致表征不一致，难以实现准确匹配，需建立跨视角的语义关联。
AI.method: 设计耦合编码器网络，结合姿态感知对比学习、记忆缓冲区和对抗域适应技术，强制对齐正面与侧面人脸的嵌入分布并扩大真实与虚假样本的间隔。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在极端姿态人脸识别任务中优于现有最先进算法，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过信息最大化策略与多技术协同，模型有效解决了跨视角人脸表征不一致问题，为极端姿态人脸识别提供了新思路。

search_text: Information Maximization for Extreme Pose Face Recognition 极端姿势人脸识别的信息最大化 In this paper, we seek to draw connections between the frontal and profile face images in an abstract embedding space. We exploit this connection using a coupled-encoder network to project frontal/profile face images into a common latent embedding space. The proposed model forces the similarity of representations in the embedding space by maximizing the mutual information between two views of the face. The proposed coupled-encoder benefits from three contributions for matching faces with extreme pose disparities. First, we leverage our pose-aware contrastive learning to maximize the mutual information between frontal and profile representations of identities. Second, a memory buffer, which consists of latent representations accumulated over past iterations, is integrated into the model so it can refer to relatively much more instances than the mini-batch size. Third, a novel pose-aware adversarial domain adaptation method forces the model to learn an asymmetric mapping from profile to frontal representation. In our framework, the coupled-encoder learns to enlarge the margin between the distribution of genuine and imposter faces, which results in high mutual information between different views of the same identity. The effectiveness of the proposed model is investigated through extensive experiments, evaluations, and ablation studies on four benchmark datasets, and comparison with the compelling state-of-the-art algorithms. 在本文中，我们试图在抽象嵌入空间中绘制正面图像和侧面图像之间的联系。我们使用耦合编码器网络利用这种连接将正面/侧脸图像投影到公共潜在嵌入空间中。所提出的模型通过最大化面部两个视图之间的互信息来强制嵌入空间中表示的相似性。所提出的耦合编码器受益于匹配具有极端姿势差异的面部的三个贡献。首先，我们利用姿势感知对比学习来最大化身份的正面和侧面表示之间的相互信息。其次，由过去迭代中积累的潜在表示组成的内存缓冲区被集成到模型中，因此它可以引用比小批量大小相对更多的实例。第三，一种新颖的姿势感知对抗域适应方法迫使模型学习从侧面到正面表示的不对称映射。在我们的框架中，耦合编码器学习扩大真实面孔和冒名顶替面孔分布之间的余量，这导致同一身份的不同视图之间存在高互信息。通过对四个基准数据集进行广泛的实验、评估和消融研究，并与令人信服的最先进算法进行比较，研究了所提出模型的有效性。 本文提出一种通过最大化嵌入空间中正面与侧面人脸图像互信息的方法，以解决极端姿态下的人脸识别问题。 Mohammad Saeed Ebrahimi Saadabadi,Sahar Rahimi Malakshan,Sobhan Soleymani,Moktari Mostofa,Nasser M. title: Deep Learning-Based Automatic Diagnosis System for Developmental Dysplasia of the Hip
title_zh: 基于深度学习的发育性髋关节发育不良自动诊断系统
abstract: Objective: The clinical diagnosis of developmental dysplasia of the hip (DDH) typically involves manually measuring key radiological angles -- Center-Edge (CE), Tonnis, and Sharp angles -- from pelvic radiographs, a process that is time-consuming and susceptible to variability. This study aims to develop an automated system that integrates these measurements to enhance the accuracy and consistency of DDH diagnosis. Methods and procedures: We developed an end-to-end deep learning model for keypoint detection that accurately identifies eight anatomical keypoints from pelvic radiographs, enabling the automated calculation of CE, Tonnis, and Sharp angles. To support the diagnostic decision, we introduced a novel data-driven scoring system that combines the information from all three angles into a comprehensive and explainable diagnostic output. Results: The system demonstrated superior consistency in angle measurements compared to a cohort of eight moderately experienced orthopedists. The intraclass correlation coefficients for the CE, Tonnis, and Sharp angles were 0.957 (95% CI: 0.952--0.962), 0.942 (95% CI: 0.937--0.947), and 0.966 (95% CI: 0.964--0.968), respectively. The system achieved a diagnostic F1 score of 0.863 (95% CI: 0.851--0.876), significantly outperforming the orthopedist group (0.777, 95% CI: 0.737--0.817, p = 0.005), as well as using clinical diagnostic criteria for each angle individually (p<0.001). Conclusion: The proposed system provides reliable and consistent automated measurements of radiological angles and an explainable diagnostic output for DDH, outperforming moderately experienced clinicians. Clinical impact: This AI-powered solution reduces the variability and potential errors of manual measurements, offering clinicians a more consistent and interpretable tool for DDH diagnosis.

abstract_zh: 目的：发育性髋关节发育不良 (DDH) 的临床诊断通常涉及根据骨盆 X 光片手动测量关键放射学角度 - 中心边缘 (CE)、托尼斯角和锐角，这是一个耗时且容易发生变化的过程。本研究旨在开发一种集成这些测量的自动化系统，以提高 DDH 诊断的准确性和一致性。方法和程序：我们开发了一种用于关键点检测的端到端深度学习模型，可以从骨盆X光片中准确识别八个解剖关键点，从而能够自动计算CE、Tonnis和锐角。为了支持诊断决策，我们引入了一种新颖的数据驱动评分系统，该系统将所有三个角度的信息结合成全面且可解释的诊断输出。结果：与八名经验丰富的骨科医生组成的队列相比，该系统在角度测量方面表现出卓越的一致性。 CE、Tonnis 和锐角的组内相关系数分别为 0.957 (95% CI: 0.952--0.962)、0.942 (95% CI: 0.937--0.947) 和 0.966 (95% CI: 0.964--0.968)。该系统的诊断 F1 评分为 0.863（95% CI：0.851--0.876），显着优于骨科医生组（0.777，95% CI：0.737--0.817，p = 0.005），并且单独使用每个角度的临床诊断标准（p<0.001）。结论：所提出的系统提供了可靠且一致的放射学角度自动测量和可解释的 DDH 诊断输出，优于经验丰富的临床医生。临床影响：这种人工智能驱动的解决方案减少了手动测量的可变性和潜在错误，为临床医生提供了更加一致和可解释的 DDH 诊断工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动诊断系统，用于发育性髋关节脱位（DDH），通过自动测量关键放射学角度提高诊断准确性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统DDH临床诊断依赖人工测量放射学角度（如CE、Tonnis和Sharp角），过程耗时且易受人为误差影响，需开发自动化系统以提升效率和准确性。
AI.method: 开发端到端深度学习模型检测骨盆X光片中的八个解剖关键点，自动计算三个关键角度，并引入数据驱动的评分系统整合多角度信息生成可解释诊断结果。
AI.result: 系统角度测量一致性显著优于8名中等经验骨科医生（ICC分别为0.957、0.942、0.966），诊断F1得分为0.863，明显高于医生组（0.777，p=0.005）及单角度临床标准（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 该系统提供可靠且一致的自动化角度测量与可解释诊断输出，优于中等经验临床医生，可减少人工测量误差，为DDH诊断提供更精准工具。

authors_text: Chen Zhu-Tian,Qisen Yang,Xiao Xie,Johanna Beyer,Haijun Xia,Yingcai Wu,Hanspeter Pfister
title: Sporthesia: Augmenting Sports Videos Using Natural Language
title_zh: Sporthesia：使用自然语言增强体育视频
abstract: Augmented sports videos, which combine visualizations and video effects to present data in actual scenes, can communicate insights engagingly and thus have been increasingly popular for sports enthusiasts around the world. Yet, creating augmented sports videos remains a challenging task, requiring considerable time and video editing skills. On the other hand, sports insights are often communicated using natural language, such as in commentaries, oral presentations, and articles, but usually lack visual cues. Thus, this work aims to facilitate the creation of augmented sports videos by enabling analysts to directly create visualizations embedded in videos using insights expressed in natural language. To achieve this goal, we propose a three-step approach - 1) detecting visualizable entities in the text, 2) mapping these entities into visualizations, and 3) scheduling these visualizations to play with the video - and analyzed 155 sports video clips and the accompanying commentaries for accomplishing these steps. Informed by our analysis, we have designed and implemented Sporthesia, a proof-of-concept system that takes racket-based sports videos and textual commentaries as the input and outputs augmented videos. We demonstrate Sporthesia's applicability in two exemplar scenarios, i.e., authoring augmented sports videos using text and augmenting historical sports videos based on auditory comments. A technical evaluation shows that Sporthesia achieves high accuracy (F1-score of 0.9) in detecting visualizable entities in the text. An expert evaluation with eight sports analysts suggests high utility, effectiveness, and satisfaction with our language-driven authoring method and provides insights for future improvement and opportunities.

abstract_zh: 增强体育视频结合了可视化和视频效果，在实际场景中呈现数据，可以生动地传达见解，因此越来越受到世界各地体育爱好者的欢迎。然而，创建增强体育视频仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要大量的时间和视频编辑技能。另一方面，体育见解通常使用自然语言来传达，例如在评论、口头演示和文章中，但通常缺乏视觉提示。因此，这项工作旨在通过使分析师能够使用以自然语言表达的见解直接创建嵌入视频中的可视化效果来促进增强体育视频的创建。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个三步方法 - 1）检测文本中的可视化实体，2）将这些实体映射到可视化中，3）安排这些可视化与视频一起播放 - 并分析了 155 个体育视频剪辑和随附的评论以完成这些步骤。根据我们的分析，我们设计并实现了 Sporthesia，这是一个概念验证系统，它将基于球拍的体育视频和文本评论作为输入和输出增强视频。我们展示了 Sporthesia 在两个示例场景中的适用性，即使用文本创作增强体育视频和基于听觉评论增强历史体育视频。技术评估表明，Sportthesia 在检测文本中的可视化实体方面实现了高精度（F1 分数为 0.9）。八位体育分析师的专家评估表明，我们的语言驱动的创作方法具有很高的实用性、有效性和满意度，并为未来的改进和机会提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sporthesia系统，通过自然语言生成技术实现体育视频的自动化增强。
AI.motivation: 传统体育视频增强需专业编辑技能且耗时，而自然语言形式的体育分析（如解说）缺乏视觉呈现，亟需将文本洞察转化为可视化效果。
AI.method: 三步骤框架：1）文本中可视觉化实体检测 2）实体到可视化元素的映射 3）可视化元素与视频的时序对齐，结合155个视频片段及解说文本进行系统开发。
AI.result: 系统实现0.9的F1检测准确率，专家评估显示该语言驱动方法在实用性和效果上获得高度认可。
AI.conclusion: Sporthesia验证了基于自然语言的体育视频增强可行性，为历史视频补全和实时视频制作提供新范式，后续需优化多模态对齐与复杂场景处理。

title: Foundations and Trends in Multimodal Machine Learning: Principles, Challenges, and Open Questions
title_zh: 多模态机器学习的基础和趋势：原则、挑战和悬而未决的问题
abstract: Multimodal machine learning is a vibrant multi-disciplinary research field that aims to design computer agents with intelligent capabilities such as understanding, reasoning, and learning through integrating multiple communicative modalities, including linguistic, acoustic, visual, tactile, and physiological messages. With the recent interest in video understanding, embodied autonomous agents, text-to-image generation, and multisensor fusion in application domains such as healthcare and robotics, multimodal machine learning has brought unique computational and theoretical challenges to the machine learning community given the heterogeneity of data sources and the interconnections often found between modalities. However, the breadth of progress in multimodal research has made it difficult to identify the common themes and open questions in the field. By synthesizing a broad range of application domains and theoretical frameworks from both historical and recent perspectives, this paper is designed to provide an overview of the computational and theoretical foundations of multimodal machine learning. We start by defining three key principles of modality heterogeneity, connections, and interactions that have driven subsequent innovations, and propose a taxonomy of six core technical challenges: representation, alignment, reasoning, generation, transference, and quantification covering historical and recent trends. Recent technical achievements will be presented through the lens of this taxonomy, allowing researchers to understand the similarities and differences across new approaches. We end by motivating several open problems for future research as identified by our taxonomy.
summary: Multimodal machine learning is a vibrant multi-disciplinary research field that aims to design computer agents with intelligent capabilities such as understanding, reasoning, and learning through integrating multiple communicative modalities, including linguistic, acoustic, visual, tactile, and physiological messages. With the recent interest in video understanding, embodied autonomous agents, text-to-image generation, and multisensor fusion in application domains such as healthcare and robotics, multimodal machine learning has brought unique computational and theoretical challenges to the machine learning community given the heterogeneity of data sources and the interconnections often found between modalities. However, the breadth of progress in multimodal research has made it difficult to identify the common themes and open questions in the field. By synthesizing a broad range of application domains and theoretical frameworks from both historical and recent perspectives, this paper is designed to provide an overview of the computational and theoretical foundations of multimodal machine learning. We start by defining three key principles of modality heterogeneity, connections, and interactions that have driven subsequent innovations, and propose a taxonomy of six core technical challenges: representation, alignment, reasoning, generation, transference, and quantification covering historical and recent trends. Recent technical achievements will be presented through the lens of this taxonomy, allowing researchers to understand the similarities and differences across new approaches. We end by motivating several open problems for future research as identified by our taxonomy.
abstract_zh: 多模态机器学习是一个充满活力的多学科研究领域，旨在通过整合多种交流方式（包括语言、声学、视觉、触觉和生理信息）来设计具有理解、推理和学习等智能能力的计算机代理。近年来，随着医疗保健和机器人等应用领域对视频理解、具体自主代理、文本到图像生成以及多传感器融合的兴趣，考虑到数据源的异构性以及模态之间经常存在的互连，多模态机器学习给机器学习社区带来了独特的计算和理论挑战。然而，多模态研究的广泛进展使得很难确定该领域的共同主题和悬而未决的问题。通过从历史和最近的角度综合广泛的应用领域和理论框架，本文旨在概述多模态机器学习的计算和理论基础。我们首先定义了驱动后续创新的模态异质性、连接和交互的三个关键原则，并提出了六个核心技术挑战的分类：涵盖历史和近期趋势的表示、对齐、推理、生成、转移和量化。最近的技术成就将通过这种分类学的视角呈现，使研究人员能够了解新方法的异同。最后，我们提出了一些由我们的分类法确定的未来研究的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在概述多模态机器学习的计算和理论基础，总结其核心挑战与开放性问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态机器学习因数据异质性和模态间关联性带来独特挑战，领域进展迅速导致研究主题和问题难以明确，需系统性梳理以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过整合历史与近期应用领域及理论框架，定义三大核心原则（模态异质性、连接性、交互性），提出包含六类技术挑战的分类体系，并基于此分析最新技术进展。
AI.result: 构建了多模态机器学习的系统性框架，明确了六类核心挑战（表征、对齐、推理、生成、迁移、量化），并对比了不同方法的异同。
AI.conclusion: 基于分类体系提出了未来研究的开放性问题，为领域发展提供方向。
