search_text: A Local Search Algorithm for the Min-Sum Submodular Cover Problem 最小和子模覆盖问题的局部搜索算法 We consider the problem of solving the Min-Sum Submodular Cover problem using local search. The Min-Sum Submodular Cover problem generalizes the NP-complete Min-Sum Set Cover problem, replacing the input set cover instance with a monotone submodular set function. A simple greedy algorithm achieves an approximation factor of 4, which is tight unless P=NP [Streeter and Golovin, NeurIPS, 2008]. We complement the greedy algorithm with analysis of a local search algorithm. Building on work of Munagala et al. [ICDT, 2005], we show that, using simple initialization, a straightforward local search algorithm achieves a $(4+ε)$-approximate solution in time $O(n^3\log(n/ε))$, provided that the monotone submodular set function is also second-order supermodular. Second-order supermodularity has been shown to hold for a number of submodular functions of practical interest, including functions associated with set cover, matching, and facility location. We present experiments on two special cases of Min-Sum Submodular Cover and find that the local search algorithm can outperform the greedy algorithm on small data sets. 我们考虑使用局部搜索解决最小和子模覆盖问题。最小和子模覆盖问题推广了 NP 完全最小和集覆盖问题，用单调子模集函数替换输入集覆盖实例。简单的贪婪算法可实现近似因子 4，除非 P=NP，否则该近似因子很紧 [Streeter 和 Golovin，NeurIPS，2008]。我们通过分析局部搜索算法来补充贪婪算法。以 Munagala 等人的工作为基础。 [ICDT, 2005]，我们证明，使用简单的初始化，简单的局部搜索算法可以在 $O(n^3\log(n/ε))$ 时间内实现 $(4+ε)$ 近似解，前提是单调子模集函数也是二阶超模函数。二阶超模性已被证明适用于许多具有实际意义的子模函数，包括与场景覆盖、匹配和设施位置相关的函数。我们对最小和子模覆盖的两种特殊情况进行了实验，发现局部搜索算法在小数据集上可以优于贪婪算法。 本文提出了一种用于求解最小和子模覆盖问题的局部搜索算法。 Lisa Hellerstein,Thomas Lidbetter,R. Teal Witter cs.DS

authors_text: Mohammad Naseri,Yufei Han,Enrico Mariconti,Yun Shen,Gianluca Stringhini,Emiliano De Cristofaro
title: Cerberus: Exploring Federated Prediction of Security Events
title_zh: Cerberus：探索安全事件的联合预测
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 29th ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security (ACM CCS 2022)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 29th ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security (ACM CCS 2022)
abstract: Modern defenses against cyberattacks increasingly rely on proactive approaches, e.g., to predict the adversary's next actions based on past events. Building accurate prediction models requires knowledge from many organizations; alas, this entails disclosing sensitive information, such as network structures, security postures, and policies, which might often be undesirable or outright impossible. In this paper, we explore the feasibility of using Federated Learning (FL) to predict future security events. To this end, we introduce Cerberus, a system enabling collaborative training of Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) models for participating organizations. The intuition is that FL could potentially offer a middle-ground between the non-private approach where the training data is pooled at a central server and the low-utility alternative of only training local models. We instantiate Cerberus on a dataset obtained from a major security company's intrusion prevention product and evaluate it vis-a-vis utility, robustness, and privacy, as well as how participants contribute to and benefit from the system. Overall, our work sheds light on both the positive aspects and the challenges of using FL for this task and paves the way for deploying federated approaches to predictive security.
summary: Modern defenses against cyberattacks increasingly rely on proactive approaches, e.g., to predict the adversary's next actions based on past events. Building accurate prediction models requires knowledge from many organizations; alas, this entails disclosing sensitive information, such as network structures, security postures, and policies, which might often be undesirable or outright impossible. In this paper, we explore the feasibility of using Federated Learning (FL) to predict future security events. To this end, we introduce Cerberus, a system enabling collaborative training of Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) models for participating organizations. The intuition is that FL could potentially offer a middle-ground between the non-private approach where the training data is pooled at a central server and the low-utility alternative of only training local models. We instantiate Cerberus on a dataset obtained from a major security company's intrusion prevention product and evaluate it vis-a-vis utility, robustness, and privacy, as well as how participants contribute to and benefit from the system. Overall, our work sheds light on both the positive aspects and the challenges of using FL for this task and paves the way for deploying federated approaches to predictive security.
abstract_zh: 现代防御网络攻击越来越依赖于主动方法，例如根据过去的事件预测对手的下一步行动。建立准确的预测模型需要许多组织的知识；遗憾的是，这需要披露敏感信息，例如网络结构、安全态势和政策，这通常是不受欢迎的或完全不可能的。在本文中，我们探讨了使用联邦学习（FL）来预测未来安全事件的可行性。为此，我们推出了 Cerberus，这是一个能够为参与组织协作训练循环神经网络 (RNN) 模型的系统。直觉是，FL 可能会在非私有方法（训练数据集中在中央服务器）和仅训练本地模型的低效替代方案之间提供一个中间立场。我们在从一家大型安全公司的入侵防御产品获得的数据集上实例化 Cerberus，并评估其实用性、稳健性和隐私性，以及参与者如何为系统做出贡献并从中受益。总的来说，我们的工作揭示了使用 FL 来完成此任务的积极方面和挑战，并为部署联合方法来实现预测安全铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cerberus系统，探索利用联邦学习（FL）协作训练循环神经网络（RNN）模型，以在不泄露敏感信息的前提下预测网络安全事件。
AI.motivation: 传统网络安全预测需聚合多方数据但涉及隐私泄露风险，而本地训练模型效果有限，需寻找隐私与效用的平衡方案。
AI.method: 设计Cerberus系统实现联邦学习框架，基于RNN模型进行多组织协作训练，并在真实安全数据集上评估系统效用、鲁棒性及隐私保护能力。
AI.result: 实验表明Cerberus在保持隐私的同时实现了较高质量的预测性能，验证了联邦学习在网络安全预测中的可行性，同时揭示了参与者贡献度与模型效果的相关性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为网络安全预测提供了兼顾隐私与协作的新路径，但需进一步解决模型收敛性、数据异质性等挑战以实现实际部署。

authors_text: Made Satria Wibawa,Kwok-Wai Lo,Lawrence Young,Nasir Rajpoot
title: Multi-Scale Attention-based Multiple Instance Learning for Classification of Multi-Gigapixel Histology Images
title_zh: 用于多千兆像素组织学图像分类的基于多尺度注意的多实例学习
abstract: Histology images with multi-gigapixel of resolution yield rich information for cancer diagnosis and prognosis. Most of the time, only slide-level label is available because pixel-wise annotation is labour intensive task. In this paper, we propose a deep learning pipeline for classification in histology images. Using multiple instance learning, we attempt to predict the latent membrane protein 1 (LMP1) status of nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) based on haematoxylin and eosin-stain (H&E) histology images. We utilised attention mechanism with residual connection for our aggregation layers. In our 3-fold cross-validation experiment, we achieved average accuracy, AUC and F1-score 0.936, 0.995 and 0.862, respectively. This method also allows us to examine the model interpretability by visualising attention scores. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to predict LMP1 status on NPC using deep learning.
summary: Histology images with multi-gigapixel of resolution yield rich information for cancer diagnosis and prognosis. Most of the time, only slide-level label is available because pixel-wise annotation is labour intensive task. In this paper, we propose a deep learning pipeline for classification in histology images. Using multiple instance learning, we attempt to predict the latent membrane protein 1 (LMP1) status of nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) based on haematoxylin and eosin-stain (H&E) histology images. We utilised attention mechanism with residual connection for our aggregation layers. In our 3-fold cross-validation experiment, we achieved average accuracy, AUC and F1-score 0.936, 0.995 and 0.862, respectively. This method also allows us to examine the model interpretability by visualising attention scores. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to predict LMP1 status on NPC using deep learning.
abstract_zh: 具有数十亿像素分辨率的组织学图像可为癌症诊断和预后提供丰富的信息。大多数时候，只有幻灯片级标签可用，因为像素级注释是劳动密集型任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于组织学图像分类的深度学习流程。使用多实例学习，我们尝试根据苏木精和伊红染色 (H&E) 组织学图像来预测鼻咽癌 (NPC) 的潜在膜蛋白 1 (LMP1) 状态。我们在聚合层中使用了带有剩余连接的注意力机制。在我们的 3 倍交叉验证实验中，我们实现了平均准确度、AUC 和 F1 得分分别为 0.936、0.995 和 0.862。这种方法还允许我们通过可视化注意力分数来检查模型的可解释性。据我们所知，这是利用深度学习预测 NPC 上 LMP1 状态的首次尝试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度注意力机制的多实例学习方法，用于多千兆像素组织学图像的分类，特别是预测鼻咽癌LMP1状态。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率组织学图像包含丰富的诊断信息，但像素级标注成本过高，仅能获取滑动级标签。现有方法难以有效利用多实例学习进行癌症标志物预测。
AI.method: 设计包含残差连接的注意力机制聚合层，结合多实例学习框架处理多尺度特征，通过H&E染色图像实现LMP1状态预测。
AI.result: 3折交叉验证中达到93.6%准确率、99.5% AUC和86.2% F1分数，且可通过注意力可视化实现模型解释性验证。
AI.conclusion: 首次将深度学习应用于NPC的LMP1状态预测，提出的多尺度注意力机制显著提升了多实例学习在病理图像分类中的性能与可解释性。

conclusion: 首次将深度学习应用于NPC的LMP1状态预测，提出的多尺度注意力机制显著提升了多实例学习在病理图像分类中的性能与可解释性。
search_text: Multi-Scale Attention-based Multiple Instance Learning for Classification of Multi-Gigapixel Histology Images 用于多千兆像素组织学图像分类的基于多尺度注意的多实例学习 Histology images with multi-gigapixel of resolution yield rich information for cancer diagnosis and prognosis. Most of the time, only slide-level label is available because pixel-wise annotation is labour intensive task. In this paper, we propose a deep learning pipeline for classification in histology images. Using multiple instance learning, we attempt to predict the latent membrane protein 1 (LMP1) status of nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) based on haematoxylin and eosin-stain (H&E) histology images. We utilised attention mechanism with residual connection for our aggregation layers. In our 3-fold cross-validation experiment, we achieved average accuracy, AUC and F1-score 0.936, 0.995 and 0.862, respectively. This method also allows us to examine the model interpretability by visualising attention scores. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to predict LMP1 status on NPC using deep learning. 具有数十亿像素分辨率的组织学图像可为癌症诊断和预后提供丰富的信息。大多数时候，只有幻灯片级标签可用，因为像素级注释是劳动密集型任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于组织学图像分类的深度学习流程。使用多实例学习，我们尝试根据苏木精和伊红染色 (H&E) 组织学图像来预测鼻咽癌 (NPC) 的潜在膜蛋白 1 (LMP1) 状态。我们在聚合层中使用了带有剩余连接的注意力机制。在我们的 3 倍交叉验证实验中，我们实现了平均准确度、AUC 和 F1 得分分别为 0.936、0.995 和 0.862。这种方法还允许我们通过可视化注意力分数来检查模型的可解释性。据我们所知，这是利用深度学习预测 NPC 上 LMP1 状态的首次尝试。 本文提出一种基于多尺度注意力机制的多实例学习方法，用于多千兆像素组织学图像的分类，特别是预测鼻咽癌LMP1状态。 Made Satria Wibawa,Kwok-Wai Lo,Lawrence Young,Nasir Rajpoot cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mengya Han,Yibing Zhan,Yong Luo,Bo Du,Han Hu,Yonggang Wen,Dacheng Tao
title: Not All Instances Contribute Equally: Instance-adaptive Class Representation Learning for Few-Shot Visual Recognition
title_zh: 并非所有实例的贡献均等：用于少样本视觉识别的实例自适应类表示学习
abstract: Few-shot visual recognition refers to recognize novel visual concepts from a few labeled instances. Many few-shot visual recognition methods adopt the metric-based meta-learning paradigm by comparing the query representation with class representations to predict the category of query instance. However, current metric-based methods generally treat all instances equally and consequently often obtain biased class representation, considering not all instances are equally significant when summarizing the instance-level representations for the class-level representation. For example, some instances may contain unrepresentative information, such as too much background and information of unrelated concepts, which skew the results. To address the above issues, we propose a novel metric-based meta-learning framework termed instance-adaptive class representation learning network (ICRL-Net) for few-shot visual recognition. Specifically, we develop an adaptive instance revaluing network with the capability to address the biased representation issue when generating the class representation, by learning and assigning adaptive weights for different instances according to their relative significance in the support set of corresponding class. Additionally, we design an improved bilinear instance representation and incorporate two novel structural losses, i.e., intra-class instance clustering loss and inter-class representation distinguishing loss, to further regulate the instance revaluation process and refine the class representation. We conduct extensive experiments on four commonly adopted few-shot benchmarks: miniImageNet, tieredImageNet, CIFAR-FS, and FC100 datasets. The experimental results compared with the state-of-the-art approaches demonstrate the superiority of our ICRL-Net.
summary: Few-shot visual recognition refers to recognize novel visual concepts from a few labeled instances. Many few-shot visual recognition methods adopt the metric-based meta-learning paradigm by comparing the query representation with class representations to predict the category of query instance. However, current metric-based methods generally treat all instances equally and consequently often obtain biased class representation, considering not all instances are equally significant when summarizing the instance-level representations for the class-level representation. For example, some instances may contain unrepresentative information, such as too much background and information of unrelated concepts, which skew the results. To address the above issues, we propose a novel metric-based meta-learning framework termed instance-adaptive class representation learning network (ICRL-Net) for few-shot visual recognition. Specifically, we develop an adaptive instance revaluing network with the capability to address the biased representation issue when generating the class representation, by learning and assigning adaptive weights for different instances according to their relative significance in the support set of corresponding class. Additionally, we design an improved bilinear instance representation and incorporate two novel structural losses, i.e., intra-class instance clustering loss and inter-class representation distinguishing loss, to further regulate the instance revaluation process and refine the class representation. We conduct extensive experiments on four commonly adopted few-shot benchmarks: miniImageNet, tieredImageNet, CIFAR-FS, and FC100 datasets. The experimental results compared with the state-of-the-art approaches demonstrate the superiority of our ICRL-Net.
abstract_zh: 小样本视觉识别是指从一些标记实例中识别新颖的视觉概念。许多少样本视觉识别方法采用基于度量的元学习范式，通过将查询表示与类表示进行比较来预测查询实例的类别。然而，当前基于度量的方法通常平等地对待所有实例，因此经常获得有偏差的类表示，考虑到在总结类级表示的实例级表示时并非所有实例都同等重要。例如，某些实例可能包含不具有代表性的信息，例如过多的背景和不相关概念的信息，这会扭曲结果。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于度量的元学习框架，称为实例自适应类表示学习网络（ICRL-Net），用于少镜头视觉识别。具体来说，我们开发了一种自适应实例重估网络，能够根据不同实例在相应类支持集中的相对重要性来学习和分配自适应权重，从而解决生成类表示时的偏差表示问题。此外，我们设计了一种改进的双线性实例表示，并结合了两种新颖的结构损失，即类内实例聚类损失和类间表示区分损失，以进一步规范实例重估过程并细化类表示。我们对四个常用的少样本基准进行了广泛的实验：miniImageNet、tieredImageNet、CIFAR-FS 和 FC100 数据集。与最先进的方法相比的实验结果证明了我们的 ICRL-Net 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实例自适应的类表示学习框架ICRL-Net，用于改进少样本视觉识别中类表示的生成方式。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本方法对所有实例平等对待，导致类表示易受不具代表性的实例（如背景复杂或无关概念）影响，产生偏差。
AI.method: 设计自适应实例重评网络为不同实例分配权重，结合改进的双线性实例表示及两类结构损失函数（类内聚类损失和类间区分损失）优化表示学习过程。
AI.result: 在miniImageNet、tieredImageNet等四个基准数据集上实验表明，ICRL-Net优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态调整实例权重和结构化损失约束，该方法有效提升了少样本场景下类表示的鲁棒性和判别性。

authors_text: Pol Caselles,Eduard Ramon,Jaime Garcia,Xavier Giro-i-Nieto,Francesc Moreno-Noguer,Gil Triginer
title: SIRA: Relightable Avatars from a Single Image
title_zh: SIRA：来自单个图像的可重新点亮的头像
abstract: Recovering the geometry of a human head from a single image, while factorizing the materials and illumination is a severely ill-posed problem that requires prior information to be solved. Methods based on 3D Morphable Models (3DMM), and their combination with differentiable renderers, have shown promising results. However, the expressiveness of 3DMMs is limited, and they typically yield over-smoothed and identity-agnostic 3D shapes limited to the face region. Highly accurate full head reconstructions have recently been obtained with neural fields that parameterize the geometry using multilayer perceptrons. The versatility of these representations has also proved effective for disentangling geometry, materials and lighting. However, these methods require several tens of input images. In this paper, we introduce SIRA, a method which, from a single image, reconstructs human head avatars with high fidelity geometry and factorized lights and surface materials. Our key ingredients are two data-driven statistical models based on neural fields that resolve the ambiguities of single-view 3D surface reconstruction and appearance factorization. Experiments show that SIRA obtains state of the art results in 3D head reconstruction while at the same time it successfully disentangles the global illumination, and the diffuse and specular albedos. Furthermore, our reconstructions are amenable to physically-based appearance editing and head model relighting.
summary: Recovering the geometry of a human head from a single image, while factorizing the materials and illumination is a severely ill-posed problem that requires prior information to be solved. Methods based on 3D Morphable Models (3DMM), and their combination with differentiable renderers, have shown promising results. However, the expressiveness of 3DMMs is limited, and they typically yield over-smoothed and identity-agnostic 3D shapes limited to the face region. Highly accurate full head reconstructions have recently been obtained with neural fields that parameterize the geometry using multilayer perceptrons. The versatility of these representations has also proved effective for disentangling geometry, materials and lighting. However, these methods require several tens of input images. In this paper, we introduce SIRA, a method which, from a single image, reconstructs human head avatars with high fidelity geometry and factorized lights and surface materials. Our key ingredients are two data-driven statistical models based on neural fields that resolve the ambiguities of single-view 3D surface reconstruction and appearance factorization. Experiments show that SIRA obtains state of the art results in 3D head reconstruction while at the same time it successfully disentangles the global illumination, and the diffuse and specular albedos. Furthermore, our reconstructions are amenable to physically-based appearance editing and head model relighting.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像中恢复人体头部的几何形状，同时分解材料和照明是一个严重不适定的问题，需要解决先验信息。基于 3D Morphable Models (3DMM) 的方法及其与可微分渲染器的组合已显示出有希望的结果。然而，3DMM 的表现力有限，并且它们通常会产生仅限于面部区域的过度平滑且与身份无关的 3D 形状。最近，通过使用多层感知器参数化几何形状的神经场获得了高度准确的全头部重建。这些表示的多功能性也被证明对于解开几何、材料和照明是有效的。然而，这些方法需要数十个输入图像。在本文中，我们介绍了 SIRA，这是一种从单个图像重建具有高保真几何形状以及因子化灯光和表面材质的人体头部化身的方法。我们的关键成分是两个基于神经场的数据驱动统计模型，它们解决了单视图 3D 表面重建和外观分解的模糊性。实验表明，SIRA 在 3D 头部重建方面获得了最先进的结果，同时成功地解开了全局照明以及漫反射和镜面反照率。此外，我们的重建适合基于物理的外观编辑和头部模型重新照明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIRA方法，从单张图像中重建具有高保真几何结构并分离光照和表面材质的人头Avatar。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3DMM的方法存在表达能力有限且重建结果过于平滑的问题，而神经场方法虽精度高但需多张输入图像，需解决单视角下几何重建与外观分解的歧义性。
AI.method: 设计两种基于神经场的数据驱动统计模型，通过单张图像联合优化几何结构、光照及材质参数，实现解耦。
AI.result: 在3D人头重建任务中达到SOTA性能，成功分离全局光照与漫反射/镜面反射材质，并支持物理基于的外观编辑与重光照。
AI.conclusion: SIRA为单图像高质量Avatar生成提供了有效方案，推动了可编辑虚拟人像技术的发展。

Furthermore, our reconstructions are amenable to physically-based appearance editing and head model relighting. 从单个图像中恢复人体头部的几何形状，同时分解材料和照明是一个严重不适定的问题，需要解决先验信息。基于 3D Morphable Models (3DMM) 的方法及其与可微分渲染器的组合已显示出有希望的结果。然而，3DMM 的表现力有限，并且它们通常会产生仅限于面部区域的过度平滑且与身份无关的 3D 形状。最近，通过使用多层感知器参数化几何形状的神经场获得了高度准确的全头部重建。这些表示的多功能性也被证明对于解开几何、材料和照明是有效的。然而，这些方法需要数十个输入图像。在本文中，我们介绍了 SIRA，这是一种从单个图像重建具有高保真几何形状以及因子化灯光和表面材质的人体头部化身的方法。我们的关键成分是两个基于神经场的数据驱动统计模型，它们解决了单视图 3D 表面重建和外观分解的模糊性。实验表明，SIRA 在 3D 头部重建方面获得了最先进的结果，同时成功地解开了全局照明以及漫反射和镜面反照率。此外，我们的重建适合基于物理的外观编辑和头部模型重新照明。 本文提出SIRA方法，从单张图像中重建具有高保真几何结构并分离光照和表面材质的人头Avatar。 Pol Caselles,Eduard Ramon,Jaime Garcia,Xavier Giro-i-Nieto,Francesc Moreno-Noguer,Gil Triginer cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Simone Angarano,Francesco Salvetti,Vittorio Mazzia,Giovanni Fantin,Dario Gandini,Marcello Chiaberge
title: Ultra-low-power Range Error Mitigation for Ultra-wideband Precise Localization
title_zh: 超低功耗范围误差缓解，实现超宽带精确定位
abstract: Precise and accurate localization in outdoor and indoor environments is a challenging problem that currently constitutes a significant limitation for several practical applications. Ultra-wideband (UWB) localization technology represents a valuable low-cost solution to the problem. However, non-line-of-sight (NLOS) conditions and complexity of the specific radio environment can easily introduce a positive bias in the ranging measurement, resulting in highly inaccurate and unsatisfactory position estimation. In the light of this, we leverage the latest advancement in deep neural network optimization techniques and their implementation on ultra-low-power microcontrollers to introduce an effective range error mitigation solution that provides corrections in either NLOS or LOS conditions with a few mW of power. Our extensive experimentation endorses the advantages and improvements of our low-cost and power-efficient methodology.
summary: Precise and accurate localization in outdoor and indoor environments is a challenging problem that currently constitutes a significant limitation for several practical applications. Ultra-wideband (UWB) localization technology represents a valuable low-cost solution to the problem. However, non-line-of-sight (NLOS) conditions and complexity of the specific radio environment can easily introduce a positive bias in the ranging measurement, resulting in highly inaccurate and unsatisfactory position estimation. In the light of this, we leverage the latest advancement in deep neural network optimization techniques and their implementation on ultra-low-power microcontrollers to introduce an effective range error mitigation solution that provides corrections in either NLOS or LOS conditions with a few mW of power. Our extensive experimentation endorses the advantages and improvements of our low-cost and power-efficient methodology.
abstract_zh: 室外和室内环境中的精确定位是一个具有挑战性的问题，目前对一些实际应用构成了重大限制。超宽带 (UWB) 定位技术是解决该问题的一种有价值的低成本解决方案。然而，非视距（NLOS）条件和特定无线电环境的复杂性很容易在测距测量中引入正偏差，导致位置估计高度不准确且不令人满意。有鉴于此，我们利用深度神经网络优化技术的最新进展及其在超低功耗微控制器上的实现，推出一种有效的距离误差缓解解决方案，该解决方案可以在非视距或视距条件下以几毫瓦的功率提供校正。我们广泛的实验证实了我们的低成本和高能效方法的优势和改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种超低功耗的超宽带（UWB）定位测距误差缓解方法，以应对非视距（NLOS）和复杂无线电环境下的定位不准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有UWB定位技术在非视距（NLOS）和复杂无线电环境下易产生测距偏差，导致定位精度下降，亟需一种低成本且超低功耗的误差校正方案。
AI.method: 基于深度神经网络优化技术，结合超低功耗微控制器实现，对NLOS和LOS条件下的测距误差进行实时校正。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了该方法在降低测距误差和提升定位精度方面的有效性，同时保持极低的功耗（数mW）。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一种高效、低功耗的UWB定位误差校正方案，为实际应用场景中的精确定位提供了可行的技术支持。

search_text: Ultra-low-power Range Error Mitigation for Ultra-wideband Precise Localization 超低功耗范围误差缓解，实现超宽带精确定位 Precise and accurate localization in outdoor and indoor environments is a challenging problem that currently constitutes a significant limitation for several practical applications. Ultra-wideband (UWB) localization technology represents a valuable low-cost solution to the problem. However, non-line-of-sight (NLOS) conditions and complexity of the specific radio environment can easily introduce a positive bias in the ranging measurement, resulting in highly inaccurate and unsatisfactory position estimation. In the light of this, we leverage the latest advancement in deep neural network optimization techniques and their implementation on ultra-low-power microcontrollers to introduce an effective range error mitigation solution that provides corrections in either NLOS or LOS conditions with a few mW of power. Our extensive experimentation endorses the advantages and improvements of our low-cost and power-efficient methodology. 室外和室内环境中的精确定位是一个具有挑战性的问题，目前对一些实际应用构成了重大限制。超宽带 (UWB) 定位技术是解决该问题的一种有价值的低成本解决方案。然而，非视距（NLOS）条件和特定无线电环境的复杂性很容易在测距测量中引入正偏差，导致位置估计高度不准确且不令人满意。有鉴于此，我们利用深度神经网络优化技术的最新进展及其在超低功耗微控制器上的实现，推出一种有效的距离误差缓解解决方案，该解决方案可以在非视距或视距条件下以几毫瓦的功率提供校正。我们广泛的实验证实了我们的低成本和高能效方法的优势和改进。 提出一种超低功耗的超宽带（UWB）定位测距误差缓解方法，以应对非视距（NLOS）和复杂无线电环境下的定位不准确性。 Simone Angarano,Francesco Salvetti,Vittorio Mazzia,Giovanni Fantin,Dario Gandini,Marcello Chiaberge cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Text Growing on Leaf
title_zh: 叶子上生长的文字
abstract: Irregular-shaped texts bring challenges to Scene Text Detection (STD). Although existing contour point sequence-based approaches achieve comparable performances, they fail to cover some highly curved ribbon-like text lines. It leads to limited text fitting ability and STD technique application. Considering the above problem, we combine text geometric characteristics and bionics to design a natural leaf vein-based text representation method (LVT). Concretely, it is found that leaf vein is a generally directed graph, which can easily cover various geometries. Inspired by it, we treat text contour as leaf margin and represent it through main, lateral, and thin veins. We further construct a detection framework based on LVT, namely LeafText. In the text reconstruction stage, LeafText simulates the leaf growth process to rebuild text contour. It grows main vein in Cartesian coordinates to locate text roughly at first. Then, lateral and thin veins are generated along the main vein growth direction in polar coordinates. They are responsible for generating coarse contour and refining it, respectively. Considering the deep dependency of lateral and thin veins on main vein, the Multi-Oriented Smoother (MOS) is proposed to enhance the robustness of main vein to ensure a reliable detection result. Additionally, we propose a global incentive loss to accelerate the predictions of lateral and thin veins. Ablation experiments demonstrate LVT is able to depict arbitrary-shaped texts precisely and verify the effectiveness of MOS and global incentive loss. Comparisons show that LeafText is superior to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on MSRA-TD500, CTW1500, Total-Text, and ICDAR2015 datasets.
summary: Irregular-shaped texts bring challenges to Scene Text Detection (STD). Although existing contour point sequence-based approaches achieve comparable performances, they fail to cover some highly curved ribbon-like text lines. It leads to limited text fitting ability and STD technique application. Considering the above problem, we combine text geometric characteristics and bionics to design a natural leaf vein-based text representation method (LVT). Concretely, it is found that leaf vein is a generally directed graph, which can easily cover various geometries. Inspired by it, we treat text contour as leaf margin and represent it through main, lateral, and thin veins. We further construct a detection framework based on LVT, namely LeafText. In the text reconstruction stage, LeafText simulates the leaf growth process to rebuild text contour. It grows main vein in Cartesian coordinates to locate text roughly at first. Then, lateral and thin veins are generated along the main vein growth direction in polar coordinates. They are responsible for generating coarse contour and refining it, respectively. Considering the deep dependency of lateral and thin veins on main vein, the Multi-Oriented Smoother (MOS) is proposed to enhance the robustness of main vein to ensure a reliable detection result. Additionally, we propose a global incentive loss to accelerate the predictions of lateral and thin veins. Ablation experiments demonstrate LVT is able to depict arbitrary-shaped texts precisely and verify the effectiveness of MOS and global incentive loss. Comparisons show that LeafText is superior to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on MSRA-TD500, CTW1500, Total-Text, and ICDAR2015 datasets.
abstract_zh: 不规则形状的文本给场景文本检测（STD）带来挑战。尽管现有的基于轮廓点序列的方法实现了可比的性能，但它们无法覆盖一些高度弯曲的带状文本线。这导致文本拟合能力和STD技术应用受到限制。考虑到上述问题，我们结合文本几何特征和仿生学，设计了一种基于自然叶脉的文本表示方法（LVT）。具体来说，发现叶脉是一个一般有向图，可以很容易地覆盖各种几何形状。受其启发，我们将文本轮廓视为叶缘，并通过主脉、侧脉和细脉来表示。我们进一步构建了一个基于LVT的检测框架，即LeafText。在文本重建阶段，LeafText模拟叶子的生长过程来重建文本轮廓。它首先在笛卡尔坐标中生长主脉以粗略地定位文本。然后，在极坐标中沿着主静脉生长方向生成侧脉和细脉。它们分别负责生成粗轮廓和细化轮廓。考虑到侧静脉和细静脉对主静脉的深度依赖性，提出了多方向平滑器（MOS）来增强主静脉的鲁棒性，以确保可靠的检测结果。此外，我们提出了全局激励损失来加速侧静脉和细静脉的预测。消融实验证明 LVT 能够精确描绘任意形状的文本，并验证 MOS 和全局激励损失的有效性。比较表明，LeafText 在 MSRA-TD500、CTW1500、Total-Text 和 ICDAR2015 数据集上优于现有最先进 (SOTA) 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于叶脉结构的场景文本检测方法LVT，通过模拟叶片生长过程解决不规则形状文本的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于轮廓点序列的方法难以处理高度弯曲的丝带状文本，导致文本拟合能力不足和检测技术应用受限。
AI.method: 设计叶脉结构文本表示方法（LVT），将文本轮廓视为叶缘，通过主脉、侧脉和细脉分阶段重建文本轮廓，并提出多向平滑器（MOS）和全局激励损失函数优化检测框架LeafText。
AI.result: 在MSRA-TD500、CTW1500等数据集上优于现有最先进方法，实验验证了LVT对任意形状文本的精确描绘能力。
AI.conclusion: 叶脉启发的LVT方法有效提升了不规则文本检测性能，MOS模块和全局激励损失显著增强了检测鲁棒性和效率。

title: Zoom Text Detector
title_zh: 缩放文本检测器
abstract: To pursue comprehensive performance, recent text detectors improve detection speed at the expense of accuracy. They adopt shrink-mask based text representation strategies, which leads to a high dependency of detection accuracy on shrink-masks. Unfortunately, three disadvantages cause unreliable shrink-masks. Specifically, these methods try to strengthen the discrimination of shrink-masks from the background by semantic information. However, the feature defocusing phenomenon that coarse layers are optimized by fine-grained objectives limits the extraction of semantic features. Meanwhile, since both shrink-masks and the margins belong to texts, the detail loss phenomenon that the margins are ignored hinders the distinguishment of shrink-masks from the margins, which causes ambiguous shrink-mask edges. Moreover, false-positive samples enjoy similar visual features with shrink-masks. They aggravate the decline of shrink-masks recognition. To avoid the above problems, we propose a Zoom Text Detector (ZTD) inspired by the zoom process of the camera. Specifically, Zoom Out Module (ZOM) is introduced to provide coarse-grained optimization objectives for coarse layers to avoid feature defocusing. Meanwhile, Zoom In Module (ZIM) is presented to enhance the margins recognition to prevent detail loss. Furthermore, Sequential-Visual Discriminator (SVD) is designed to suppress false-positive samples by sequential and visual features. Experiments verify the superior comprehensive performance of ZTD.
summary: To pursue comprehensive performance, recent text detectors improve detection speed at the expense of accuracy. They adopt shrink-mask based text representation strategies, which leads to a high dependency of detection accuracy on shrink-masks. Unfortunately, three disadvantages cause unreliable shrink-masks. Specifically, these methods try to strengthen the discrimination of shrink-masks from the background by semantic information. However, the feature defocusing phenomenon that coarse layers are optimized by fine-grained objectives limits the extraction of semantic features. Meanwhile, since both shrink-masks and the margins belong to texts, the detail loss phenomenon that the margins are ignored hinders the distinguishment of shrink-masks from the margins, which causes ambiguous shrink-mask edges. Moreover, false-positive samples enjoy similar visual features with shrink-masks. They aggravate the decline of shrink-masks recognition. To avoid the above problems, we propose a Zoom Text Detector (ZTD) inspired by the zoom process of the camera. Specifically, Zoom Out Module (ZOM) is introduced to provide coarse-grained optimization objectives for coarse layers to avoid feature defocusing. Meanwhile, Zoom In Module (ZIM) is presented to enhance the margins recognition to prevent detail loss. Furthermore, Sequential-Visual Discriminator (SVD) is designed to suppress false-positive samples by sequential and visual features. Experiments verify the superior comprehensive performance of ZTD.
abstract_zh: 为了追求综合性能，最近的文本检测器以牺牲准确性为代价来提高检测速度。他们采用基于收缩掩模的文本表示策略，这导致检测精度对收缩掩模的高度依赖。不幸的是，三个缺点导致收缩掩模不可靠。具体来说，这些方法试图通过语义信息来加强收缩掩模与背景的区分。然而，粗粒度层被细粒度目标优化的特征散焦现象限制了语义特征的提取。同时，由于收缩掩模和边距都属于文本，忽略边距的细节丢失现象阻碍了收缩掩模与边距的区分，从而导致收缩掩模边缘不明确。此外，假阳性样本与收缩掩模具有相似的视觉特征。它们加剧了收缩面罩认知度的下降。为了避免上述问题，我们受相机变焦过程的启发，提出了变焦文本检测器（ZTD）。具体来说，引入了缩小模块（ZOM）来为粗层提供粗粒度的优化目标，以避免特征散焦。同时，还引入了放大模块（ZIM）来增强边缘识别，防止细节丢失。此外，序列视觉鉴别器（SVD）旨在通过序列和视觉特征来抑制假阳性样本。实验验证了ZTD优越的综合性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ZTD的文本检测器，旨在解决现有方法因依赖收缩掩码导致的准确性下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本检测器为提升速度而牺牲准确性，其收缩掩码策略存在特征失焦、边缘模糊和假阳性干扰三大缺陷。
AI.method: 设计Zoom Out Module缓解特征失焦，Zoom In Module增强边缘识别，并引入Sequential-Visual Discriminator抑制假阳性样本。
AI.result: 实验验证ZTD在综合性能上优于现有方法，有效解决了收缩掩码的可靠性问题。
AI.conclusion: ZTD通过模拟相机缩放机制，系统性解决了文本检测中的关键缺陷，实现了速度与准确性的平衡。

title: Biblio-Analysis of Cohort Intelligence (CI) Algorithm and its allied applications from Scopus and Web of Science Perspective
title_zh: Biblio-从 Scopus 和 Web of Science 角度分析群组智能 (CI) 算法及其相关应用
abstract: Cohort Intelligence or CI is one of its kind of novel optimization algorithm. Since its inception, in a very short span it is applied successfully in various domains and its results are observed to be effectual in contrast to algorithm of its kind. Till date, there is no such type of bibliometric analysis carried out on CI and its related applications. So, this research paper in a way will be an ice breaker for those who want to take up CI to a new level. In this research papers, CI publications available in Scopus are analyzed through graphs, networked diagrams about authors, source titles, keywords over the years, journals over the time. In a way this bibliometric paper showcase CI, its applications and detail outs systematic review in terms its bibliometric details.
summary: Cohort Intelligence or CI is one of its kind of novel optimization algorithm. Since its inception, in a very short span it is applied successfully in various domains and its results are observed to be effectual in contrast to algorithm of its kind. Till date, there is no such type of bibliometric analysis carried out on CI and its related applications. So, this research paper in a way will be an ice breaker for those who want to take up CI to a new level. In this research papers, CI publications available in Scopus are analyzed through graphs, networked diagrams about authors, source titles, keywords over the years, journals over the time. In a way this bibliometric paper showcase CI, its applications and detail outs systematic review in terms its bibliometric details.
abstract_zh: 群组智能（Cohort Intelligence）或 CI 是其中一种新颖的优化算法。自诞生以来，它在很短的时间内就在各个领域得到了成功的应用，并且与同类算法相比，其结果被观察到是有效的。迄今为止，还没有针对 CI 及其相关应用进行此类文献计量分析。因此，这篇研究论文在某种程度上对于那些想要将 CI 提升到新水平的人来说将是破冰之举。在本研究论文中，Scopus 中提供的 CI 出版物通过图表、作者网络图、来源标题、历年关键词、历时期刊进行分析。在某种程度上，这篇文献计量论文展示了 CI、其应用和详细信息，并根据其文献计量细节进行了系统回顾。

AI.tldr: 本文从Scopus和Web of Science视角对群体智能（CI）算法及其相关应用进行文献计量分析，展示其研究趋势与应用领域。
AI.motivation: 目前尚无针对CI算法及其应用的文献计量分析，本文旨在填补这一空白，为后续CI研究提供系统性参考。
AI.method: 通过绘制作者网络、期刊分布、关键词共现图谱等方法，对Scopus数据库中CI相关文献进行时间序列和网络分析。
AI.result: 识别出CI算法的研究热点、关键作者及期刊，揭示其在优化领域的应用趋势及发展阶段特征。
AI.conclusion: 本文为CI算法研究提供首个系统性文献计量视角，指出未来需加强跨学科应用与算法改进方向。

title: Optimizing Demonstrated Robot Manipulation Skills for Temporal Logic Constraints
title_zh: 针对时间逻辑约束优化演示的机器人操作技能
comment: 8 Pages, 11 Figures. Accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 Pages, 11 Figures. Accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: For performing robotic manipulation tasks, the core problem is determining suitable trajectories that fulfill the task requirements. Various approaches to compute such trajectories exist, being learning and optimization the main driving techniques. Our work builds on the learning-from-demonstration (LfD) paradigm, where an expert demonstrates motions, and the robot learns to imitate them. However, expert demonstrations are not sufficient to capture all sorts of task specifications, such as the timing to grasp an object. In this paper, we propose a new method that considers formal task specifications within LfD skills. Precisely, we leverage Signal Temporal Logic (STL), an expressive form of temporal properties of systems, to formulate task specifications and use black-box optimization (BBO) to adapt an LfD skill accordingly. We demonstrate our approach in simulation and on a real industrial setting using several tasks that showcase how our approach addresses the LfD limitations using STL and BBO.
summary: For performing robotic manipulation tasks, the core problem is determining suitable trajectories that fulfill the task requirements. Various approaches to compute such trajectories exist, being learning and optimization the main driving techniques. Our work builds on the learning-from-demonstration (LfD) paradigm, where an expert demonstrates motions, and the robot learns to imitate them. However, expert demonstrations are not sufficient to capture all sorts of task specifications, such as the timing to grasp an object. In this paper, we propose a new method that considers formal task specifications within LfD skills. Precisely, we leverage Signal Temporal Logic (STL), an expressive form of temporal properties of systems, to formulate task specifications and use black-box optimization (BBO) to adapt an LfD skill accordingly. We demonstrate our approach in simulation and on a real industrial setting using several tasks that showcase how our approach addresses the LfD limitations using STL and BBO.
abstract_zh: 对于执行机器人操纵任务，核心问题是确定满足任务要求的合适轨迹。存在计算此类轨迹的各种方法，学习和优化主要驾驶技术。我们的工作建立在从演示中学习（LfD）范例的基础上，其中专家演示动作，机器人学习模仿它们。然而，专家演示不足以捕捉各种任务规范，例如抓取物体的时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法考虑 LfD 技能中的正式任务规范。准确地说，我们利用信号时态逻辑（STL）（系统时间属性的一种表达形式）来制定任务规范，并使用黑盒优化（BBO）来相应地调整 LfD 技能。我们使用几个任务在模拟和真实工业环境中演示我们的方法，这些任务展示了我们的方法如何使用 STL 和 BBO 解决 LfD 限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合信号时间逻辑(STL)和黑盒优化(BBO)的方法，优化基于示范学习的机器人操作技能以满足时间逻辑约束。
AI.motivation: 专家示范无法完整描述任务的时间规范（如抓取时机），需补充形式化方法确保任务约束被满足。
AI.method: 利用STL形式化任务规范，通过黑盒优化调整LfD技能参数，使生成轨迹符合时间逻辑约束。
AI.result: 在仿真和工业场景中验证了方法有效性，成功解决了LfD在时间约束下的技能优化问题。
AI.conclusion: STL与BBO结合可有效增强机器人操作技能对复杂时间逻辑约束的适应能力。

motivation: 专家示范无法完整描述任务的时间规范（如抓取时机），需补充形式化方法确保任务约束被满足。
method: 利用STL形式化任务规范，通过黑盒优化调整LfD技能参数，使生成轨迹符合时间逻辑约束。
result: 在仿真和工业场景中验证了方法有效性，成功解决了LfD在时间约束下的技能优化问题。
conclusion: STL与BBO结合可有效增强机器人操作技能对复杂时间逻辑约束的适应能力。
search_text: Optimizing Demonstrated Robot Manipulation Skills for Temporal Logic Constraints 针对时间逻辑约束优化演示的机器人操作技能 For performing robotic manipulation tasks, the core problem is determining suitable trajectories that fulfill the task requirements. Various approaches to compute such trajectories exist, being learning and optimization the main driving techniques. Our work builds on the learning-from-demonstration (LfD) paradigm, where an expert demonstrates motions, and the robot learns to imitate them. However, expert demonstrations are not sufficient to capture all sorts of task specifications, such as the timing to grasp an object. In this paper, we propose a new method that considers formal task specifications within LfD skills. Precisely, we leverage Signal Temporal Logic (STL), an expressive form of temporal properties of systems, to formulate task specifications and use black-box optimization (BBO) to adapt an LfD skill accordingly. We demonstrate our approach in simulation and on a real industrial setting using several tasks that showcase how our approach addresses the LfD limitations using STL and BBO. 对于执行机器人操纵任务，核心问题是确定满足任务要求的合适轨迹。存在计算此类轨迹的各种方法，学习和优化主要驾驶技术。我们的工作建立在从演示中学习（LfD）范例的基础上，其中专家演示动作，机器人学习模仿它们。然而，专家演示不足以捕捉各种任务规范，例如抓取物体的时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法考虑 LfD 技能中的正式任务规范。准确地说，我们利用信号时态逻辑（STL）（系统时间属性的一种表达形式）来制定任务规范，并使用黑盒优化（BBO）来相应地调整 LfD 技能。我们使用几个任务在模拟和真实工业环境中演示我们的方法，这些任务展示了我们的方法如何使用 STL 和 BBO 解决 LfD 限制。 本文提出一种结合信号时间逻辑(STL)和黑盒优化(BBO)的方法，优化基于示范学习的机器人操作技能以满足时间逻辑约束。 Akshay Dhonthi,Philipp Schillinger,Leonel Rozo,Daniele Nardi cs.RO

title: On the Transferability of Adversarial Examples between Encrypted Models
title_zh: 论加密模型之间对抗样本的可迁移性
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are well known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples (AEs). In addition, AEs have adversarial transferability, namely, AEs generated for a source model fool other (target) models. In this paper, we investigate the transferability of models encrypted for adversarially robust defense for the first time. To objectively verify the property of transferability, the robustness of models is evaluated by using a benchmark attack method, called AutoAttack. In an image-classification experiment, the use of encrypted models is confirmed not only to be robust against AEs but to also reduce the influence of AEs in terms of the transferability of models.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are well known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples (AEs). In addition, AEs have adversarial transferability, namely, AEs generated for a source model fool other (target) models. In this paper, we investigate the transferability of models encrypted for adversarially robust defense for the first time. To objectively verify the property of transferability, the robustness of models is evaluated by using a benchmark attack method, called AutoAttack. In an image-classification experiment, the use of encrypted models is confirmed not only to be robust against AEs but to also reduce the influence of AEs in terms of the transferability of models.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络 (DNN) 容易受到对抗性示例 (AE) 的影响。此外，AE 具有对抗性可转移性，即为源模型生成的 AE 可以欺骗其他（目标）模型。在本文中，我们首次研究了用于对抗性稳健防御的加密模型的可转移性。为了客观地验证可转移性的属性，使用称为 AutoAttack 的基准攻击方法来评估模型的鲁棒性。在图像分类实验中，加密模型的使用被证实不仅对 AE 具有鲁棒性，而且还可以减少 AE 对模型可迁移性的影响。

AI.tldr: 研究加密模型之间对抗样本的迁移性，并评估其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗样本在不同模型间具有迁移性，但加密模型的防御效果及迁移性影响尚不明确，需进一步研究。
AI.method: 使用AutoAttack基准攻击方法，通过图像分类实验评估加密模型的鲁棒性和对抗样本迁移性。
AI.result: 加密模型在对抗对抗样本方面表现鲁棒，并有效降低了对抗样本的迁移性影响。
AI.conclusion: 加密模型能有效提升对抗样本防御能力，降低迁移性，为安全应用提供理论支持。

title: From Human Walking to Bipedal Robot Locomotion: Reflex Inspired Compensation on Planned and Unplanned Downsteps
title_zh: 从人类行走到双足机器人运动：计划内和计划外下坡时的反射启发补偿
abstract: Humans are able to negotiate downstep behaviors -- both planned and unplanned -- with remarkable agility and ease. The goal of this paper is to systematically study the translation of this human behavior to bipedal walking robots, even if the morphology is inherently different. Concretely, we begin with human data wherein planned and unplanned downsteps are taken. We analyze this data from the perspective of reduced-order modeling of the human, encoding the center of mass (CoM) kinematics and contact forces, which allows for the translation of these behaviors into the corresponding reduced-order model of a bipedal robot. We embed the resulting behaviors into the full-order dynamics of a bipedal robot via nonlinear optimization-based controllers. The end result is the demonstration of planned and unplanned downsteps in simulation on an underactuated walking robot.
summary: Humans are able to negotiate downstep behaviors -- both planned and unplanned -- with remarkable agility and ease. The goal of this paper is to systematically study the translation of this human behavior to bipedal walking robots, even if the morphology is inherently different. Concretely, we begin with human data wherein planned and unplanned downsteps are taken. We analyze this data from the perspective of reduced-order modeling of the human, encoding the center of mass (CoM) kinematics and contact forces, which allows for the translation of these behaviors into the corresponding reduced-order model of a bipedal robot. We embed the resulting behaviors into the full-order dynamics of a bipedal robot via nonlinear optimization-based controllers. The end result is the demonstration of planned and unplanned downsteps in simulation on an underactuated walking robot.
abstract_zh: 人类能够以非凡的敏捷性和轻松度来协商下行行为（无论是计划内的还是计划外的）。本文的目标是系统地研究这种人类行为向双足行走机器人的转化，即使形态本质上是不同的。具体来说，我们从人类数据开始，其中计划和计划外的下降被采取。我们从人类降阶建模的角度分析这些数据，对质心 (CoM) 运动学和接触力进行编码，从而将这些行为转换为相应的双足机器人降阶模型。我们通过基于非线性优化的控制器将所得行为嵌入到双足机器人的全阶动力学中。最终结果是在欠驱动步行机器人的模拟中演示了计划内和计划外的下坡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将人类应对计划和非计划下坡步态的行为转化为双足机器人的运动控制，通过反射机制实现补偿。
AI.motivation: 人类能够灵活应对下坡场景，而双足机器人在复杂地形中缺乏类似能力，需借鉴生物机制提升机器人适应性。
AI.method: 基于人类运动数据建立简化模型（质心运动学与接触力），将其映射到双足机器人动力学模型中，并通过非线性优化控制器实现控制。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中成功实现了欠驱动双足机器人对计划和非计划下坡的步态模拟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了从生物运动机制到机器人控制的转化可行性，为复杂地形下的双足机器人运动控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aditya Kapoor,Nijil George,Vartika Sengar,Vighnesh Vatsal,Jayavardhana Gubbi
title: Auto-TransRL: Autonomous Composition of Vision Pipelines for Robotic Perception
title_zh: Auto-TransRL：用于机器人感知的视觉管道的自主组合
comment: Presented at the IEEE ICRA 2022 Workshop in Robotic Perception and Mapping: Emerging Techniques
comments: Presented at the IEEE ICRA 2022 Workshop in Robotic Perception and Mapping: Emerging Techniques
abstract: Creating a vision pipeline for different datasets to solve a computer vision task is a complex and time consuming process. Currently, these pipelines are developed with the help of domain experts. Moreover, there is no systematic structure to construct a vision pipeline apart from relying on experience, trial and error or using template-based approaches. As the search space for choosing suitable algorithms for achieving a particular vision task is large, human exploration for finding a good solution requires time and effort. To address the following issues, we propose a dynamic and data-driven way to identify an appropriate set of algorithms that would be fit for building the vision pipeline in order to achieve the goal task. We introduce a Transformer Architecture complemented with Deep Reinforcement Learning to recommend algorithms that can be incorporated at different stages of the vision workflow. This system is both robust and adaptive to dynamic changes in the environment. Experimental results further show that our method also generalizes well to recommend algorithms that have not been used while training and hence alleviates the need of retraining the system on a new set of algorithms introduced during test time.
summary: Creating a vision pipeline for different datasets to solve a computer vision task is a complex and time consuming process. Currently, these pipelines are developed with the help of domain experts. Moreover, there is no systematic structure to construct a vision pipeline apart from relying on experience, trial and error or using template-based approaches. As the search space for choosing suitable algorithms for achieving a particular vision task is large, human exploration for finding a good solution requires time and effort. To address the following issues, we propose a dynamic and data-driven way to identify an appropriate set of algorithms that would be fit for building the vision pipeline in order to achieve the goal task. We introduce a Transformer Architecture complemented with Deep Reinforcement Learning to recommend algorithms that can be incorporated at different stages of the vision workflow. This system is both robust and adaptive to dynamic changes in the environment. Experimental results further show that our method also generalizes well to recommend algorithms that have not been used while training and hence alleviates the need of retraining the system on a new set of algorithms introduced during test time.
abstract_zh: 为不同的数据集创建视觉管道来解决计算机视觉任务是一个复杂且耗时的过程。目前，这些管道是在领域专家的帮助下开发的。此外，除了依靠经验、反复试验或使用基于模板的方法之外，没有系统的结构来构建视觉管道。由于选择合适算法来实现特定视觉任务的搜索空间很大，人类探索寻找好的解决方案需要时间和精力。为了解决以下问题，我们提出了一种动态和数据驱动的方法来识别一组合适的算法，这些算法适合构建视觉管道以实现目标任务。我们引入了一个与深度强化学习相辅相成的 Transformer 架构，以推荐可以合并到视觉工作流程的不同阶段的算法。该系统既稳健又能够适应环境的动态变化。实验结果进一步表明，我们的方法还可以很好地推广到推荐训练时未使用的算法，从而减少了在测试期间引入的一组新算法上重新训练系统的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auto-TransRL方法，通过结合Transformer架构与深度强化学习，实现机器人感知中视觉流水线的自主构建。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉流水线构建依赖人工经验与试错，缺乏系统性方法，且难以适应动态环境变化和新算法的引入。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的架构，结合深度强化学习动态推荐适用于不同视觉流程阶段的算法组合，实现系统自适应调整。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效推荐训练时未接触过的算法，减少测试阶段重新训练需求，且在动态环境中表现鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: Auto-TransRL为视觉流水线构建提供了数据驱动的自动化解决方案，提升了机器人感知系统的适应性与泛化能力。

ai_content_json.method: 设计基于Transformer的架构，结合深度强化学习动态推荐适用于不同视觉流程阶段的算法组合，实现系统自适应调整。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明该方法能有效推荐训练时未接触过的算法，减少测试阶段重新训练需求，且在动态环境中表现鲁棒。
ai_content_json.conclusion: Auto-TransRL为视觉流水线构建提供了数据驱动的自动化解决方案，提升了机器人感知系统的适应性与泛化能力。

tldr: 本文提出Auto-TransRL方法，通过结合Transformer架构与深度强化学习，实现机器人感知中视觉流水线的自主构建。
motivation: 现有视觉流水线构建依赖人工经验与试错，缺乏系统性方法，且难以适应动态环境变化和新算法的引入。
method: 设计基于Transformer的架构，结合深度强化学习动态推荐适用于不同视觉流程阶段的算法组合，实现系统自适应调整。
result: 实验表明该方法能有效推荐训练时未接触过的算法，减少测试阶段重新训练需求，且在动态环境中表现鲁棒。
conclusion: Auto-TransRL为视觉流水线构建提供了数据驱动的自动化解决方案，提升了机器人感知系统的适应性与泛化能力。
search_text: Auto-TransRL: Autonomous Composition of Vision Pipelines for Robotic Perception Auto-TransRL：用于机器人感知的视觉管道的自主组合 Creating a vision pipeline for different datasets to solve a computer vision task is a complex and time consuming process. Currently, these pipelines are developed with the help of domain experts. Moreover, there is no systematic structure to construct a vision pipeline apart from relying on experience, trial and error or using template-based approaches. As the search space for choosing suitable algorithms for achieving a particular vision task is large, human exploration for finding a good solution requires time and effort. To address the following issues, we propose a dynamic and data-driven way to identify an appropriate set of algorithms that would be fit for building the vision pipeline in order to achieve the goal task. We introduce a Transformer Architecture complemented with Deep Reinforcement Learning to recommend algorithms that can be incorporated at different stages of the vision workflow. This system is both robust and adaptive to dynamic changes in the environment. Experimental results further show that our method also generalizes well to recommend algorithms that have not been used while training and hence alleviates the need of retraining the system on a new set of algorithms introduced during test time. 为不同的数据集创建视觉管道来解决计算机视觉任务是一个复杂且耗时的过程。目前，这些管道是在领域专家的帮助下开发的。此外，除了依靠经验、反复试验或使用基于模板的方法之外，没有系统的结构来构建视觉管道。由于选择合适算法来实现特定视觉任务的搜索空间很大，人类探索寻找好的解决方案需要时间和精力。为了解决以下问题，我们提出了一种动态和数据驱动的方法来识别一组合适的算法，这些算法适合构建视觉管道以实现目标任务。我们引入了一个与深度强化学习相辅相成的 Transformer 架构，以推荐可以合并到视觉工作流程的不同阶段的算法。该系统既稳健又能够适应环境的动态变化。实验结果进一步表明，我们的方法还可以很好地推广到推荐训练时未使用的算法，从而减少了在测试期间引入的一组新算法上重新训练系统的需要。 本文提出Auto-TransRL方法，通过结合Transformer架构与深度强化学习，实现机器人感知中视觉流水线的自主构建。 Aditya Kapoor,Nijil George,Vartika Sengar,Vighnesh Vatsal,Jayavardhana Gubbi cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Õptimal Vertex Fault-Tolerant Spanners in Õptimal Time: Sequential, Distributed and Parallel
title_zh: 最佳时间中的最佳顶点容错扳手：顺序、分布式和并行
abstract: We (nearly) settle the time complexity for computing vertex fault-tolerant (VFT) spanners with optimal sparsity (up to polylogarithmic factors). VFT spanners are sparse subgraphs that preserve distance information, up to a small multiplicative stretch, in the presence of vertex failures. These structures were introduced by [Chechik et al., STOC 2009] and have received a lot of attention since then. We provide algorithms for computing nearly optimal $f$-VFT spanners for any $n$-vertex $m$-edge graph, with near optimal running time in several computational models: - A randomized sequential algorithm with a runtime of $\widetilde{O}(m)$ (i.e., independent in the number of faults $f$). The state-of-the-art time bound is $\widetilde{O}(f^{1-1/k}\cdot n^{2+1/k}+f^2 m)$ by [Bodwin, Dinitz and Robelle, SODA 2021]. - A distributed congest algorithm of $\widetilde{O}(1)$ rounds. Improving upon [Dinitz and Robelle, PODC 2020] that obtained FT spanners with near-optimal sparsity in $\widetilde{O}(f^{2})$ rounds. - A PRAM (CRCW) algorithm with $\widetilde{O}(m)$ work and $\widetilde{O}(1)$ depth. Prior bounds implied by [Dinitz and Krauthgamer, PODC 2011] obtained sub-optimal FT spanners using $\widetilde{O}(f^3m)$ work and $\widetilde{O}(f^3)$ depth. An immediate corollary provides the first nearly-optimal PRAM algorithm for computing nearly optimal $λ$-\emph{vertex} connectivity certificates using polylogarithmic depth and near-linear work. This improves the state-of-the-art parallel bounds of $\widetilde{O}(1)$ depth and $O(λm)$ work, by [Karger and Motwani, STOC'93].
summary: We (nearly) settle the time complexity for computing vertex fault-tolerant (VFT) spanners with optimal sparsity (up to polylogarithmic factors). VFT spanners are sparse subgraphs that preserve distance information, up to a small multiplicative stretch, in the presence of vertex failures. These structures were introduced by [Chechik et al., STOC 2009] and have received a lot of attention since then. We provide algorithms for computing nearly optimal $f$-VFT spanners for any $n$-vertex $m$-edge graph, with near optimal running time in several computational models: - A randomized sequential algorithm with a runtime of $\widetilde{O}(m)$ (i.e., independent in the number of faults $f$). The state-of-the-art time bound is $\widetilde{O}(f^{1-1/k}\cdot n^{2+1/k}+f^2 m)$ by [Bodwin, Dinitz and Robelle, SODA 2021]. - A distributed congest algorithm of $\widetilde{O}(1)$ rounds. Improving upon [Dinitz and Robelle, PODC 2020] that obtained FT spanners with near-optimal sparsity in $\widetilde{O}(f^{2})$ rounds. - A PRAM (CRCW) algorithm with $\widetilde{O}(m)$ work and $\widetilde{O}(1)$ depth. Prior bounds implied by [Dinitz and Krauthgamer, PODC 2011] obtained sub-optimal FT spanners using $\widetilde{O}(f^3m)$ work and $\widetilde{O}(f^3)$ depth. An immediate corollary provides the first nearly-optimal PRAM algorithm for computing nearly optimal $λ$-\emph{vertex} connectivity certificates using polylogarithmic depth and near-linear work. This improves the state-of-the-art parallel bounds of $\widetilde{O}(1)$ depth and $O(λm)$ work, by [Karger and Motwani, STOC'93].
abstract_zh: 我们（几乎）解决了计算具有最佳稀疏性（最多多对数因子）的顶点容错（VFT）spanner的时间复杂度。 VFT 扳手是稀疏子图，在存在顶点故障的情况下，可保留距离信息，直至较小的乘法拉伸。这些结构由 [Chechik et al., STOC 2009] 引入，自那时以来受到了广泛的关注。我们提供了用于计算任何 $n$-顶点 $m$-边图的近乎最优 $f$-VFT 扳手的算法，在多个计算模型中具有近乎最优的运行时间： - 运行时间为 $\widetilde{O}(m)$ 的随机顺序算法（即与故障数量 $f$ 无关）。最先进的时间界限是 [Bodwin, Dinitz and Robelle, SODA 2021] 的 $\widetilde{O}(f^{1-1/k}\cdot n^{2+1/k}+f^2 m)$。 - $\widetilde{O}(1)$ 轮的分布式拥塞算法。改进 [Dinitz 和 Robelle，PODC 2020]，在 $\widetilde{O}(f^{2})$ 轮中获得具有接近最佳稀疏性的 FT 扳手。 - 具有 $\widetilde{O}(m)$ 工作和 $\widetilde{O}(1)$ 深度的 PRAM (CRCW) 算法。 [Dinitz 和 Krauthgamer, PODC 2011] 隐含的先验边界使用 $\widetilde{O}(f^3m)$ 工作和 $\widetilde{O}(f^3)$ 深度获得次优 FT 扳手。直接推论提供了第一个近乎最优的 PRAM 算法，用于使用多对数深度和近线性功计算近乎最优的 $λ$-\emph{vertex} 连接证书。这提高了 $\widetilde{O}(1)$ 深度和 $O(λm)$ 工作的最先进的并行边界，作者：[Karger 和 Motwani，STOC'93]。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在多种计算模型中以最优时间复杂度构建顶点容错跨度（VFT spanners）的算法，解决了顶点故障下的稀疏子图保持距离信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 顶点容错跨度结构在应对网络故障时具有重要意义，但现有算法在时间复杂度上存在瓶颈，尤其在故障数量和计算模型的依赖性上未能优化。
AI.method: 提出随机化顺序算法、分布式Congest算法和PRAM算法，分别在顺序模型、分布式模型和并行模型中实现近线性时间复杂度，减少对故障数量f的依赖。
AI.result: 顺序算法时间复杂度为Õ(m)，独立于f；分布式算法在Õ(1)轮内完成；PRAM算法以Õ(m)工作量和Õ(1)深度实现，同时改进了顶点连通性证书的并行计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 论文几乎解决了VFT跨度的最优时间复杂度问题，为不同计算模型提供了高效算法，显著提升了容错网络结构的实用性与可扩展性。

authors_text: Ruijie Hou,Yanran Li,Ningyu Zhang,Yulin Zhou,Xiaosong Yang,Zhao Wang
title: Shifting Perspective to See Difference: A Novel Multi-View Method for Skeleton based Action Recognition
title_zh: 转变视角看差异：一种基于骨架的动作识别的新颖的多视图方法
abstract: Skeleton-based human action recognition is a longstanding challenge due to its complex dynamics. Some fine-grain details of the dynamics play a vital role in classification. The existing work largely focuses on designing incremental neural networks with more complicated adjacent matrices to capture the details of joints relationships. However, they still have difficulties distinguishing actions that have broadly similar motion patterns but belong to different categories. Interestingly, we found that the subtle differences in motion patterns can be significantly amplified and become easy for audience to distinct through specified view directions, where this property haven't been fully explored before. Drastically different from previous work, we boost the performance by proposing a conceptually simple yet effective Multi-view strategy that recognizes actions from a collection of dynamic view features. Specifically, we design a novel Skeleton-Anchor Proposal (SAP) module which contains a Multi-head structure to learn a set of views. For feature learning of different views, we introduce a novel Angle Representation to transform the actions under different views and feed the transformations into the baseline model. Our module can work seamlessly with the existing action classification model. Incorporated with baseline models, our SAP module exhibits clear performance gains on many challenging benchmarks. Moreover, comprehensive experiments show that our model consistently beats down the state-of-the-art and remains effective and robust especially when dealing with corrupted data. Related code will be available on https://github.com/ideal-idea/SAP .
summary: Skeleton-based human action recognition is a longstanding challenge due to its complex dynamics. Some fine-grain details of the dynamics play a vital role in classification. The existing work largely focuses on designing incremental neural networks with more complicated adjacent matrices to capture the details of joints relationships. However, they still have difficulties distinguishing actions that have broadly similar motion patterns but belong to different categories. Interestingly, we found that the subtle differences in motion patterns can be significantly amplified and become easy for audience to distinct through specified view directions, where this property haven't been fully explored before. Drastically different from previous work, we boost the performance by proposing a conceptually simple yet effective Multi-view strategy that recognizes actions from a collection of dynamic view features. Specifically, we design a novel Skeleton-Anchor Proposal (SAP) module which contains a Multi-head structure to learn a set of views. For feature learning of different views, we introduce a novel Angle Representation to transform the actions under different views and feed the transformations into the baseline model. Our module can work seamlessly with the existing action classification model. Incorporated with baseline models, our SAP module exhibits clear performance gains on many challenging benchmarks. Moreover, comprehensive experiments show that our model consistently beats down the state-of-the-art and remains effective and robust especially when dealing with corrupted data. Related code will be available on https://github.com/ideal-idea/SAP .
abstract_zh: 由于其复杂的动力学特性，基于骨骼的人体动作识别是一个长期存在的挑战。动力学的一些细粒度细节在分类中起着至关重要的作用。现有的工作主要集中在设计具有更复杂的相邻矩阵的增量神经网络来捕获关节关系的细节。然而，他们仍然难以区分具有大致相似的运动模式但属于不同类别的动作。有趣的是，我们发现运动模式的细微差异可以被显着放大，并且观众可以通过指定的观看方向轻松区分，而这一特性之前尚未得到充分探索。与以前的工作截然不同，我们通过提出一种概念上简单但有效的多视图策略来提高性能，该策略可以从动态视图特征集合中识别操作。具体来说，我们设计了一个新颖的骨架锚点提案（SAP）模块，其中包含一个多头结构来学习一组视图。对于不同视图的特征学习，我们引入了一种新颖的角度表示来转换不同视图下的动作并将转换输入基线模型。我们的模块可以与现有的动作分类模型无缝协作。与基线模型相结合，我们的 SAP 模块在许多具有挑战性的基准测试中表现出明显的性能提升。此外，全面的实验表明，我们的模型始终击败最先进的模型，并且保持有效和稳健，尤其是在处理损坏的数据时。相关代码可以在 https://github.com/ideal-idea/SAP 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角的骨架动作识别方法，通过设计骨架锚点提案模块（SAP）和角度表示策略，提升动作分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以区分运动模式相似但类别不同的动作，而视角变化可放大细微差异这一特性尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出包含多头结构的SAP模块学习多视角特征，并设计角度表示策略将不同视角动作转换后输入基线模型。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著超越现有方法，尤其在数据受损情况下保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多视角策略有效捕捉动作细微差异，SAP模块可无缝集成现有模型并提升分类性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角的骨架动作识别方法，通过设计骨架锚点提案模块（SAP）和角度表示策略，提升动作分类性能。

search_text: Shifting Perspective to See Difference: A Novel Multi-View Method for Skeleton based Action Recognition 转变视角看差异：一种基于骨架的动作识别的新颖的多视图方法 Skeleton-based human action recognition is a longstanding challenge due to its complex dynamics. Some fine-grain details of the dynamics play a vital role in classification. The existing work largely focuses on designing incremental neural networks with more complicated adjacent matrices to capture the details of joints relationships. However, they still have difficulties distinguishing actions that have broadly similar motion patterns but belong to different categories. Interestingly, we found that the subtle differences in motion patterns can be significantly amplified and become easy for audience to distinct through specified view directions, where this property haven't been fully explored before. Drastically different from previous work, we boost the performance by proposing a conceptually simple yet effective Multi-view strategy that recognizes actions from a collection of dynamic view features. Specifically, we design a novel Skeleton-Anchor Proposal (SAP) module which contains a Multi-head structure to learn a set of views. For feature learning of different views, we introduce a novel Angle Representation to transform the actions under different views and feed the transformations into the baseline model. Our module can work seamlessly with the existing action classification model. Incorporated with baseline models, our SAP module exhibits clear performance gains on many challenging benchmarks. Moreover, comprehensive experiments show that our model consistently beats down the state-of-the-art and remains effective and robust especially when dealing with corrupted data. Related code will be available on https://github.com/ideal-idea/SAP . 由于其复杂的动力学特性，基于骨骼的人体动作识别是一个长期存在的挑战。动力学的一些细粒度细节在分类中起着至关重要的作用。现有的工作主要集中在设计具有更复杂的相邻矩阵的增量神经网络来捕获关节关系的细节。然而，他们仍然难以区分具有大致相似的运动模式但属于不同类别的动作。有趣的是，我们发现运动模式的细微差异可以被显着放大，并且观众可以通过指定的观看方向轻松区分，而这一特性之前尚未得到充分探索。与以前的工作截然不同，我们通过提出一种概念上简单但有效的多视图策略来提高性能，该策略可以从动态视图特征集合中识别操作。具体来说，我们设计了一个新颖的骨架锚点提案（SAP）模块，其中包含一个多头结构来学习一组视图。对于不同视图的特征学习，我们引入了一种新颖的角度表示来转换不同视图下的动作并将转换输入基线模型。我们的模块可以与现有的动作分类模型无缝协作。与基线模型相结合，我们的 SAP 模块在许多具有挑战性的基准测试中表现出明显的性能提升。此外，全面的实验表明，我们的模型始终击败最先进的模型，并且保持有效和稳健，尤其是在处理损坏的数据时。相关代码可以在 https://github.com/ideal-idea/SAP 上找到。 本文提出一种基于多视角的骨架动作识别方法，通过设计骨架锚点提案模块（SAP）和角度表示策略，提升动作分类性能。 Ruijie Hou,Yanran Li,Ningyu Zhang,Yulin Zhou,Xiaosong Yang,Zhao Wang cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Semantic Interactive Learning for Text Classification: A Constructive Approach for Contextual Interactions
title_zh: 用于文本分类的语义交互式学习：上下文交互的建设性方法
abstract: Interactive Machine Learning (IML) shall enable intelligent systems to interactively learn from their end-users, and is quickly becoming more and more important. Although it puts the human in the loop, interactions are mostly performed via mutual explanations that miss contextual information. Furthermore, current model-agnostic IML strategies like CAIPI are limited to 'destructive' feedback, meaning they solely allow an expert to prevent a learner from using irrelevant features. In this work, we propose a novel interaction framework called Semantic Interactive Learning for the text domain. We frame the problem of incorporating constructive and contextual feedback into the learner as a task to find an architecture that (a) enables more semantic alignment between humans and machines and (b) at the same time helps to maintain statistical characteristics of the input domain when generating user-defined counterexamples based on meaningful corrections. Therefore, we introduce a technique called SemanticPush that is effective for translating conceptual corrections of humans to non-extrapolating training examples such that the learner's reasoning is pushed towards the desired behavior. In several experiments, we show that our method clearly outperforms CAIPI, a state of the art IML strategy, in terms of Predictive Performance as well as Local Explanation Quality in downstream multi-class classification tasks.
summary: Interactive Machine Learning (IML) shall enable intelligent systems to interactively learn from their end-users, and is quickly becoming more and more important. Although it puts the human in the loop, interactions are mostly performed via mutual explanations that miss contextual information. Furthermore, current model-agnostic IML strategies like CAIPI are limited to 'destructive' feedback, meaning they solely allow an expert to prevent a learner from using irrelevant features. In this work, we propose a novel interaction framework called Semantic Interactive Learning for the text domain. We frame the problem of incorporating constructive and contextual feedback into the learner as a task to find an architecture that (a) enables more semantic alignment between humans and machines and (b) at the same time helps to maintain statistical characteristics of the input domain when generating user-defined counterexamples based on meaningful corrections. Therefore, we introduce a technique called SemanticPush that is effective for translating conceptual corrections of humans to non-extrapolating training examples such that the learner's reasoning is pushed towards the desired behavior. In several experiments, we show that our method clearly outperforms CAIPI, a state of the art IML strategy, in terms of Predictive Performance as well as Local Explanation Quality in downstream multi-class classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 交互式机器学习 (IML) 将使智能系统能够向最终用户交互学习，并且正迅速变得越来越重要。尽管它让人类参与其中，但交互大多是通过相互解释来进行的，而忽略了上下文信息。此外，当前与模型无关的 IML 策略（例如 CAIPI）仅限于“破坏性”反馈，这意味着它们仅允许专家阻止学习者使用不相关的特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的文本域交互框架，称为语义交互学习。我们将建设性和上下文反馈合并到学习器中的问题作为一项任务，以找到一种架构，该架构（a）能够实现人类和机器之间更多的语义对齐，（b）同时在基于有意义的校正生成用户定义的反例时有助于保持输入域的统计特征。因此，我们引入了一种称为 SemanticPush 的技术，它可以有效地将人类的概念修正转化为非外推的训练示例，从而将学习者的推理推向所需的行为。在多个实验中，我们表明，在下游多类分类任务中的预测性能和局部解释质量方面，我们的方法明显优于 CAIPI（一种最先进的 IML 策略）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SemanticPush的新框架，用于文本分类中的语义交互学习，通过构造性反馈改进模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式机器学习方法（如CAIPI）仅支持破坏性反馈，无法有效利用上下文信息进行构造性修正，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 设计SemanticPush技术，将人类概念性修正转化为非外推训练样本，通过语义对齐优化模型推理过程。
AI.result: 在多分类任务中，该方法在预测性能和局部解释质量上均显著优于CAIPI等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义交互学习框架能有效整合上下文构造性反馈，提升文本分类模型的可解释性与准确性。

authors_text: Chuyi Li,Lulu Li,Hongliang Jiang,Kaiheng Weng,Yifei Geng,Liang Li,Zaidan Ke,Qingyuan Li,Meng Cheng,Weiqiang Nie,Yiduo Li,Bo Zhang,Yufei Liang,Linyuan Zhou,Xiaoming Xu,Xiangxiang Chu,Xiaoming Wei,Xiaolin Wei
title: YOLOv6: A Single-Stage Object Detection Framework for Industrial Applications
title_zh: YOLOv6：工业应用的单级目标检测框架
abstract: For years, the YOLO series has been the de facto industry-level standard for efficient object detection. The YOLO community has prospered overwhelmingly to enrich its use in a multitude of hardware platforms and abundant scenarios. In this technical report, we strive to push its limits to the next level, stepping forward with an unwavering mindset for industry application. Considering the diverse requirements for speed and accuracy in the real environment, we extensively examine the up-to-date object detection advancements either from industry or academia. Specifically, we heavily assimilate ideas from recent network design, training strategies, testing techniques, quantization, and optimization methods. On top of this, we integrate our thoughts and practice to build a suite of deployment-ready networks at various scales to accommodate diversified use cases. With the generous permission of YOLO authors, we name it YOLOv6. We also express our warm welcome to users and contributors for further enhancement. For a glimpse of performance, our YOLOv6-N hits 35.9% AP on the COCO dataset at a throughput of 1234 FPS on an NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPU. YOLOv6-S strikes 43.5% AP at 495 FPS, outperforming other mainstream detectors at the same scale~(YOLOv5-S, YOLOX-S, and PPYOLOE-S). Our quantized version of YOLOv6-S even brings a new state-of-the-art 43.3% AP at 869 FPS. Furthermore, YOLOv6-M/L also achieves better accuracy performance (i.e., 49.5%/52.3%) than other detectors with a similar inference speed. We carefully conducted experiments to validate the effectiveness of each component. Our code is made available at https://github.com/meituan/YOLOv6.
summary: For years, the YOLO series has been the de facto industry-level standard for efficient object detection. The YOLO community has prospered overwhelmingly to enrich its use in a multitude of hardware platforms and abundant scenarios. In this technical report, we strive to push its limits to the next level, stepping forward with an unwavering mindset for industry application. Considering the diverse requirements for speed and accuracy in the real environment, we extensively examine the up-to-date object detection advancements either from industry or academia. Specifically, we heavily assimilate ideas from recent network design, training strategies, testing techniques, quantization, and optimization methods. On top of this, we integrate our thoughts and practice to build a suite of deployment-ready networks at various scales to accommodate diversified use cases. With the generous permission of YOLO authors, we name it YOLOv6. We also express our warm welcome to users and contributors for further enhancement. For a glimpse of performance, our YOLOv6-N hits 35.9% AP on the COCO dataset at a throughput of 1234 FPS on an NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPU. YOLOv6-S strikes 43.5% AP at 495 FPS, outperforming other mainstream detectors at the same scale~(YOLOv5-S, YOLOX-S, and PPYOLOE-S). Our quantized version of YOLOv6-S even brings a new state-of-the-art 43.3% AP at 869 FPS. Furthermore, YOLOv6-M/L also achieves better accuracy performance (i.e., 49.5%/52.3%) than other detectors with a similar inference speed. We carefully conducted experiments to validate the effectiveness of each component. Our code is made available at https://github.com/meituan/YOLOv6.
abstract_zh: 多年来，YOLO 系列一直是高效物体检测事实上的行业级标准。 YOLO社区蓬勃发展，丰富了其在众多硬件平台和丰富场景中的应用。在这份技术报告中，我们力求将其极限推向新的高度，以坚定不移的行业应用心态向前迈进。考虑到真实环境中对速度和准确性的不同要求，我们广泛研究了工业界或学术界的最新物体检测进展。具体来说，我们大量吸收了最近的网络设计、训练策略、测试技术、量化和优化方法的思想。在此基础上，我们整合思想和实践，构建一套不同规模的可部署网络，以适应多样化的用例。在 YOLO 作者的慷慨许可下，我们将其命名为 YOLOv6。我们还热烈欢迎用户和贡献者进一步增强。为了了解性能，我们的 YOLOv6-N 在 NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPU 上以 1234 FPS 的吞吐量在 COCO 数据集上达到了 35.9% AP。 YOLOv6-S 在 495 FPS 下达到 43.5% AP，优于同规模的其他主流检测器~（YOLOv5-S、YOLOX-S 和 PPYOLOE-S）。我们的量化版本 YOLOv6-S 甚至在 869 FPS 下带来了最先进的 43.3% AP。此外，与推理速度相似的其他检测器相比，YOLOv6-M/L 还实现了更好的准确率性能（即 49.5%/52.3%）。我们仔细进行了实验来验证每个组件的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/meituan/YOLOv6 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOLOv6目标检测框架，旨在通过优化网络设计和训练策略，满足工业场景下对速度与精度的多样化需求。
AI.motivation: YOLO系列虽为行业标准，但实际应用中仍需进一步平衡速度与精度，尤其在工业场景中需适配不同硬件平台和复杂环境。
AI.method: 融合最新网络架构、训练策略、量化技术及优化方法，构建多尺度部署模型，并通过实验验证各组件有效性。
AI.result: YOLOv6-N在Tesla T4上达1234 FPS且AP为35.9%，YOLOv6-S以495 FPS实现43.5% AP，量化版达869 FPS且AP为43.3%，优于同类模型。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv6在保持高效推理速度的同时提升检测精度，为工业应用提供灵活部署方案，代码已开源供进一步优化。

motivation: YOLO系列虽为行业标准，但实际应用中仍需进一步平衡速度与精度，尤其在工业场景中需适配不同硬件平台和复杂环境。
method: 融合最新网络架构、训练策略、量化技术及优化方法，构建多尺度部署模型，并通过实验验证各组件有效性。
result: YOLOv6-N在Tesla T4上达1234 FPS且AP为35.9%，YOLOv6-S以495 FPS实现43.5% AP，量化版达869 FPS且AP为43.3%，优于同类模型。
conclusion: YOLOv6在保持高效推理速度的同时提升检测精度，为工业应用提供灵活部署方案，代码已开源供进一步优化。
search_text: YOLOv6: A Single-Stage Object Detection Framework for Industrial Applications YOLOv6：工业应用的单级目标检测框架 For years, the YOLO series has been the de facto industry-level standard for efficient object detection. The YOLO community has prospered overwhelmingly to enrich its use in a multitude of hardware platforms and abundant scenarios. In this technical report, we strive to push its limits to the next level, stepping forward with an unwavering mindset for industry application. Considering the diverse requirements for speed and accuracy in the real environment, we extensively examine the up-to-date object detection advancements either from industry or academia. Specifically, we heavily assimilate ideas from recent network design, training strategies, testing techniques, quantization, and optimization methods. On top of this, we integrate our thoughts and practice to build a suite of deployment-ready networks at various scales to accommodate diversified use cases. With the generous permission of YOLO authors, we name it YOLOv6. We also express our warm welcome to users and contributors for further enhancement. For a glimpse of performance, our YOLOv6-N hits 35.9% AP on the COCO dataset at a throughput of 1234 FPS on an NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPU. YOLOv6-S strikes 43.5% AP at 495 FPS, outperforming other mainstream detectors at the same scale~(YOLOv5-S, YOLOX-S, and PPYOLOE-S). Our quantized version of YOLOv6-S even brings a new state-of-the-art 43.3% AP at 869 FPS. Furthermore, YOLOv6-M/L also achieves better accuracy performance (i.e., 49.5%/52.3%) than other detectors with a similar inference speed. We carefully conducted experiments to validate the effectiveness of each component. Our code is made available at https://github.com/meituan/YOLOv6. 多年来，YOLO 系列一直是高效物体检测事实上的行业级标准。 YOLO社区蓬勃发展，丰富了其在众多硬件平台和丰富场景中的应用。在这份技术报告中，我们力求将其极限推向新的高度，以坚定不移的行业应用心态向前迈进。考虑到真实环境中对速度和准确性的不同要求，我们广泛研究了工业界或学术界的最新物体检测进展。具体来说，我们大量吸收了最近的网络设计、训练策略、测试技术、量化和优化方法的思想。在此基础上，我们整合思想和实践，构建一套不同规模的可部署网络，以适应多样化的用例。在 YOLO 作者的慷慨许可下，我们将其命名为 YOLOv6。我们还热烈欢迎用户和贡献者进一步增强。为了了解性能，我们的 YOLOv6-N 在 NVIDIA Tesla T4 GPU 上以 1234 FPS 的吞吐量在 COCO 数据集上达到了 35.9% AP。 YOLOv6-S 在 495 FPS 下达到 43.5% AP，优于同规模的其他主流检测器~（YOLOv5-S、YOLOX-S 和 PPYOLOE-S）。我们的量化版本 YOLOv6-S 甚至在 869 FPS 下带来了最先进的 43.3% AP。此外，与推理速度相似的其他检测器相比，YOLOv6-M/L 还实现了更好的准确率性能（即 49.5%/52.3%）。我们仔细进行了实验来验证每个组件的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/meituan/YOLOv6 获取。 本文提出YOLOv6目标检测框架，旨在通过优化网络设计和训练策略，满足工业场景下对速度与精度的多样化需求。 Chuyi Li,Lulu Li,Hongliang Jiang,Kaiheng Weng,Yifei Geng,Liang Li,Zaidan Ke,Qingyuan Li,Meng Cheng,Weiqiang Nie,Yiduo Li,Bo Zhang,Yufei Liang,Linyuan Zhou,Xiaoming Xu,Xiangxiang Chu,Xiaoming Wei,Xiaolin Wei cs.CV

title: ExpTrialMng: A Universal Experiment Trial Manager for AR/VR/MR Experiments based on Unity
title_zh: ExpTrialMng：基于Unity的AR/VR/MR实验通用实验试验管理器
abstract: Based on the improvement of recent virtual and augmented reality (VR and AR) Head Mounted Display (HMD), there have been attempts to adopt VR and AR in various fields. Since VR and AR could provide more immersive experimental environments and stimuli than 2D settings in a cost-efficient way, psychological and cognitive researchers are particularly interested in using these platforms. However, there is still an entry barrier for researchers who are not familiar with Unity programming, and current VR/AR HMDs could also cause unexpected errors during the experiment. Therefore, we developed a Unity library that can be adopted in various experiments universally and assist researchers in developing their own. Our library provides functions related to trial assignment and results saving. That way, researchers can easily implement the essential functions of their psychological experiments. We also made a function that enables proceeding with the experiment from a specific trial point to handle unexpected errors caused by HMD tracking loss issues during the experiment. We expect our library could invite researchers from various disciplines and help them acquire valuable insights in VR/AR environments.
summary: Based on the improvement of recent virtual and augmented reality (VR and AR) Head Mounted Display (HMD), there have been attempts to adopt VR and AR in various fields. Since VR and AR could provide more immersive experimental environments and stimuli than 2D settings in a cost-efficient way, psychological and cognitive researchers are particularly interested in using these platforms. However, there is still an entry barrier for researchers who are not familiar with Unity programming, and current VR/AR HMDs could also cause unexpected errors during the experiment. Therefore, we developed a Unity library that can be adopted in various experiments universally and assist researchers in developing their own. Our library provides functions related to trial assignment and results saving. That way, researchers can easily implement the essential functions of their psychological experiments. We also made a function that enables proceeding with the experiment from a specific trial point to handle unexpected errors caused by HMD tracking loss issues during the experiment. We expect our library could invite researchers from various disciplines and help them acquire valuable insights in VR/AR environments.
abstract_zh: 基于最近虚拟现实和增强现实（VR和AR）头戴式显示器（HMD）的改进，人们已经尝试在各个领域采用VR和AR。由于 VR 和 AR 可以以经济高效的方式提供比 2D 设置更身临其境的实验环境和刺激，因此心理和认知研究人员对使用这些平台特别感兴趣。然而，对于不熟悉Unity编程的研究人员来说仍然存在入门障碍，并且当前的VR/AR头显也可能在实验过程中导致意外错误。因此，我们开发了一个可以在各种实验中普遍采用的Unity库，并帮助研究人员开发自己的库。我们的库提供与试验分配和结果保存相关的功能。这样，研究人员就可以轻松实现心理实验的基本功能。我们还制作了一个功能，可以从特定的试验点继续进行实验，以处理实验过程中因 HMD 跟踪丢失问题而导致的意外错误。我们希望我们的图书馆能够邀请来自不同学科的研究人员，帮助他们获得有关 VR/AR 环境的宝贵见解。

AI.tldr: 开发基于Unity的通用实验试用管理库ExpTrialMng，用于简化AR/VR/MR实验的开发流程。
AI.motivation: VR/AR设备虽提供沉浸式实验环境，但研究人员面临Unity编程门槛及HMD设备意外错误的挑战。
AI.method: 构建支持试用分配、结果保存及断点续试功能的Unity库，降低实验开发复杂度。
AI.result: 实现跨学科研究人员快速部署实验功能，提升VR/AR实验的稳定性和可重复性。
AI.conclusion: ExpTrialMng为多领域研究者提供高效工具，促进VR/AR环境下的科研创新。

title: Risk of Bias in Chest Radiography Deep Learning Foundation Models
title_zh: 胸部放射线摄影深度学习基础模型的偏差风险
comment: Radiology: Artificial Intelligence (2023). Code available under https://github.com/biomedia-mira/cxr-foundation-bias/
comments: Radiology: Artificial Intelligence (2023). Code available under https://github.com/biomedia-mira/cxr-foundation-bias/
abstract: Purpose: To analyze a recently published chest radiography foundation model for the presence of biases that could lead to subgroup performance disparities across biological sex and race. Materials and Methods: This retrospective study used 127,118 chest radiographs from 42,884 patients (mean age, 63 [SD] 17 years; 23,623 male, 19,261 female) from the CheXpert dataset collected between October 2002 and July 2017. To determine the presence of bias in features generated by a chest radiography foundation model and baseline deep learning model, dimensionality reduction methods together with two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov tests were used to detect distribution shifts across sex and race. A comprehensive disease detection performance analysis was then performed to associate any biases in the features to specific disparities in classification performance across patient subgroups. Results: Ten out of twelve pairwise comparisons across biological sex and race showed statistically significant differences in the studied foundation model, compared with four significant tests in the baseline model. Significant differences were found between male and female (P < .001) and Asian and Black patients (P < .001) in the feature projections that primarily capture disease. Compared with average model performance across all subgroups, classification performance on the 'no finding' label dropped between 6.8% and 7.8% for female patients, and performance in detecting 'pleural effusion' dropped between 10.7% and 11.6% for Black patients. Conclusion: The studied chest radiography foundation model demonstrated racial and sex-related bias leading to disparate performance across patient subgroups and may be unsafe for clinical applications.

abstract_zh: 目的：分析最近发布的胸部放射学基础模型是否存在可能导致跨生物性别和种族的亚组表现差异的偏差。材料和方法：这项回顾性研究使用了 2002 年 10 月至 2017 年 7 月期间收集的 CheXpert 数据集中的 42,884 名患者（平均年龄，63 [SD]17 岁；23,623 名男性，19,261 名女性）的 127,118 张胸部 X 光照片。为了确定胸部 X 光基础模型和基线深度学习模型生成的特征是否存在偏差，降维方法与使用两个样本柯尔莫哥洛夫-斯米尔诺夫检验来检测性别和种族之间的分布变化。然后进行全面的疾病检测性能分析，将特征中的任何偏差与患者亚组之间分类性能的特定差异相关联。结果：与基线模型中的四项显着测试相比，生物性别和种族的十二对配对比较中的十项显示出所研究的基础模型具有统计显着性差异。在主要捕捉疾病的特征预测中，男性和女性 (P < .001) 以及亚洲和黑人患者 (P < .001) 之间存在显着差异。与所有亚组的平均模型性能相比，女性患者的“未发现”标签分类性能下降了 6.8% 至 7.8%，黑人患者检测“胸腔积液”的性能下降了 10.7% 至 11.6%。结论：所研究的胸部放射学基础模型表明，种族和性别相关的偏见导致患者亚组之间的表现不同，并且对于临床应用可能不安全。

AI.tldr: 分析胸部X光深度学习基础模型是否存在性别和种族偏见导致的子群性能差异
AI.motivation: 现有医疗AI模型可能存在未被察觉的群体偏见，需评估其在不同生物性别和种族间的公平性以确保临床安全性
AI.method: 使用CheXpert数据集的12.7万张胸片，通过降维方法结合Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验检测特征分布偏移，并进行疾病检测性能对比分析
AI.result: 基础模型在性别和种族间存在显著特征分布差异（P<0.001），女性'无发现'诊断准确率下降6.8-7.8%，黑人患者'胸腔积液'检测准确率下降10.7-11.6%
AI.conclusion: 该模型存在显著的性别和种族相关偏见，可能导致临床应用中的诊断不公，需改进模型公平性
