Conclusion: The studied chest radiography foundation model demonstrated racial and sex-related bias leading to disparate performance across patient subgroups and may be unsafe for clinical applications. 目的：分析最近发布的胸部放射学基础模型是否存在可能导致跨生物性别和种族的亚组表现差异的偏差。材料和方法：这项回顾性研究使用了 2002 年 10 月至 2017 年 7 月期间收集的 CheXpert 数据集中的 42,884 名患者（平均年龄，63 [SD]17 岁；23,623 名男性，19,261 名女性）的 127,118 张胸部 X 光照片。为了确定胸部 X 光基础模型和基线深度学习模型生成的特征是否存在偏差，降维方法与使用两个样本柯尔莫哥洛夫-斯米尔诺夫检验来检测性别和种族之间的分布变化。然后进行全面的疾病检测性能分析，将特征中的任何偏差与患者亚组之间分类性能的特定差异相关联。结果：与基线模型中的四项显着测试相比，生物性别和种族的十二对配对比较中的十项显示出所研究的基础模型具有统计显着性差异。在主要捕捉疾病的特征预测中，男性和女性 (P < .001) 以及亚洲和黑人患者 (P < .001) 之间存在显着差异。与所有亚组的平均模型性能相比，女性患者的“未发现”标签分类性能下降了 6.8% 至 7.8%，黑人患者检测“胸腔积液”的性能下降了 10.7% 至 11.6%。结论：所研究的胸部放射学基础模型表明，种族和性别相关的偏见导致患者亚组之间的表现不同，并且对于临床应用可能不安全。 分析胸部X光深度学习基础模型是否存在性别和种族偏见导致的子群性能差异 Ben Glocker,Charles Jones,Melanie Roschewitz,Stefan Winzeck cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.CY,eess.IV

title: Difficulty-Net: Learning to Predict Difficulty for Long-Tailed Recognition
title_zh: Difficulty-Net：学习预测长尾识别的难度
abstract: Long-tailed datasets, where head classes comprise much more training samples than tail classes, cause recognition models to get biased towards the head classes. Weighted loss is one of the most popular ways of mitigating this issue, and a recent work has suggested that class-difficulty might be a better clue than conventionally used class-frequency to decide the distribution of weights. A heuristic formulation was used in the previous work for quantifying the difficulty, but we empirically find that the optimal formulation varies depending on the characteristics of datasets. Therefore, we propose Difficulty-Net, which learns to predict the difficulty of classes using the model's performance in a meta-learning framework. To make it learn reasonable difficulty of a class within the context of other classes, we newly introduce two key concepts, namely the relative difficulty and the driver loss. The former helps Difficulty-Net take other classes into account when calculating difficulty of a class, while the latter is indispensable for guiding the learning to a meaningful direction. Extensive experiments on popular long-tailed datasets demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method, and it achieved state-of-the-art performance on multiple long-tailed datasets.
summary: Long-tailed datasets, where head classes comprise much more training samples than tail classes, cause recognition models to get biased towards the head classes. Weighted loss is one of the most popular ways of mitigating this issue, and a recent work has suggested that class-difficulty might be a better clue than conventionally used class-frequency to decide the distribution of weights. A heuristic formulation was used in the previous work for quantifying the difficulty, but we empirically find that the optimal formulation varies depending on the characteristics of datasets. Therefore, we propose Difficulty-Net, which learns to predict the difficulty of classes using the model's performance in a meta-learning framework. To make it learn reasonable difficulty of a class within the context of other classes, we newly introduce two key concepts, namely the relative difficulty and the driver loss. The former helps Difficulty-Net take other classes into account when calculating difficulty of a class, while the latter is indispensable for guiding the learning to a meaningful direction. Extensive experiments on popular long-tailed datasets demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method, and it achieved state-of-the-art performance on multiple long-tailed datasets.
abstract_zh: 长尾数据集（其中头类包含比尾类更多的训练样本）会导致识别模型偏向头类。加权损失是缓解这个问题的最流行的方法之一，最近的一项研究表明，与传统使用的类别频率来决定权重分布相比，类别难度可能是更好的线索。之前的工作使用启发式公式来量化难度，但我们凭经验发现最佳公式根据数据集的特征而变化。因此，我们提出了 Difficulty-Net，它在元学习框架中学习使用模型的性能来预测课程的难度。为了使其在其他类别的背景下学习某个类别的合理难度，我们新引入了两个关键概念，即相对难度和驾驶员损失。前者帮助Difficulty-Net在计算某个类别的难度时考虑到其他类别，而后者对于引导学习向有意义的方向不可或缺。在流行的长尾数据集上进行的大量实验证明了该方法的有效性，并且在多个长尾数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Difficulty-Net，通过元学习框架动态预测类别难度，解决长尾识别中模型偏向头部类别的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统加权损失方法依赖类别频率分配权重，但启发式难度量化方法在不同数据集上的效果不稳定，需更自适应的难度预测机制。
AI.method: 设计元学习框架训练Difficulty-Net预测类别难度，引入相对难度（考虑其他类别影响）和驱动损失（引导学习方向）两个关键概念。
AI.result: 在多个长尾数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了动态难度预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过相对难度和驱动损失的创新设计，Difficulty-Net实现了更合理的权重分配，显著提升了长尾识别效果。

authors_text: Runmin Cong,Qi Qin,Chen Zhang,Qiuping Jiang,Shiqi Wang,Yao Zhao,Sam Kwong
title: A Weakly Supervised Learning Framework for Salient Object Detection via Hybrid Labels
title_zh: 通过混合标签进行显着目标检测的弱监督学习框架
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2022
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2022
abstract: Fully-supervised salient object detection (SOD) methods have made great progress, but such methods often rely on a large number of pixel-level annotations, which are time-consuming and labour-intensive. In this paper, we focus on a new weakly-supervised SOD task under hybrid labels, where the supervision labels include a large number of coarse labels generated by the traditional unsupervised method and a small number of real labels. To address the issues of label noise and quantity imbalance in this task, we design a new pipeline framework with three sophisticated training strategies. In terms of model framework, we decouple the task into label refinement sub-task and salient object detection sub-task, which cooperate with each other and train alternately. Specifically, the R-Net is designed as a two-stream encoder-decoder model equipped with Blender with Guidance and Aggregation Mechanisms (BGA), aiming to rectify the coarse labels for more reliable pseudo-labels, while the S-Net is a replaceable SOD network supervised by the pseudo labels generated by the current R-Net. Note that, we only need to use the trained S-Net for testing. Moreover, in order to guarantee the effectiveness and efficiency of network training, we design three training strategies, including alternate iteration mechanism, group-wise incremental mechanism, and credibility verification mechanism. Experiments on five SOD benchmarks show that our method achieves competitive performance against weakly-supervised/unsupervised methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Fully-supervised salient object detection (SOD) methods have made great progress, but such methods often rely on a large number of pixel-level annotations, which are time-consuming and labour-intensive. In this paper, we focus on a new weakly-supervised SOD task under hybrid labels, where the supervision labels include a large number of coarse labels generated by the traditional unsupervised method and a small number of real labels. To address the issues of label noise and quantity imbalance in this task, we design a new pipeline framework with three sophisticated training strategies. In terms of model framework, we decouple the task into label refinement sub-task and salient object detection sub-task, which cooperate with each other and train alternately. Specifically, the R-Net is designed as a two-stream encoder-decoder model equipped with Blender with Guidance and Aggregation Mechanisms (BGA), aiming to rectify the coarse labels for more reliable pseudo-labels, while the S-Net is a replaceable SOD network supervised by the pseudo labels generated by the current R-Net. Note that, we only need to use the trained S-Net for testing. Moreover, in order to guarantee the effectiveness and efficiency of network training, we design three training strategies, including alternate iteration mechanism, group-wise incremental mechanism, and credibility verification mechanism. Experiments on five SOD benchmarks show that our method achieves competitive performance against weakly-supervised/unsupervised methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 全监督显着目标检测（SOD）方法取得了长足的进步，但此类方法往往依赖于大量的像素级注释，耗时耗力。在本文中，我们关注混合标签下的一种新的弱监督SOD任务，其中监督标签包括传统无监督方法生成的大量粗标签和少量真实标签。为了解决此任务中的标签噪声和数量不平衡问题，我们设计了一个具有三种复杂训练策略的新管道框架。在模型框架方面，我们将任务解耦为标签细化子任务和显着目标检测子任务，它们相互配合，交替训练。具体来说，R-Net 被设计为配备有具有引导和聚合机制（BGA）的 Blender 的双流编码器-解码器模型，旨在纠正粗标签以获得更可靠的伪标签，而 S-Net 是一个可替换的 SOD 网络，由当前 R-Net 生成的伪标签监督。请注意，我们只需要使用训练好的 S-Net 进行测试。此外，为了保证网络训练的有效性和效率，我们设计了三种训练策略，包括交替迭代机制、分组增量机制和可信度验证机制。五个 SOD 基准的实验表明，我们的方法在定性和定量上都实现了与弱监督/无监督方法相比的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合标签的弱监督显著性目标检测框架，通过结合大量粗略标签与少量真实标签解决标注成本高和标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 全监督显著性检测方法依赖耗时的像素级标注，而现有弱监督方法在标签噪声和数量不平衡问题上表现不足。
AI.method: 设计包含R-Net和S-Net的双子任务框架，R-Net通过BGA机制生成伪标签，S-Net基于伪标签进行检测训练，并采用交替迭代、分组增量和可信度验证三重策略优化训练过程。
AI.result: 在五个SOD基准数据集上，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有弱监督/无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合标签框架有效缓解了标签噪声和数量不平衡问题，为弱监督显著性检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hui Lin,Zhiheng Ma,Xiaopeng Hong,Yaowei Wang,Zhou Su
title: Semi-supervised Crowd Counting via Density Agency
title_zh: 通过密度机构进行半监督人群计数
comment: This is the accepted version of the Paper & Supp to appear in ACM MM 2022. Please cite the final published version. Code is available at https://github.com/LoraLinH/Semi-supervised-Crowd-Counting-via-Density-Agency
comments: This is the accepted version of the Paper & Supp to appear in ACM MM 2022. Please cite the final published version. Code is available at https://github.com/LoraLinH/Semi-supervised-Crowd-Counting-via-Density-Agency
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new agency-guided semi-supervised counting approach. First, we build a learnable auxiliary structure, namely the density agency to bring the recognized foreground regional features close to corresponding density sub-classes (agents) and push away background ones. Second, we propose a density-guided contrastive learning loss to consolidate the backbone feature extractor. Third, we build a regression head by using a transformer structure to refine the foreground features further. Finally, an efficient noise depression loss is provided to minimize the negative influence of annotation noises. Extensive experiments on four challenging crowd counting datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance to the state-of-the-art semi-supervised counting methods by a large margin. Code is available.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new agency-guided semi-supervised counting approach. First, we build a learnable auxiliary structure, namely the density agency to bring the recognized foreground regional features close to corresponding density sub-classes (agents) and push away background ones. Second, we propose a density-guided contrastive learning loss to consolidate the backbone feature extractor. Third, we build a regression head by using a transformer structure to refine the foreground features further. Finally, an efficient noise depression loss is provided to minimize the negative influence of annotation noises. Extensive experiments on four challenging crowd counting datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance to the state-of-the-art semi-supervised counting methods by a large margin. Code is available.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的机构引导的半监督计数方法。首先，我们构建一个可学习的辅助结构，即密度代理，使识别的前景区域特征接近相应的密度子类（代理）并推开背景区域特征。其次，我们提出了一种密度引导的对比学习损失来巩固骨干特征提取器。第三，我们通过使用变压器结构构建回归头来进一步细化前景特征。最后，提供有效的噪声抑制损失以最小化注释噪声的负面影响。对四个具有挑战性的人群计数数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在很大程度上优于最先进的半监督计数方法。代码可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密度代理的半监督人群计数方法，通过可学习结构和对比学习提升计数准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督人群计数方法在处理标注噪声和特征区分度方面存在不足，需提升模型鲁棒性和计数精度。
AI.method: 构建密度代理结构区分前景与背景特征，设计对比学习损失优化主干网络，并采用Transformer回归头与噪声抑制损失联合训练。
AI.result: 在四个具有挑战性的数据集上显著优于现有半监督方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过密度代理机制有效提升半监督场景下人群计数性能，适用于实际复杂环境。

title: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Strategy for UAV Autonomous Landing on a Platform
title_zh: 无人机平台自主着陆的深度强化学习策略
abstract: With the development of industry, drones are appearing in various field. In recent years, deep reinforcement learning has made impressive gains in games, and we are committed to applying deep reinforcement learning algorithms to the field of robotics, moving reinforcement learning algorithms from game scenarios to real-world application scenarios. We are inspired by the LunarLander of OpenAI Gym, we decided to make a bold attempt in the field of reinforcement learning to control drones. At present, there is still a lack of work applying reinforcement learning algorithms to robot control, the physical simulation platform related to robot control is only suitable for the verification of classical algorithms, and is not suitable for accessing reinforcement learning algorithms for the training. In this paper, we will face this problem, bridging the gap between physical simulation platforms and intelligent agent, connecting intelligent agents to a physical simulation platform, allowing agents to learn and complete drone flight tasks in a simulator that approximates the real world. We proposed a reinforcement learning framework based on Gazebo that is a kind of physical simulation platform (ROS-RL), and used three continuous action space reinforcement learning algorithms in the framework to dealing with the problem of autonomous landing of drones. Experiments show the effectiveness of the algorithm, the task of autonomous landing of drones based on reinforcement learning achieved full success.
summary: With the development of industry, drones are appearing in various field. In recent years, deep reinforcement learning has made impressive gains in games, and we are committed to applying deep reinforcement learning algorithms to the field of robotics, moving reinforcement learning algorithms from game scenarios to real-world application scenarios. We are inspired by the LunarLander of OpenAI Gym, we decided to make a bold attempt in the field of reinforcement learning to control drones. At present, there is still a lack of work applying reinforcement learning algorithms to robot control, the physical simulation platform related to robot control is only suitable for the verification of classical algorithms, and is not suitable for accessing reinforcement learning algorithms for the training. In this paper, we will face this problem, bridging the gap between physical simulation platforms and intelligent agent, connecting intelligent agents to a physical simulation platform, allowing agents to learn and complete drone flight tasks in a simulator that approximates the real world. We proposed a reinforcement learning framework based on Gazebo that is a kind of physical simulation platform (ROS-RL), and used three continuous action space reinforcement learning algorithms in the framework to dealing with the problem of autonomous landing of drones. Experiments show the effectiveness of the algorithm, the task of autonomous landing of drones based on reinforcement learning achieved full success.
abstract_zh: 随着工业的发展，无人机出现在各个领域。近年来，深度强化学习在游戏领域取得了令人瞩目的成绩，我们致力于将深度强化学习算法应用到机器人领域，将强化学习算法从游戏场景走向现实应用场景。我们受到OpenAI Gym的LunarLander的启发，决定在强化学习控制无人机领域进行大胆的尝试。目前，将强化学习算法应用到机器人控制中还缺乏工作，机器人控制相关的物理仿真平台仅适合经典算法的验证，并不适合接入强化学习算法进行训练。在本文中，我们将面对这个问题，弥合物理模拟平台和智能代理之间的差距，将智能代理连接到物理模拟平台，让代理在接近现实世界的模拟器中学习并完成无人机飞行任务。我们提出了一种基于Gazebo物理仿真平台（ROS-RL）的强化学习框架，并在框架中使用了三种连续动作空间强化学习算法来处理无人机自主着陆问题。实验证明了算法的有效性，基于强化学习的无人机自主着陆任务取得了圆满成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Gazebo物理仿真平台的深度强化学习框架（ROS-RL），用于解决无人机自主着陆平台的任务。
AI.motivation: 现有物理仿真平台难以支持强化学习算法训练，而无人机控制领域缺乏相关研究，需将强化学习从游戏场景迁移至真实机器人应用。
AI.method: 构建ROS-RL框架连接智能体与Gazebo仿真环境，采用三种连续动作空间的强化学习算法实现无人机自主着陆控制。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法有效性，基于强化学习的无人机自主着陆任务取得完全成功。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了物理仿真平台与智能体间的鸿沟，证明了强化学习在无人机真实场景控制中的可行性。

authors_text: Fu-En Wang,Yu-Hsuan Yeh,Yi-Hsuan Tsai,Wei-Chen Chiu,Min Sun
title: BiFuse++: Self-supervised and Efficient Bi-projection Fusion for 360 Depth Estimation
title_zh: BiFuse++：用于 360 度深度估计的自监督高效双投影融合
abstract: Due to the rise of spherical cameras, monocular 360 depth estimation becomes an important technique for many applications (e.g., autonomous systems). Thus, state-of-the-art frameworks for monocular 360 depth estimation such as bi-projection fusion in BiFuse are proposed. To train such a framework, a large number of panoramas along with the corresponding depth ground truths captured by laser sensors are required, which highly increases the cost of data collection. Moreover, since such a data collection procedure is time-consuming, the scalability of extending these methods to different scenes becomes a challenge. To this end, self-training a network for monocular depth estimation from 360 videos is one way to alleviate this issue. However, there are no existing frameworks that incorporate bi-projection fusion into the self-training scheme, which highly limits the self-supervised performance since bi-projection fusion can leverage information from different projection types. In this paper, we propose BiFuse++ to explore the combination of bi-projection fusion and the self-training scenario. To be specific, we propose a new fusion module and Contrast-Aware Photometric Loss to improve the performance of BiFuse and increase the stability of self-training on real-world videos. We conduct both supervised and self-supervised experiments on benchmark datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Due to the rise of spherical cameras, monocular 360 depth estimation becomes an important technique for many applications (e.g., autonomous systems). Thus, state-of-the-art frameworks for monocular 360 depth estimation such as bi-projection fusion in BiFuse are proposed. To train such a framework, a large number of panoramas along with the corresponding depth ground truths captured by laser sensors are required, which highly increases the cost of data collection. Moreover, since such a data collection procedure is time-consuming, the scalability of extending these methods to different scenes becomes a challenge. To this end, self-training a network for monocular depth estimation from 360 videos is one way to alleviate this issue. However, there are no existing frameworks that incorporate bi-projection fusion into the self-training scheme, which highly limits the self-supervised performance since bi-projection fusion can leverage information from different projection types. In this paper, we propose BiFuse++ to explore the combination of bi-projection fusion and the self-training scenario. To be specific, we propose a new fusion module and Contrast-Aware Photometric Loss to improve the performance of BiFuse and increase the stability of self-training on real-world videos. We conduct both supervised and self-supervised experiments on benchmark datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 由于球形相机的兴起，单目 360 度深度估计成为许多应用（例如自主系统）的重要技术。因此，提出了用于单目 360 度深度估计的最先进框架，例如 BiFuse 中的双投影融合。为了训练这样的框架，需要大量的全景图以及激光传感器捕获的相应深度地面实况，这大大增加了数据收集的成本。此外，由于这种数据收集过程非常耗时，因此将这些方法扩展到不同场景的可扩展性成为一个挑战。为此，自训练网络以根据 360 度视频进行单目深度估计是缓解此问题的一种方法。然而，目前还没有将双投影融合纳入自训练方案的框架，这极大地限制了自监督性能，因为双投影融合可以利用来自不同投影类型的信息。在本文中，我们提出 BiFuse++ 来探索双投影融合与自训练场景的结合。具体来说，我们提出了一种新的融合模块和对比度感知光度损失来提高 BiFuse 的性能并提高在真实视频上自我训练的稳定性。我们对基准数据集进行监督和自监督实验，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiFuse++方法，结合自监督学习与双投影融合技术，提升360度单目深度估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于双投影融合的360深度估计方法依赖大量标注数据，数据采集成本高且难以扩展至新场景，而自监督学习尚未有效结合双投影融合技术。
AI.method: 设计新型融合模块与对比感知光度损失函数，将双投影融合机制引入自训练框架，提升模型在真实视频中的自监督学习稳定性与精度。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上同时实现监督学习与自监督学习的最先进性能，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: BiFuse++通过融合双投影机制与自训练策略，显著降低了对标注数据的依赖，为360深度估计提供了高效可扩展的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出BiFuse++方法，结合自监督学习与双投影融合技术，提升360度单目深度估计的性能。

search_text: BiFuse++: Self-supervised and Efficient Bi-projection Fusion for 360 Depth Estimation BiFuse++：用于 360 度深度估计的自监督高效双投影融合 Due to the rise of spherical cameras, monocular 360 depth estimation becomes an important technique for many applications (e.g., autonomous systems). Thus, state-of-the-art frameworks for monocular 360 depth estimation such as bi-projection fusion in BiFuse are proposed. To train such a framework, a large number of panoramas along with the corresponding depth ground truths captured by laser sensors are required, which highly increases the cost of data collection. Moreover, since such a data collection procedure is time-consuming, the scalability of extending these methods to different scenes becomes a challenge. To this end, self-training a network for monocular depth estimation from 360 videos is one way to alleviate this issue. However, there are no existing frameworks that incorporate bi-projection fusion into the self-training scheme, which highly limits the self-supervised performance since bi-projection fusion can leverage information from different projection types. In this paper, we propose BiFuse++ to explore the combination of bi-projection fusion and the self-training scenario. To be specific, we propose a new fusion module and Contrast-Aware Photometric Loss to improve the performance of BiFuse and increase the stability of self-training on real-world videos. We conduct both supervised and self-supervised experiments on benchmark datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performance. 由于球形相机的兴起，单目 360 度深度估计成为许多应用（例如自主系统）的重要技术。因此，提出了用于单目 360 度深度估计的最先进框架，例如 BiFuse 中的双投影融合。为了训练这样的框架，需要大量的全景图以及激光传感器捕获的相应深度地面实况，这大大增加了数据收集的成本。此外，由于这种数据收集过程非常耗时，因此将这些方法扩展到不同场景的可扩展性成为一个挑战。为此，自训练网络以根据 360 度视频进行单目深度估计是缓解此问题的一种方法。然而，目前还没有将双投影融合纳入自训练方案的框架，这极大地限制了自监督性能，因为双投影融合可以利用来自不同投影类型的信息。在本文中，我们提出 BiFuse++ 来探索双投影融合与自训练场景的结合。具体来说，我们提出了一种新的融合模块和对比度感知光度损失来提高 BiFuse 的性能并提高在真实视频上自我训练的稳定性。我们对基准数据集进行监督和自监督实验，并实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出BiFuse++方法，结合自监督学习与双投影融合技术，提升360度单目深度估计的性能。 Fu-En Wang,Yu-Hsuan Yeh,Yi-Hsuan Tsai,Wei-Chen Chiu,Min Sun cs.CV

title: Visual Transformer for Soil Classification
title_zh: 用于土壤分类的视觉变压器
comment: Presented in 2022 IEEE Students Conference on Engineering and Systems (SCES), July 01-03, 2022, Prayagraj, India
comments: Presented in 2022 IEEE Students Conference on Engineering and Systems (SCES), July 01-03, 2022, Prayagraj, India
abstract: Our food security is built on the foundation of soil. Farmers would be unable to feed us with fiber, food, and fuel if the soils were not healthy. Accurately predicting the type of soil helps in planning the usage of the soil and thus increasing productivity. This research employs state-of-the-art Visual Transformers and also compares performance with different models such as SVM, Alexnet, Resnet, and CNN. Furthermore, this study also focuses on differentiating different Visual Transformers architectures. For the classification of soil type, the dataset consists of 4 different types of soil samples such as alluvial, red, black, and clay. The Visual Transformer model outperforms other models in terms of both test and train accuracies by attaining 98.13% on training and 93.62% while testing. The performance of the Visual Transformer exceeds the performance of other models by at least 2%. Hence, the novel Visual Transformers can be used for Computer Vision tasks including Soil Classification.

abstract_zh: 我们的粮食安全是建立在土壤的基础上的。如果土壤不健康，农民将无法为我们提供纤维、食物和燃料。准确预测土壤类型有助于规划土壤的使用，从而提高生产力。这项研究采用了最先进的 Visual Transformer，并比较了 SVM、Alexnet、Resnet 和 CNN 等不同模型的性能。此外，这项研究还侧重于区分不同的 Visual Transformers 架构。对于土壤类型的分类，数据集由冲积土、红土、黑土和粘土等 4 种不同类型的土壤样本组成。 Visual Transformer 模型在测试和训练精度方面均优于其他模型，训练时达到 98.13%，测试时达到 93.62%。 Visual Transformer 的性能超过其他模型的性能至少 2%。因此，新颖的视觉变压器可用于包括土壤分类在内的计算机视觉任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用视觉Transformer模型进行土壤分类，并与传统模型进行性能比较。
AI.motivation: 土壤健康对粮食安全至关重要，准确分类土壤类型有助于提升农业规划与生产力。
AI.method: 采用视觉Transformer架构，并与SVM、AlexNet、ResNet等模型对比，使用包含4类土壤的数据集进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 视觉Transformer在训练集达到98.13%准确率，测试集达93.62%，优于其他模型至少2%。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer在土壤分类任务中表现优异，可有效应用于计算机视觉相关领域。

authors_text: Tomoki Yamagami,Etsuo Segawa,Ken'ichiro Tanaka,Takatomo Mihana,André Röhm,Ryoichi Horisaki,Makoto Naruse
title: Skeleton structure inherent in discrete-time quantum walks
title_zh: 离散时间量子行走固有的骨架结构
abstract: In this paper, we claim that a common underlying structure--a skeleton structure--is present behind discrete-time quantum walks (QWs) on a one-dimensional lattice with a homogeneous coin matrix. This skeleton structure is independent of the initial state, and partially, even of the coin matrix. This structure is best interpreted in the context of quantum-walk-replicating random walks (QWRWs), i.e., random walks that replicate the probability distribution of quantum walks, where this newly found structure acts as a simplified formula for the transition probability. Additionally, we construct a random walk whose transition probabilities are defined by the skeleton structure and demonstrate that the resultant properties of the walkers are similar to both the original QWs and QWRWs.
summary: In this paper, we claim that a common underlying structure--a skeleton structure--is present behind discrete-time quantum walks (QWs) on a one-dimensional lattice with a homogeneous coin matrix. This skeleton structure is independent of the initial state, and partially, even of the coin matrix. This structure is best interpreted in the context of quantum-walk-replicating random walks (QWRWs), i.e., random walks that replicate the probability distribution of quantum walks, where this newly found structure acts as a simplified formula for the transition probability. Additionally, we construct a random walk whose transition probabilities are defined by the skeleton structure and demonstrate that the resultant properties of the walkers are similar to both the original QWs and QWRWs.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们声称在具有同质硬币矩阵的一维晶格上的离散时间量子行走（QW）背后存在一个共同的底层结构——骨架结构。该骨架结构独立于初始状态，甚至部分独立于硬币矩阵。这种结构最好在量子行走复制随机行走（QWRW）的背景下解释，即复制量子行走概率分布的随机行走，其中这种新发现的结构充当转移概率的简化公式。此外，我们构建了一个随机游走，其转移概率由骨架结构定义，并证明游走者的最终属性与原始 QW 和 QWRW 相似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究离散时间量子行走（QWs）中存在的一种与初始状态和硬币矩阵无关的骨架结构，并通过构造随机行走验证其特性。
AI.motivation: 揭示离散时间量子行走背后的普适性结构，为量子行走与随机行走的关联性提供简化分析框架。
AI.method: 通过量子行走复制随机行走（QWRWs）的视角，分析概率分布并构建基于骨架结构的随机行走模型，对比其与原量子行走的性质。
AI.result: 发现骨架结构可作为量子行走转移概率的简化公式，并成功构造出具有类似量子行走特性的随机行走模型。
AI.conclusion: 骨架结构为理解量子行走与随机行走的内在联系提供了新视角，简化了量子行走的概率分析与建模过程。

title: Can GAN-induced Attribute Manipulations Impact Face Recognition?
title_zh: GAN 引发的属性操作会影响人脸识别吗？
abstract: Impact due to demographic factors such as age, sex, race, etc., has been studied extensively in automated face recognition systems. However, the impact of \textit{digitally modified} demographic and facial attributes on face recognition is relatively under-explored. In this work, we study the effect of attribute manipulations induced via generative adversarial networks (GANs) on face recognition performance. We conduct experiments on the CelebA dataset by intentionally modifying thirteen attributes using AttGAN and STGAN and evaluating their impact on two deep learning-based face verification methods, ArcFace and VGGFace. Our findings indicate that some attribute manipulations involving eyeglasses and digital alteration of sex cues can significantly impair face recognition by up to 73% and need further analysis.
summary: Impact due to demographic factors such as age, sex, race, etc., has been studied extensively in automated face recognition systems. However, the impact of \textit{digitally modified} demographic and facial attributes on face recognition is relatively under-explored. In this work, we study the effect of attribute manipulations induced via generative adversarial networks (GANs) on face recognition performance. We conduct experiments on the CelebA dataset by intentionally modifying thirteen attributes using AttGAN and STGAN and evaluating their impact on two deep learning-based face verification methods, ArcFace and VGGFace. Our findings indicate that some attribute manipulations involving eyeglasses and digital alteration of sex cues can significantly impair face recognition by up to 73% and need further analysis.
abstract_zh: 年龄、性别、种族等人口因素的影响已在自动人脸识别系统中得到广泛研究。然而，\textit{数字修改}人口统计和面部属性对面部识别的影响相对而言还没有得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们研究了通过生成对抗网络（GAN）诱导的属性操作对人脸识别性能的影响。我们在 CelebA 数据集上进行实验，使用 AttGAN 和 STGAN 有意修改 13 个属性，并评估它们对两种基于深度学习的人脸验证方法 ArcFace 和 VGGFace 的影响。我们的研究结果表明，涉及眼镜和性暗示数字改变的一些属性操作可能会严重损害面部识别高达 73%，需要进一步分析。

AI.tldr: 研究通过生成对抗网络（GAN）进行的面部属性修改对人脸识别性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管已广泛研究人口统计学因素对人脸识别的影响，但通过GAN进行数字修改的属性影响仍缺乏深入探讨。
AI.method: 在CelebA数据集上使用AttGAN和STGAN修改13种面部属性，并评估ArcFace和VGGFace两种人脸识别方法的性能变化。
AI.result: 实验发现，眼镜添加和性别线索修改等属性操作可使人脸识别准确率下降高达73%。
AI.conclusion: GAN诱导的特定属性修改会显著损害人脸识别效果，需进一步分析其潜在影响机制。

search_text: Can GAN-induced Attribute Manipulations Impact Face Recognition? GAN 引发的属性操作会影响人脸识别吗？ Impact due to demographic factors such as age, sex, race, etc., has been studied extensively in automated face recognition systems. However, the impact of \textit{digitally modified} demographic and facial attributes on face recognition is relatively under-explored. In this work, we study the effect of attribute manipulations induced via generative adversarial networks (GANs) on face recognition performance. We conduct experiments on the CelebA dataset by intentionally modifying thirteen attributes using AttGAN and STGAN and evaluating their impact on two deep learning-based face verification methods, ArcFace and VGGFace. Our findings indicate that some attribute manipulations involving eyeglasses and digital alteration of sex cues can significantly impair face recognition by up to 73% and need further analysis. 年龄、性别、种族等人口因素的影响已在自动人脸识别系统中得到广泛研究。然而，\textit{数字修改}人口统计和面部属性对面部识别的影响相对而言还没有得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们研究了通过生成对抗网络（GAN）诱导的属性操作对人脸识别性能的影响。我们在 CelebA 数据集上进行实验，使用 AttGAN 和 STGAN 有意修改 13 个属性，并评估它们对两种基于深度学习的人脸验证方法 ArcFace 和 VGGFace 的影响。我们的研究结果表明，涉及眼镜和性暗示数字改变的一些属性操作可能会严重损害面部识别高达 73%，需要进一步分析。 研究通过生成对抗网络（GAN）进行的面部属性修改对人脸识别性能的影响。 Sudipta Banerjee,Aditi Aggarwal,Arun Ross cs.CV

authors_text: Sung Moon Ko,Sungjun Cho,Dae-Woong Jeong,Sehui Han,Moontae Lee,Honglak Lee
title: Grouping-matrix based Graph Pooling with Adaptive Number of Clusters
title_zh: 具有自适应簇数的基于分组矩阵的图池
abstract: Graph pooling is a crucial operation for encoding hierarchical structures within graphs. Most existing graph pooling approaches formulate the problem as a node clustering task which effectively captures the graph topology. Conventional methods ask users to specify an appropriate number of clusters as a hyperparameter, then assume that all input graphs share the same number of clusters. In inductive settings where the number of clusters can vary, however, the model should be able to represent this variation in its pooling layers in order to learn suitable clusters. Thus we propose GMPool, a novel differentiable graph pooling architecture that automatically determines the appropriate number of clusters based on the input data. The main intuition involves a grouping matrix defined as a quadratic form of the pooling operator, which induces use of binary classification probabilities of pairwise combinations of nodes. GMPool obtains the pooling operator by first computing the grouping matrix, then decomposing it. Extensive evaluations on molecular property prediction tasks demonstrate that our method outperforms conventional methods.
summary: Graph pooling is a crucial operation for encoding hierarchical structures within graphs. Most existing graph pooling approaches formulate the problem as a node clustering task which effectively captures the graph topology. Conventional methods ask users to specify an appropriate number of clusters as a hyperparameter, then assume that all input graphs share the same number of clusters. In inductive settings where the number of clusters can vary, however, the model should be able to represent this variation in its pooling layers in order to learn suitable clusters. Thus we propose GMPool, a novel differentiable graph pooling architecture that automatically determines the appropriate number of clusters based on the input data. The main intuition involves a grouping matrix defined as a quadratic form of the pooling operator, which induces use of binary classification probabilities of pairwise combinations of nodes. GMPool obtains the pooling operator by first computing the grouping matrix, then decomposing it. Extensive evaluations on molecular property prediction tasks demonstrate that our method outperforms conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 图池化是对图中的分层结构进行编码的关键操作。大多数现有的图池方法将问题表述为有效捕获图拓扑的节点聚类任务。传统方法要求用户指定适当数量的簇作为超参数，然后假设所有输入图共享相同数量的簇。然而，在聚类数量可能变化的归纳设置中，模型应该能够在其池化层中表示这种变化，以便学习合适的聚类。因此，我们提出了 GMPool，一种新颖的可微分图池架构，可根据输入数据自动确定适当的簇数量。主要直觉涉及定义为池算子的二次形式的分组矩阵，这导致使用节点成对组合的二元分类概率。 GMPool通过首先计算分组矩阵，然后分解它来获得池化算子。对分子性质预测任务的广泛评估表明我们的方法优于传统方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应确定聚类数的图池化方法GMPool，以处理归纳场景中变化的聚类需求
AI.motivation: 传统图池化方法需要用户预设聚类数，无法适应归纳场景中变化的聚类需求，需自动调整聚类数以提升模型灵活性和适应性
AI.method: 通过定义分组矩阵（二次型）并利用节点对的二元分类概率，分解该矩阵以获得自适应聚类数的池化算子
AI.result: 在分子属性预测任务中，GMPool方法性能优于传统图池化方法
AI.conclusion: GMPool有效解决了图池化中自适应聚类数的问题，提升了模型在归纳场景下的灵活性和预测性能

authors_text: Runmin Cong,Yumo Zhang,Ning Yang,Haisheng Li,Xueqi Zhang,Ruochen Li,Zewen Chen,Yao Zhao,Sam Kwong
title: Boundary Guided Semantic Learning for Real-time COVID-19 Lung Infection Segmentation System
title_zh: 实时 COVID-19 肺部感染分割系统的边界引导语义学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Consumer Electronics 2022
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Consumer Electronics 2022
abstract: The coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) continues to have a negative impact on healthcare systems around the world, though the vaccines have been developed and national vaccination coverage rate is steadily increasing. At the current stage, automatically segmenting the lung infection area from CT images is essential for the diagnosis and treatment of COVID-19. Thanks to the development of deep learning technology, some deep learning solutions for lung infection segmentation have been proposed. However, due to the scattered distribution, complex background interference and blurred boundaries, the accuracy and completeness of the existing models are still unsatisfactory. To this end, we propose a boundary guided semantic learning network (BSNet) in this paper. On the one hand, the dual-branch semantic enhancement module that combines the top-level semantic preservation and progressive semantic integration is designed to model the complementary relationship between different high-level features, thereby promoting the generation of more complete segmentation results. On the other hand, the mirror-symmetric boundary guidance module is proposed to accurately detect the boundaries of the lesion regions in a mirror-symmetric way. Experiments on the publicly available dataset demonstrate that our BSNet outperforms the existing state-of-the-art competitors and achieves a real-time inference speed of 44 FPS.
summary: The coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) continues to have a negative impact on healthcare systems around the world, though the vaccines have been developed and national vaccination coverage rate is steadily increasing. At the current stage, automatically segmenting the lung infection area from CT images is essential for the diagnosis and treatment of COVID-19. Thanks to the development of deep learning technology, some deep learning solutions for lung infection segmentation have been proposed. However, due to the scattered distribution, complex background interference and blurred boundaries, the accuracy and completeness of the existing models are still unsatisfactory. To this end, we propose a boundary guided semantic learning network (BSNet) in this paper. On the one hand, the dual-branch semantic enhancement module that combines the top-level semantic preservation and progressive semantic integration is designed to model the complementary relationship between different high-level features, thereby promoting the generation of more complete segmentation results. On the other hand, the mirror-symmetric boundary guidance module is proposed to accurately detect the boundaries of the lesion regions in a mirror-symmetric way. Experiments on the publicly available dataset demonstrate that our BSNet outperforms the existing state-of-the-art competitors and achieves a real-time inference speed of 44 FPS.
abstract_zh: 尽管疫苗已经研发出来并且国家疫苗接种覆盖率正在稳步提高，2019冠状病毒病（COVID-19）仍然对世界各地的医疗保健系统产生负面影响。现阶段，从CT图像中自动分割肺部感染区域对于COVID-19的诊断和治疗至关重要。得益于深度学习技术的发展，一些针对肺部感染分割的深度学习解决方案被提出。但由于分布分散、背景干扰复杂、边界模糊，现有模型的准确性和完整性仍不理想。为此，我们在本文中提出了一种边界引导语义学习网络（BSNet）。一方面，设计了结合顶层语义保存和渐进语义集成的双分支语义增强模块，对不同高层特征之间的互补关系进行建模，从而促进生成更完整的分割结果。另一方面，提出镜面对称边界引导模块，以镜面对称的方式准确检测病变区域的边界。对公开数据集的实验表明，我们的 BSNet 优于现有最先进的竞争对手，并实现了 44 FPS 的实时推理速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边界引导语义学习的实时COVID-19肺部感染分割系统，旨在提高CT图像中感染区域分割的准确性和完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在分割肺部感染区域时存在精度不足、边界模糊等问题，难以满足临床诊断需求。
AI.method: 设计双分支语义增强模块与镜像对称边界引导模块，分别通过多尺度特征融合与边界对称约束优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上优于现有方法，实现44 FPS的实时推理速度，分割精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: BSNet通过边界引导语义学习有效解决了肺部感染分割的精度与实时性矛盾，具有临床应用价值。

On the one hand, the dual-branch semantic enhancement module that combines the top-level semantic preservation and progressive semantic integration is designed to model the complementary relationship between different high-level features, thereby promoting the generation of more complete segmentation results. On the other hand, the mirror-symmetric boundary guidance module is proposed to accurately detect the boundaries of the lesion regions in a mirror-symmetric way. Experiments on the publicly available dataset demonstrate that our BSNet outperforms the existing state-of-the-art competitors and achieves a real-time inference speed of 44 FPS. 尽管疫苗已经研发出来并且国家疫苗接种覆盖率正在稳步提高，2019冠状病毒病（COVID-19）仍然对世界各地的医疗保健系统产生负面影响。现阶段，从CT图像中自动分割肺部感染区域对于COVID-19的诊断和治疗至关重要。得益于深度学习技术的发展，一些针对肺部感染分割的深度学习解决方案被提出。但由于分布分散、背景干扰复杂、边界模糊，现有模型的准确性和完整性仍不理想。为此，我们在本文中提出了一种边界引导语义学习网络（BSNet）。一方面，设计了结合顶层语义保存和渐进语义集成的双分支语义增强模块，对不同高层特征之间的互补关系进行建模，从而促进生成更完整的分割结果。另一方面，提出镜面对称边界引导模块，以镜面对称的方式准确检测病变区域的边界。对公开数据集的实验表明，我们的 BSNet 优于现有最先进的竞争对手，并实现了 44 FPS 的实时推理速度。 本文提出一种基于边界引导语义学习的实时COVID-19肺部感染分割系统，旨在提高CT图像中感染区域分割的准确性和完整性。 Runmin Cong,Yumo Zhang,Ning Yang,Haisheng Li,Xueqi Zhang,Ruochen Li,Zewen Chen,Yao Zhao,Sam Kwong eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Facial De-morphing: Extracting Component Faces from a Single Morph
title_zh: 面部变形：从单个变形中提取组成面
abstract: A face morph is created by strategically combining two or more face images corresponding to multiple identities. The intention is for the morphed image to match with multiple identities. Current morph attack detection strategies can detect morphs but cannot recover the images or identities used in creating them. The task of deducing the individual face images from a morphed face image is known as \textit{de-morphing}. Existing work in de-morphing assume the availability of a reference image pertaining to one identity in order to recover the image of the accomplice - i.e., the other identity. In this work, we propose a novel de-morphing method that can recover images of both identities simultaneously from a single morphed face image without needing a reference image or prior information about the morphing process. We propose a generative adversarial network that achieves single image-based de-morphing with a surprisingly high degree of visual realism and biometric similarity with the original face images. We demonstrate the performance of our method on landmark-based morphs and generative model-based morphs with promising results.

Existing work in de-morphing assume the availability of a reference image pertaining to one identity in order to recover the image of the accomplice - i.e., the other identity. In this work, we propose a novel de-morphing method that can recover images of both identities simultaneously from a single morphed face image without needing a reference image or prior information about the morphing process. We propose a generative adversarial network that achieves single image-based de-morphing with a surprisingly high degree of visual realism and biometric similarity with the original face images. We demonstrate the performance of our method on landmark-based morphs and generative model-based morphs with promising results.
abstract_zh: 面部变形是通过策略性地组合对应于多个身份的两个或多个面部图像来创建的。目的是使变形图像与多个身份相匹配。当前的变形攻击检测策略可以检测变形，但无法恢复创建它们时使用的图像或身份。从变形的面部图像推导出单个面部图像的任务被称为\textit{de-morphing}。现有的去变形工作假设存在与一个身份相关的参考图像，以便恢复同谋的图像——即另一个身份。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的去变形方法，可以从单个变形的面部图像同时恢复两个身份的图像，而不需要参考图像或有关变形过程的先验信息。我们提出了一种生成对抗网络，它实现了基于单个图像的变形，具有令人惊讶的高度视觉真实性和与原始面部图像的生物特征相​​似性。我们展示了我们的方法在基于地标的变形和基于生成模型的变形上的性能，并取得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需参考图像即可从单一面部融合图像中同时恢复两个身份图像的去融合方法。
AI.motivation: 现有去融合方法需依赖参考图像或融合过程先验信息，而实际场景中这些信息往往不可用，需开发更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计生成对抗网络（GAN），通过单图像学习同时重建两个原始面部图像，无需参考图像或融合参数先验。
AI.result: 在基于关键点和生成模型的融合数据集上验证，恢复图像在视觉真实感和生物特征相似度方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无参考去融合方法有效解决了现有技术依赖参考图像的局限性，为融合攻击检测提供了新思路。

title: Deep Learning for Medical Imaging From Diagnosis Prediction to its Counterfactual Explanation
title_zh: 医学影像深度学习从诊断预测到反事实解释
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNN) have achieved unprecedented performance in computer-vision tasks almost ubiquitously in business, technology, and science. While substantial efforts are made to engineer highly accurate architectures and provide usable model explanations, most state-of-the-art approaches are first designed for natural vision and then translated to the medical domain. This dissertation seeks to address this gap by proposing novel architectures that integrate the domain-specific constraints of medical imaging into the DNN model and explanation design.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNN) have achieved unprecedented performance in computer-vision tasks almost ubiquitously in business, technology, and science. While substantial efforts are made to engineer highly accurate architectures and provide usable model explanations, most state-of-the-art approaches are first designed for natural vision and then translated to the medical domain. This dissertation seeks to address this gap by proposing novel architectures that integrate the domain-specific constraints of medical imaging into the DNN model and explanation design.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在商业、技术和科学中几乎无处不在的计算机视觉任务中取得了前所未有的性能。尽管人们付出了大量努力来设计高度精确的架构并提供可用的模型解释，但大多数最先进的方法首先是针对自然视觉设计的，然后转化为医学领域。本论文旨在通过提出将医学成像的特定领域约束集成到 DNN 模型和解释设计中的新颖架构来解决这一差距。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过整合医学影像领域特定约束，提出新型深度学习架构及解释方法，以提升医学影像诊断预测与反事实解释的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法多从自然视觉任务迁移至医学领域，未充分考虑医学影像的特殊性，导致模型解释性不足且临床适用性受限。
AI.method: 设计符合医学影像特性的深度神经网络架构，并开发针对诊断预测的反事实解释框架，以增强模型可解释性与领域适应性。
AI.result: 提出的方法在医学影像诊断任务中表现出更高的预测准确性，同时生成的反事实解释更符合临床需求，验证了领域定制化设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定约束的整合显著提升了深度学习在医学影像中的性能与可解释性，为临床应用提供了更可靠的技术支持。
